---

Peter,

Our founder, Ellen Malcolm, built a millions-strong community of individuals who pledged to support our candidates _all cycle long_. Because of this long-term investment, **EMILYs List members have been central to the success of Democratic pro-choice women** in tough races up and down the ballot.

That's why, nearly four decades later, our annual members remain at the forefront of our strategy and victories every election cycle.

[**As we chart our path forward, our team needs to know: What do you want to see EMILYs List and our endorsed candidates focus on in 2025? Take the survey here:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98807494/517879255/2048948041?sourceid=1055498&refcode=WTENEX31_20241216_MemSurvey_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmUxNmFlZS0wOWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_G7HPTgWaIXA48iqnqixV8uI8X5aLRWC8uJrsTKuZ4=&emci=b7bc9786-b7bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2be16aee-09bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=5177934)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98807496/517879263/2048948041?sourceid=1055498&refcode=WTENEX31_20241216_MemSurvey_ALL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmUxNmFlZS0wOWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_G7HPTgWaIXA48iqnqixV8uI8X5aLRWC8uJrsTKuZ4=&emci=b7bc9786-b7bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2be16aee-09bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=5177934)

the EMILYs List team

name: Bill Gray
subject: You think this is the end of an era?
body:
Bold prediction alert!

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d706ca1a1aa748a386ecd32b73f3e1ed&_e=DpbU0VZiiVtvx9nM1rLo6szDxSh2_c1TBgubTMHqmFDzhqzTxH0QTuICijik9LMyGRF6g5f2AsZoKQIBUhD3fVyIRigyNfYWa2-sHlX-T-emvrQ5qOwIlanlz5ZnGj_NBk-k0DDb_EoFYtw8Cyhv3LP5qltoB6kDnsRwqYgnVgHoGfAkpSAwC8wyj9M1JZfGO_gWmGUE5ZLkxfb4542tkA3BLvyGaFampaafrrzit_MWcs4u5O1GZFexokjC6MBt2HV1dy_v6oZfRB4hLnfWueriUNO5RZqgXNpRPXbutv_xu7QH2tJEYIF4oFVWOEZRCQxM2C8XkW_27Uia_4E6XZf3QfKJMvVsntqr3ZVG_attvWCDKz1mVCWYqDtbu2xVyiLGcDTih4ik3y9PcEwssw%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

**Big media is over**.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that [I need YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news revolution.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d706ca1a1aa748a386ecd32b73f3e1ed&_e=DpbU0VZiiVtvx9nM1rLo6szDxSh2_c1TBgubTMHqmFDzhqzTxH0QTuICijik9LMyGRF6g5f2AsZoKQIBUhD3fVyIRigyNfYWa2-sHlX-T-emvrQ5qOwIlanlz5ZnGj_NBk-k0DDb_EoFYtw8Cyhv3LP5qltoB6kDnsRwqYgnVgHoGfAkpSAwC8wyj9M1JZfGO_gWmGUE5ZLkxfb4542tkA3BLvyGaFampaafrrzit_P2ZTS00K3WwvznmNk9CjgdJ2D-9G-AqZvXp3oPgZRq39HBtBNMbt10jPnMvsiUky0drKlI5-U_wlYlXs26IP0Il5xwPo_ziC0KuCbD4hfrs6DCm5t410B-ATR9WFGHdnhumYF59W88dToDvoV5Oko3cG94cjObO2CHXNnYmhyDuQ%3D%3D)

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media. And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on _The View_ are already blaming the election results on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The _New York Times_ claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

[**Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for decades--with YOUR help!**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d706ca1a1aa748a386ecd32b73f3e1ed&_e=DpbU0VZiiVtvx9nM1rLo6szDxSh2_c1TBgubTMHqmFDzhqzTxH0QTuICijik9LMyGRF6g5f2AsZoKQIBUhD3fVyIRigyNfYWa2-sHlX-T-emvrQ5qOwIlanlz5ZnGj_NBk-k0DDb_EoFYtw8Cyhv3LP5qltoB6kDnsRwqYgnVgHoGfAkpSAwC8wyj9M1JZfGO_gWmGUE5ZLkxfb4542tkA3BLvyGaFampaafrrzit_OxYDD8TUseRlr0ThqvzQfev9NPYsKcUPeW5NNNvjHtMYRXREQqd9q3JkC9RMlqlC9WsyoM-40VSKAuNOIcVGMTFjdJr-_8Xmq4Phh4d1rJ6mmdgu4ao6uwLnEz8RTPSsWz7Bg3zEnkW-jSGGCwtYobMi9e0AD-Q474ymQ8CQ18bA%3D%3D)

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk. We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d706ca1a1aa748a386ecd32b73f3e1ed&_e=DpbU0VZiiVtvx9nM1rLo6szDxSh2_c1TBgubTMHqmFDzhqzTxH0QTuICijik9LMyGRF6g5f2AsZoKQIBUhD3fVyIRigyNfYWa2-sHlX-T-emvrQ5qOwIlanlz5ZnGj_NBk-k0DDb_EoFYtw8Cyhv3LP5qltoB6kDnsRwqYgnVgHoGfAkpSAwC8wyj9M1JZfGO_gWmGUE5ZLkxfb4542tkA3BLvyGaFampaafrrzit_MvgMoQ8PDOOMB0PbGidNCRI_LIOY9rv9KuYGglakbn_HYl1KixZKsNyJRXcovOnbnr60F0Gp9ZLBzoE6L3S7hy-OWJ4ReI5hQYX7mGfFjy6rBddkw3Y33cEf6B8KhyTbhZvt0aDYbogFvP8Sh1AFGS-bXiPZ2XxOZZaWf5RoAtHg%3D%3D)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d706ca1a1aa748a386ecd32b73f3e1ed&_e=DpbU0VZiiVtvx9nM1rLo6szDxSh2_c1TBgubTMHqmFDzhqzTxH0QTuICijik9LMyGRF6g5f2AsZoKQIBUhD3fVyIRigyNfYWa2-sHlX-T-emvrQ5qOwIlanlz5ZnGj_NBk-k0DDb_EoFYtw8Cyhv3LP5qltoB6kDnsRwqYgnVgHoGfAkpSAwC8wyj9M1JZfGO_gWmGUE5ZLkxfb4542tkA3BLvyGaFampaafrrzit_NX__EQ1KyrkcOlGErHsuWFJ2phs0f60q0EHgu4X53tDv38vHVuFHt4aApF8N59WFCg8dEXyXv_OPHghcjtdJG3PjkSxDBQs2SlI3MAwAu7X7pCuRL8z-p1MjGply9S3zSnvCCDa0oqMpVa43aFWFUUMCrtGksN5RMHhBX-PkHjcQ%3D%3D)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d706ca1a1aa748a386ecd32b73f3e1ed&_e=DpbU0VZiiVtvx9nM1rLo6szDxSh2_c1TBgubTMHqmFDzhqzTxH0QTuICijik9LMyGRF6g5f2AsZoKQIBUhD3fVyIRigyNfYWa2-sHlX-T-emvrQ5qOwIlanlz5ZnGj_NBk-k0DDb_EoFYtw8Cyhv3LP5qltoB6kDnsRwqYgnVgHoGfAkpSAwC8wyj9M1JZfGO_gWmGUE5ZLkxfb4542tkA3BLvyGaFampaafrrzit_Nxd7zcacLHl6oYeTL7iTTsOztoJ02L_ZlU_9x9HSTlTKSIxlSMu9MStAfAsb9pfTcc55xdzzhm0UY_hjpuZscgLuawfy0wzsP7dvkqxtnFX4Q_-uXY3zlae5qjagCkWe_UeUFcrvSqonWjS4F4eCjjkxGGr_6kv_n2bXo_miKEXA%3D%3D)

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Bryan
subject: December 16 Campaign Update
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | **December 16, 2024**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# ICYMI: Continuing the fight for
# Election Integrity
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8dcb5191f6&e=e907534017)
| Last week I announced findings from subpoenas sent to ActBlue, a major Democratic fundraising platform. The documents provided show that ActBlue was not automatically rejecting suspicious payment methods in July, a period when the Democratic Party raised a record number of campaign money. Since September, Act Blue is now implementing new policies. This is a positive step forward, but there is still much more to be done to protect our campaign finance system from fraud and unlawful foreign interference.
---
[Click to read the full story](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=6ea07449e1&e=e907534017)
|
---
|
# Racine County: Make sure to vote in the Special Election on Thursday
---
| If you live in Racine County, you have an important election on Thursday. Check your voter registration at [**myvote.wi.gov**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b4c1bda4a5&e=e907534017) and for local election information, check the Racine County website [**here**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1962764e32&e=e907534017).
Get out and vote!
---
|
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/157c1789f44b/december-9-campaign-update-1240?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * 1818 Milton Ave # 1448 * Janesville, WI 53545-1129 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=2df5585ba2) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=2df5585ba2)
---
|

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Hey there, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey Peter — I wanted to be the first to welcome you to our team. I’m honored that Arizonans of the 3rd Congressional District have elected me to fight for them in Washington, and while I may be new to the House floor, I’m certainly not new to the fight for a better future for all of us. If you’re new to our team, please allow me a moment to introduce myself and my story, [**then add your name to officially endorse our team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809144/517914323/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809145/517914324/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234) I got my start in politics thanks to my mom. She immigrated to this country from Iran when a brutal, theocratic regime took over the country. With this experience, she instilled in myself and my brother a sense of pride in our community. Our dinner table conversations were a bit different than most families. Instead of talking about sports or about what we did in school that day, we were discussing politics and why _none of us_ must take this democracy for granted. I didn’t start my career running for office, Peter — after graduation, I spent time as an advisor in the Executive Office of United Nations Secretary General Ban Ki-moon, serving on the team that helped to deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement. Fighting for sustainable solutions to address our rapidly growing climate crisis has always been at the core of my work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809146/517914325/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234) During the first Trump Administration, I couldn’t just stay silent as his extremist regime attacked women, working families, our environment, and immigrants,**so I decided to stand up and fight back.** I was proud to stand with thousands of Americans in protest of the confirmation of right-wing extremist Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, but I knew that in order to create the change I wanted to see, I needed to do more. **So after knocking on tens of thousands of doors with my team (and my mom) in 2020, I became the _youngest woman ever_ elected to the Phoenix City Council.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809147/517914326/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234) And we got straight to work after Election Day. When the extreme right-wing Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ with the _Dobbs_ decision, I led and passed a resolution to ensure that patients, doctors, nurses, and pharmacists weren’t being criminalized for administering or accessing care. As a Councilwoman, my office was always an open door for workers and I was proud to pass some of the most progressive, pro-union policies in Arizona’s history, including a prevailing wage ordinance that improves the quality of life for construction workers, a Worker Heat Safety ordinance that protects thousands of outdoor workers from the extreme heat Arizonans experience due to our escalating climate crisis, as well as helped to raise wages for thousands of city workers across Phoenix. Everyone deserves a living wage and dignity in the workplace and whether I’m in Phoenix or in Washington, I’ll always fight for working people. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809148/517914327/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234) We know that the right-wing agenda will consist of attacking the LGBTQ+ community, immigrants, reproductive rights, and working people and I’m committed to fighting for policies that secure our fundamental freedoms. As an expert on climate policy and the impact of our climate crisis, I know that this is the defining issue of our time and I will lead and support policies that accelerate the transition from fossil fuels to renewable energy, increase our climate resilience, and work directly with FEMA to declare extreme heat as a natural disaster. Each and every person deserves a pathway to success. We deserve living wages and affordable healthcare. I’ll fight every single day in Washington for the everyday people of Arizona’s 3rd District, and I’m glad you’re in this fight with us. [**I wanted to make sure I reached out personally to ask, Peter: Will you add your name and officially endorse our team today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809149/517914328/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98809150/517914329/267414461?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzAxMmI5ZS0xM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MRMpU76J9Zyw7fIY_AvMCKy6wQCG_gmOJak5gJVkfX0=&emci=aca2baa2-f4bb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2c012b9e-13bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=45157234)

clean_body: | Hey Peter — I wanted to be the first to welcome you to our team. I’m honored that Arizonans of the 3rd Congressional District have elected me to fight for them in Washington, and while I may be new to the House floor, I’m certainly not new to the fight for a better future for all of us. If you’re new to our team, please allow me a moment to introduce myself and my story, I got my start in politics thanks to my mom. She immigrated to this country from Iran when a brutal, theocratic regime took over the country. With this experience, she instilled in myself and my brother a sense of pride in our community. Our dinner table conversations were a bit different than most families. Instead of talking about sports or about what we did in school that day, we were discussing politics and why none of us must take this democracy for granted. I didn’t start my career running for office, Peter — after graduation, I spent time as an advisor in the Executive Office of United Nations Secretary General Ban Ki-moon, serving on the team that helped to deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement. Fighting for sustainable solutions to address our rapidly growing climate crisis has always been at the core of my work. During the first Trump Administration, I couldn’t just stay silent as his extremist regime attacked women, working families, our environment, and immigrants,so I decided to stand up and fight back. I was proud to stand with thousands of Americans in protest of the confirmation of right-wing extremist Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court, but I knew that in order to create the change I wanted to see, I needed to do more. So after knocking on tens of thousands of doors with my team (and my mom) in 2020, I became the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council. And we got straight to work after Election Day. When the extreme right-wing Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade with the Dobbs decision, I led and passed a resolution to ensure that patients, doctors, nurses, and pharmacists weren’t being criminalized for administering or accessing care. As a Councilwoman, my office was always an open door for workers and I was proud to pass some of the most progressive, pro-union policies in Arizona’s history, including a prevailing wage ordinance that improves the quality of life for construction workers, a Worker Heat Safety ordinance that protects thousands of outdoor workers from the extreme heat Arizonans experience due to our escalating climate crisis, as well as helped to raise wages for thousands of city workers across Phoenix. Everyone deserves a living wage and dignity in the workplace and whether I’m in Phoenix or in Washington, I’ll always fight for working people. We know that the right-wing agenda will consist of attacking the LGBTQ+ community, immigrants, reproductive rights, and working people and I’m committed to fighting for policies that secure our fundamental freedoms. As an expert on climate policy and the impact of our climate crisis, I know that this is the defining issue of our time and I will lead and support policies that accelerate the transition from fossil fuels to renewable energy, increase our climate resilience, and work directly with FEMA to declare extreme heat as a natural disaster. Each and every person deserves a pathway to success. We deserve living wages and affordable healthcare. I’ll fight every single day in Washington for the everyday people of Arizona’s 3rd District, and I’m glad you’re in this fight with us. | We can’t do this work without the support of this strong grassroots team. Thanks for your support. — Yassamin Ansari Congresswoman-elect, Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
Hi Friend,

It’s been a bit of a rollercoaster since Election Day. One thing is for sure: I’m glad you’re on this team. We can fight for what we know is right, but only with your support for Minnesota Democrats. 💙

Today, I promise we’re not asking for money — we did enough of that for the last two years!

I’ll just cut to the chase: Can you follow us on social media? Then forward this email to 5 friends and ask them to follow us too? We’ll build a winning coalition one-by-one and day-by-day!

* Pam Bondi has stood by President Trump’s side as his lawyer during the SHAM impeachment trials.
* Has been TOUGH on ILLEGALS invading Florida.
* SAVED countless lives by reducing the flow of dangerous fentanyl.

As the Attorney General, she will show JUST how corrupt DC has become, _**but her chances of being appointed are slimming by the second.**_

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98809329/517919458/591622111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2M2UwOTgxLTE2YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xEv8JBPtFJTFwnuXaqNlVy1oHW6ZKZ7vZRuUwLGeJDY=&emci=667c78fe-02bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=063e0981-16bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)
---
| | Hi Peter, Let us introduce ourselves: our names are Emily Flores and Leslie Santiago and we’re current students at Lewis & Clark College. We started as the 2024 Democracy Fellows for the Oregon League of Conservation Voters Education Fund in the fall of this year! Our goal for this fellowship was to equip both students and the general public with knowledge and skills they need to be effective advocates and voters for the environment. We held classroom presentations, club presentations, tabling sessions, sent emails, phone calls, texts, and ran a mock election to engage with thousands of Oregon voters about changes to City of Portland government and ranked choice voting (RCV). In order to reach as many voters as possible, we sent 55,708 emails to educate them about the process of RCV. We tabled at 18 events and presented in 14 classes to bring voters further awareness of RCV. Then, in the final days leading up to the general election, we sent out 1,224 texts and 136,218 email reminders to those who took our pledge to vote. Voters were delighted to have someone check in and get the support they needed to cast their vote. We wouldn’t have had the opportunity to be a democracy fellow without the proper funds from generous donors. During our time as a fellow we’ve learned so much as voters and advocates. [**We’re writing to you today to ask: would you consider making a year end donation to OLCV, so youth like us can continue to educate young voters and climate activists?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98809330/517919459/591622111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2M2UwOTgxLTE2YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xEv8JBPtFJTFwnuXaqNlVy1oHW6ZKZ7vZRuUwLGeJDY=&emci=667c78fe-02bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=063e0981-16bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) [**Did you know that $1,500 is all it takes to sponsor an OLCV campaign fellow to help train the next generation of climate organizers? $5,000 could help fund an innovative youth-led climate campaign, engaging young climate activists in OLCV’s work!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98809331/517919460/591622111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2M2UwOTgxLTE2YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xEv8JBPtFJTFwnuXaqNlVy1oHW6ZKZ7vZRuUwLGeJDY=&emci=667c78fe-02bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=063e0981-16bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, Let us introduce ourselves: our names are Emily Flores and Leslie Santiago and we’re current students at Lewis & Clark College. We started as the 2024 Democracy Fellows for the Oregon League of Conservation Voters Education Fund in the fall of this year! Our goal for this fellowship was to equip both students and the general public with knowledge and skills they need to be effective advocates and voters for the environment. We held classroom presentations, club presentations, tabling sessions, sent emails, phone calls, texts, and ran a mock election to engage with thousands of Oregon voters about changes to City of Portland government and ranked choice voting (RCV). In order to reach as many voters as possible, we sent 55,708 emails to educate them about the process of RCV. We tabled at 18 events and presented in 14 classes to bring voters further awareness of RCV. Then, in the final days leading up to the general election, we sent out 1,224 texts and 136,218 email reminders to those who took our pledge to vote. Voters were delighted to have someone check in and get the support they needed to cast their vote. We wouldn’t have had the opportunity to be a democracy fellow without the proper funds from generous donors. During our time as a fellow we’ve learned so much as voters and advocates. help support the next generation of climate advocates! If you’d like to make a tax-deductible donation, you can give to the. Thank you for supporting OLCV and allowing us to gain this rewarding and insightful experience through OLCV’s sponsored fellowship. Sincerely,Emily Flores & Leslie SantiagoOLCV-EF 2024 Democracy Fellows | | P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, but still remain on our general email list! | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Friend, it is the Biden family’s FINAL holiday season in the White House as President and First Lady.

**After a hectic year, we think a happy holiday season is exactly what the Biden family needs — and we want to make sure it is one to remember!**

_We know this card will go VIRAL!_ So if you want to reserve your spot, we need you to sign in the next HOUR!

[**⇩ ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THEIR HOLIDAY CARD NOW ⇩**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241216_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18240%2E878179%2EEJM56M) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241216_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18240%2E878179%2EEJM56M) | [ADD YOUR NAME: SIGN OUR HOLIDAY CARD TO THE BIDEN FAMILY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241216_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18240%2E878179%2EEJM56M)
---
President Biden has done __so much__ for us:

✔️ Passed a once-in-a-generation infrastructure package,
✔️ Gave Americans much-needed economic relief,
✔️ Bravely stepped down to put our country first,
✔️ _And so much more!_

**So we want to wish him a wonderful and restful holiday season — _he certainly deserves it!_**

[**We only have limited spots left, folks! Sign our holiday card to President Biden and his family while you can »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241216_EMCARD_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18240%2E878179%2EEJM56M)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18240%2E878179%2EEJM56M). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18240%2E878179%2EEJM56M).**

Many testimonies have flowed in but one of them I wanted to share with you. **You will want to watch this!** Watch the **miraculous testimony** here: [https://youtu.be/QaAgtuN96gg](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9867.1.a5835f290b7e870e8806683bbba4e66d) If you need prayer please visit: [www.sheridan.church/prayer](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9868.1.ef66ec6ff175dec9682bf24c7a217228) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan.Church:** -Sun, Dec 22 @10am: **Christmas Concert** -Sun, Jan 12 @10am: **Erick Stakelbeck** -Wed, Feb 26 @7pm: **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** -Thur, Mar 6 @6:30pm: **Eric Trump** | RSVP: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1493676](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9869.1.7eda73a6171d87decfee42c4079f23e4) Please consider partnering with the mission of [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9870.1.5b8044317ad0c7bee534a3bc926477e5): [https://sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9871.1.2455321a88b1c75ab22d083b548e9fce) Thank you,

Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9881.1.b4f34a1c54de5af63bb596e3a50dd16a), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9882.1.10579ba721d724ee22c5dd30c18d33a9). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9883.1.41339a68d05ad2209e2c0854a75354a9)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9884.1.535c35702e425ea402f46a6cdb0d4ed8)
---
---
## 1st Guest Speaker of 2025 @Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9885.1.42ef195a53622355b4118972b624c2a8), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. Including: [Perry Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9886.1.564947d061c6dd5692ea845d0d23ff46), **Tim Tebow** , [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9887.1.ac6d41a144340afad4d5b4eb1f3a6a57)., [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9888.1.788cad573b8c3a68735d4f2d28ff9985), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9889.1.a05cdb98b37fd703dd89f2945a80b489), [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9890.1.de9ab3841b74d62edff41180e1d92bf4), [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9891.1.0ee47508003a6585ff4901e10ce30993), **General Michael Flynn** , [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9892.1.98801565a4ee3d63d0c319f13a84face), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9893.1.28a066e8c46ae7f54a45233fc556c310), [Dr. Randy Caldwell](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9894.1.76b896eff586509be4c45bc8b9f9bd3c), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9895.1.12799fd05bfbd186581eec368ea2d035), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others...
But our first guest speaker of 2025, I am very excited about!
Mark your calendars for **Erick Stakelbeck** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18274094.9896.1.2c45f2e0214eee4db868bbc7a49ae872) on Sunday, January 12 at 10am CT.
Erick's show on **TBN** is _phenomenal_ and that Sunday in January will be just as great!

---
Hey there,

On Friday, we sent you an urgent petition to save Social Security from bankruptcy under Trump’s leadership.

But our records indicate that you still haven’t added your signature. **You’re one of the last [21] Democrats from your state that hasn’t signed!**

**[_With Social Security facing bankruptcy in as few as six years under Trump’s plan, we can’t understate how urgent this is. Please sign now »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241216_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22645%2E4449941%2EhWbkDj)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241216_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22645%2E4449941%2EhWbkDj)
---
We’ve attached the original message below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —
Subject: we must foil MAGA’s plan to gut Social Security
From: SAVE Social Security [FFR]
**This is HORRIBLE NEWS:**
**BUT THERE’S STILL HOPE:** More than 90% of Americans polled SUPPORT Social Security – we can foil the MAGA plan if we all speak out together!

We won’t let Republicans gut our earned benefits – Seniors have paid into Social Security most of their lives, _and so many rely on those payments to survive!_
**[_We need a MASSIVE wave of support – 20,000 voices strong – to DEMAND that Congress protects Social Security! Join us now to save Social Security »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241216_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22645%2E4449941%2EhWbkDj)**

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left is hoping to break me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvg9rcjumbnlro9p4ffmrdmv07cph9lb9vdgjda0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h66o32cth2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help.[_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy me._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5o3739ntj7nqhpv7cg1onfcm0i2mqu9gh0alvu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h66o32cth2bs) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes.[_If you’re able, would you consider supporting my “First Amendment Fund” to help me defend myself and defeat the Left’s sham lawfare?_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs47j14jnqej5hr07nmn5bf19o813cklvqs2blr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h66o32cth2bs) Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5vo5bbtgp9mhh5qpglk2fgmb5s3satluvvin5cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h66o32cth2bs)
---
Thank you for your support – and for giving me hope that truth will prevail! Yours truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. I’m facing legal fees, plus an enormous sentence, all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud. But I’m still taking on this fight because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. I will never give up. I hope you won’t either.**[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znbn3brf25co059q73q2b31jt1dt497l1rrr2k00_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h66o32cth2bs)**

clean_body: They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me... | | | | | | | From the Desk of | | | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was very wrong... When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery... I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help. American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes. Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me. Thank you for your support – and for giving me hope that truth will prevail! Yours truly, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. I’m facing legal fees, plus an enormous sentence, all for speaking the truth and calling out election fraud. But I’m still taking on this fight because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. I will never give up. I hope you won’t either. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7fqdpd1aecveatdlvp68enbamns094rqp7fifgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4fqp31p97nsndl505ga52dlkgrrkhckekiarod0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt8o0idtpjrkhtg7hd8vrato787p2pcr840dn090_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6mokas6b75ipb718ktj5vd42q4v53d3m0cekc90_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z43rg0qd5efqiji8qro0ke68dmpull8sm3opejfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqapd3thpgine0rabst4feidsh073p9q9sr4tcs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: Grover Norquist
subject: How I discovered Ayn Rand
body:
Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand?
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg38lvji5ieg9tpc1dpl5fo8va2qus58h6fsadig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs) Friend,

Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I’d like to admit.

When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand’s name.

In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read _Atlas Shrugged_ or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate.

**So, I went out and read Ayn Rand’s novels and other writings.**

After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand’s ideas. _Because I was!_ I just didn’t know it yet.

**While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age — The Atlas Society.**

They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels.

I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. **_Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels_.**

**[Can you please send an urgent donation of $10, $50, or even $100 to The Atlas Society and help them bring these crucial novels to a new generation?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1li7kteb3gutafh15cngqivdpeigl0jh2biv8lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)**
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z73sv16oa2vkku51eg24sk7440r4cfhctjk31nlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)
Ayn Rand’s works reminded me of what was at stake.

What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand’s novels. They weren’t over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism.

I have met many John Galts, _but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys_. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight.

The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual.

The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ and _Red Pawn_ this year — and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year.

[And with your support, they can reach that goal! Please rush your support today to help The Atlas Society distribute more graphic novels to young Americans.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdr84ah608chpsnmpi6no9hbn0kvb8nt7909g83o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)
[Donate $10 & Distribute 5 Graphic Novels](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpvuek5oqs4iq1qarenf0es41690q03cv0p28ha8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)

[Donate $20 & Distribute 10 Graphic Novels](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuucd6tg7ggqrgmdnf5111fcrd8rs7hpeg2s4lbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)

[Donate $50 & Distribute 25 Graphic Novels](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlspe0hro4rmtg0a04us5b3gik77rf9i74hb8qr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)

[Donate $100 & Distribute 50 Graphic Novels](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrgsjsn14lm3be768fjc8p35tuhp7btsolfo0i20_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)

[Donate $250 & Distribute 150 Graphic Novels](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs5i1lrt1ilr47lr603g95aasmi60bp19boddaa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)

[Donate $500 & Distribute 300 Graphic Novels](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1ms41dekpmudk1dd8l7ib1ade7b293mm5p8kr28_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)
They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture
downstream from? Philosophy!

Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment.

That’s why it’s so important to adapt Rand’s works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun — _today, only 12% do_.

By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand’s literature to life with vibrant art and action.

Ayn Rand’s works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others.

**If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others.**

Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand’s moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today.
[Donate ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeih5cnb6ajhdiq703526mjf4sltljfcrjm3bgd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)
Thank you,

Grover Norquist

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6c28kqg8b6icjfm16740i5dbbmvb7r1uv70a86o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj7ctim2o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsgiqqr81ld5nofu21cbnd3ganiapsguh7tiq6e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrck83nulp899lg67sfhfnssbjc6t72kon09n3h8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5gm4p73cpg649fg)

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvn8e0n8tgs7mlhjkjjulhusa3l5rs37e38s2c4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z86thh87j1l5o56k38bbdjc8uc33nv6nmg2osjdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zafg5eudq4ohlm37d6hfodv951r1uf8fq7h0v46o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztjvc0ncoefm2lsdgqorjt9d96atqnbs16pubfrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5h69or6cjh2bs)
---
| |
---

First Look News

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ahca5tu8fdnvs1iprjoo5q10hof11ilelqochg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j6coj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7vqdl35q8t7ghqcdfc092d1q27dfncgnm8cdt60_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j6coj2cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpkojnrpikl14t53frjnvq5auolmik7flet5prjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j6coj2cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ad7rqo4jt6ntgqk49gdp4e8ub6sklstpra4js8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j6coj2cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7bmeh5nodbqn3206hrc2l13qedds686vbl8tbh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j6coj2cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlkj111s8fpofcrpad31onnvt5oof46j5ve8poao_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j6coj2cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Grover Norquist
subject: How I discovered Ayn Rand
body:
Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand?
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf8jtth2haoi514lo4gvth9g26s82jo9s3f1a2tg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs) Friend,

Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I’d like to admit.

When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand’s name.

In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read _Atlas Shrugged_ or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate.

**So, I went out and read Ayn Rand’s novels and other writings.**

After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand’s ideas. _Because I was!_ I just didn’t know it yet.

**While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age — The Atlas Society.**

They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels.

I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. **_Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels_.**

**[Can you please send an urgent donation of $10, $50, or even $100 to The Atlas Society and help them bring these crucial novels to a new generation?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3h222g9kmupb3vesl1u64p7dhd1j622omc2op48_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)**
[Donate](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj91j7koj60fhu46s14ruuofrgup0q96imo0v6j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)
Ayn Rand’s works reminded me of what was at stake.

What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand’s novels. They weren’t over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism.

I have met many John Galts, _but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys_. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight.

The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual.

The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ and _Red Pawn_ this year — and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year.

[And with your support, they can reach that goal! Please rush your support today to help The Atlas Society distribute more graphic novels to young Americans.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znbe7n3gcqsi8n3l0jrfapn7ntlqd6oc0ceihvm0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)
[Donate $10 & Distribute 5 Graphic Novels](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zt6acm4nomilgvum85ak6ptebv62hlleqdvobb5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)

[Donate $20 & Distribute 10 Graphic Novels](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z27rnpmb0lgtgbhpuleg8is1c59ad3pmr4gl7hgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)

[Donate $50 & Distribute 25 Graphic Novels](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z36ajkjahqhuet25lnqthr5dpr6otn9r0ildkfp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)

[Donate $100 & Distribute 50 Graphic Novels](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zla2v9fgnks3nq0vkjrgm83aeun1pip0990kbq5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)

[Donate $250 & Distribute 150 Graphic Novels](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjrno31oti7i5jr3rs4d8pa7ijooqeb6s173arsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)

[Donate $500 & Distribute 300 Graphic Novels](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z03phe9nc72o3sq2h16rlij5a8ser7k65qk0avpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)
They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture
downstream from? Philosophy!

Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment.

That’s why it’s so important to adapt Rand’s works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun — _today, only 12% do_.

By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand’s literature to life with vibrant art and action.

Ayn Rand’s works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others.

**If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others.**

Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand’s moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today.
[Donate ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3d0o5g76hu02sv7tlr78btfv1pc9p6qm4meuafo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j62p30cjh2bs)
Thank you,

Grover Norquist

clean_body: Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Friend, Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I’d like to admit. When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand’s name. In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read Atlas Shrugged or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate. So, I went out and read Ayn Rand’s novels and other writings. After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand’s ideas. Because I was! I just didn’t know it yet. While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age — The Atlas Society. They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels. I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels. Ayn Rand’s works reminded me of what was at stake. What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand’s novels. They weren’t over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism. I have met many John Galts, but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight. The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual. The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand’s ANTHEM and Red Pawn this year — and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year. They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture downstream from? Philosophy! Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment. That’s why it’s so important to adapt Rand’s works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun — today, only 12% do. By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand’s literature to life with vibrant art and action. Ayn Rand’s works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others. If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others. Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand’s moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today. Thank you, Grover Norquist The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkaif0ris4q50f0511e7tsursv70ipd4ockhko30_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j66o76cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4flepc73ga0kudr44j1mgalg4g6rlc4o8323lo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j66o76cth2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlkfmbsnkkog71tbldqa10mc5hba6jpcb2ag95po_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j66o76cth2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp6lmouidhn7vb18om0p1kimpflfllrnec5buu20_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j66o76cth2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztofad4e8cmu8cn96eherlkgd61tiumiccdkmi9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j66o76cth2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7rvk10e52m6m16569oq0am6plrl5jf93d463fi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5j66o76cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---
