name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Are you seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWTRYBFWN4

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWTRYBFWN4

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email-I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice.

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents…

…as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it…

Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

Hides the corruption of the ruling class

Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-including the importance
of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64049941:WTRYBFWN4:m:3:2532013465:ABEE239E945C14DEFDAF0A9621618567:r

The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed.

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights-to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more-are under constant attack.

You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.

A vital part of our efforts in this fight-in which Hillsdale College is a leader-is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.

These efforts include:

Teaching bright and principled students-on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.-who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution

Distributing Imprimis, America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the
Department of Justice, which you can access at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64049941:WTRYBFWN4:m:3:2532013465:ABEE239E945C14DEFDAF0A9621618567:r

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Phil Izon
subject: I have heard of another petition to repeal Ranked Choice Voting.
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67612f3e98ed1134cec0a61d&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67612e2899604b5f45c8612e%26ss_email_id%3D67612f3e98ed1134cec0a61d%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%2Bhave%2Bheard%2Bof%2Banother%2Bpetition%2Bto%2Brepeal%2BRanked%2BChoice%2BVoting.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-17T07%253A59%253A00Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67612e2899604b5f45c8612e&l=en-US&s=tbfVnxN0uepyKQ1MMXG5pWxEs5A%3D) |
---|---
|
#### **I have heard of another petition to repeal Ranked Choice Voting. They are different in that their petition will address campaign finance regulations, where mine only addresses Ranked Choice Voting and Jungle Primary. So, if both are approved and signatures gathered, they will both be on the ballot as independent ballot measures.**
#### **I welcome any and all groups in the fight against Ranked Choice Voting. As Jamie Allard reacts to this, I’m surprised to see her instruct people on which petition to sign and specifically advising against signing Phil Izon’s. Personally, I’ve always believed in supporting as many grassroots efforts as possible, recognizing the strength in numbers. In fact, I’ve even considered having my 700+ volunteers carry both petitions, fostering collaboration instead of division. But posts like this make it clear that unless you strictly toe the line and follow directives, you risk being cast aside. This approach undermines the spirit of teamwork and unity we need to succeed. True progress comes from working together, not gatekeeping efforts that could amplify our shared goals.**
---
### **Help Me Gather Signatures, Starting March 2025**
---

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19392/6374453/2c8a71fe3c77367b711cec078400f54a428fc206/3d5e73f887532f48ce62acdb9feb943be1b765f7)
---
| | |
---
_December 17th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19392/6374453/2c8a71fe3c77367b711cec078400f54a428fc206/3d5e73f887532f48ce62acdb9feb943be1b765f7). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19392/6374453/2c8a71fe3c77367b711cec078400f54a428fc206/3d5e73f887532f48ce62acdb9feb943be1b765f7).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19392/6374453/2c8a71fe3c77367b711cec078400f54a428fc206/3d5e73f887532f48ce62acdb9feb943be1b765f7)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19392/6374453/2c8a71fe3c77367b711cec078400f54a428fc206/3d5e73f887532f48ce62acdb9feb943be1b765f7)
---
|
---

You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service.
---
|
---

514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc1922e8-a85f-40a2-975c-165e2e55d0f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2baf9340-62b2-4cf4-94f5-de68f5ccb417/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) All we can say is yikes, Peter. We all knew this was coming, but it’s still scary to think that those who stormed our Capitol building just four years ago in a deadly riot could go free. It’s scary that people who were so disillusioned by Trump’s LIES about our election system took up arms against government officials and tried to DESTROY our democracy. And it’s scary that Donald Trump – the same man who orchestrated the Jan. 6 riot – could get the opportunity to pardon his supporters and help them get away with their TREASONOUS actions.
---
| | [HELP US FIGHT BACK →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73385356-8b54-4966-8730-3359aad5d7d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, we may not be able to prevent Trump from pardoning these dangerous individuals, but we can band together to help fight back against the misinformation and MAGA threats that lead to the Jan. 6 riots in the first place. Trump and his far-right cronies will say ANYTHING to stay in power. We have to get the TRUTH about their dangerous policies out there and help Democrats take back control to prevent as much harm to our country as we can! [But if we’re going to combat all the lies being spread by Trump and his allies, we’re going to need MAJOR resources ASAP. Can you help us by pitching in $10 to Blue Amp Action today so we can strip power from the MAGA threat?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89de1d25-fb64-4b36-96c1-7b6b65f9832f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb81fa00-2212-4a30-9a3e-212d4d77d1bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f8258ec5344f44e6b1a1a233f0cfa855&_e=gFtzWZLoxw9-5lCEYaeOuRrHUEVYGI9bBMUOuZxCVnLaJs4QsiQdYGUACxbpuIdiZfLmsoBLxOm2031eH_Qr_9_OTppn3UxvxtJrwDYqktQiDxMk56mkxyFNE8NXuFFBJFnt4vMZZdJsLvXxRsvV2AvFQn7_KF94PVyhA4UtM8XIaJageZBQf0_054E2BXXtmluVoUD4GKQ7JiEEksHoV5MmgDlvP5MvGG_mgegD1BfMmJRq2f4iOePr_B9cKAv8YLfkBeoxh_12xQpL7w9PX0t7OYk94Nkjr4X53gfDI7m1fQei1yu51Hx6Ft0JNnEXULlULxCPLYABHyN6J8wmmWLqvMf5DdloMNJSowBUU2j4farXz2isrKy1KUclhsGd)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f8258ec5344f44e6b1a1a233f0cfa855&_e=gFtzWZLoxw9-5lCEYaeOuRrHUEVYGI9bBMUOuZxCVnLaJs4QsiQdYGUACxbpuIdiZfLmsoBLxOm2031eH_Qr_9_OTppn3UxvxtJrwDYqktQiDxMk56mkxyFNE8NXuFFBJFnt4vMZZdJsLvXxRsvV2AvFQn7_KF94PVyhA4UtM8XIaJageZBQf0_054E2BXXtmluVoUD4GKQ7JiEEksHoV5MmgDlvP5MvGG_mgegD1Bf_-eQT3ji1dMsDU8iLXEuhdGMxk-AsPyWiNcirxUhmjakXcIlJKFiT7gA6DXtBH5hZJCi1MzdVtd7VEEeYEGBfH01kQww7jAlA51GlvJXlI_MJP3MUCj0MxrkxyfFwKrMmjhZJ8y53alR98BLaSfrE)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f8258ec5344f44e6b1a1a233f0cfa855&_e=gFtzWZLoxw9-5lCEYaeOuRrHUEVYGI9bBMUOuZxCVnLaJs4QsiQdYGUACxbpuIdiZfLmsoBLxOm2031eH_Qr_9_OTppn3UxvxtJrwDYqktQiDxMk56mkxyFNE8NXuFFBJFnt4vMZZdJsLvXxRsvV2AvFQn7_KF94PVyhA4UtM8XIaJageZBQf0_054E2BXXtmluVoUD4GKQ7JiEEksHoV5MmgDlvP5MvGG_mgegD1Bd7ckhHDWOgZulvX9zVS2hXKAzM--ckC7LsJUOPJRoaZ0KRhCW9uO3YHuPvBBMuKeLRz4R7C0FKylbF5-C-hYDKtuxfbIrNHJ-vXThAoN-mrf3c5DWdcubS0Q7HF3uyk4OIDVT_Zeb1Zzrrft14pTh4)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left is hoping to break me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e6b9ad02ea44f8a0660988c7ffb421&_e=k8TYSMbTsvbmwOI-vajq9DnmrJ9KkbKpvQb3PuS2W3grYajr5o4qB16yh4r806n6oSah8EsIHYRuOGGQ0rdtkvPzAW29OFv3TBKJ9rGB456fm_B2LLCus8ZcVojUAKy8RUGSNkiMEu6qop9BMmkGaSlkv-0so1jmctnKnTdvS5sSwcYBqsETRwksJBOhNDEU9zW2GC9pfvway7x4RT0PVlukYNviMmbTFFq4bp24juyeV37ltjw6Gnd9YA7wPH2cDduOe1f0z4XlOneXjBFxWeU6GzDVefT2VN0onhN0fdAmWOB9EHwpU09OqPrhd4BRdhvzTkw6Az-2sOqBIq4KDIJ8UYAlQtKfB24mfkz8GPiX5vM2XL6JaMmW5rSn-7aYLdFq1q38KEUmbGxIfUL-jeX1K2l1LpIqZWXYPQmWai0%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...All for speaking the truth.It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong.And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to “make life hell for Kari Lake”...When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth.But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering...They decided to make an example of me.Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud.I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that’s when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me.And for that, I’m now facing enormous fines.In the Left’s America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what happened to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump.His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.And he fights on.I’m certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared.But he didn’t give the Left what they wanted. He’s going to fight for America First. Always.He’s truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day.And I’m inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes.I’m not going to be scared away.I will fight to my last breath.But I need help.[_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy me._](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e6b9ad02ea44f8a0660988c7ffb421&_e=k8TYSMbTsvbmwOI-vajq9DnmrJ9KkbKpvQb3PuS2W3grYajr5o4qB16yh4r806n6oSah8EsIHYRuOGGQ0rdtkvPzAW29OFv3TBKJ9rGB456fm_B2LLCus8ZcVojUAKy8RUGSNkiMEu6qop9BMmkGaSlkv-0so1jmctnKnTdvS5sSwcYBqsETRwksJBOhNDEU9zW2GC9pfvway7x4RT0PVlukYNviMmbTFFq4bp24juyeV37ltjw6Gnd9YA7wPH2cDduOe1f0z4XlOneXjBFxWWXVB3_ot-CB9OOJe1JXfBSeqAFTp3zI1-W0q1BdpW2XaBNZVzrg42lMLVps2IQH1rxHm9jIjcz9yCEhlkLZ0JOs6KB2F75zIWk7TwiYOJs3EhXdZbyS8RHoI25wFZbzE7ebRnNstqTlx3hEQwYHXVs%3D) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare.My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines.And I’ve got good reason to worry about that.The Left is hoping to break me – bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes.[_If you’re able, would you consider supporting my “First Amendment Fund” to help me defend myself and defeat the Left’s sham lawfare?_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e6b9ad02ea44f8a0660988c7ffb421&_e=k8TYSMbTsvbmwOI-vajq9DnmrJ9KkbKpvQb3PuS2W3grYajr5o4qB16yh4r806n6oSah8EsIHYRuOGGQ0rdtkvPzAW29OFv3TBKJ9rGB456fm_B2LLCus8ZcVojUAKy8RUGSNkiMEu6qop9BMmkGaSlkv-0so1jmctnKnTdvS5sSwcYBqsETRwksJBOhNDEU9zW2GC9pfvway7x4RT0PVlukYNviMmbTFFq4bp24juyeV37ltjw6Gnd9YA7wPH2cDduOe1f0z4XlOneXjBFxWbu4asEvIBnGdd_sdb8N27_8P8T8bDAVO5cXV1N8ZECURxojpVzDMdFpCR00TLx3OrwjaJk4l3y4nIQfmbuE4LWxtNVvYfT8osO5q7rAx3p_a-nosSKkSsEBdJSk2iztM8SiE_M1UCuhvxoR_14dU9w%3D) Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me.
---
[ **DONATE **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36e6b9ad02ea44f8a0660988c7ffb421&_e=k8TYSMbTsvbmwOI-vajq9DnmrJ9KkbKpvQb3PuS2W3grYajr5o4qB16yh4r806n6oSah8EsIHYRuOGGQ0rdtkvPzAW29OFv3TBKJ9rGB456fm_B2LLCus8ZcVojUAKy8RUGSNkiMEu6qop9BMmkGaSlkv-0so1jmctnKnTdvS5sSwcYBqsETRwksJBOhNDEU9zW2GC9pfvway7x4RT0PVlukYNviMmbTFFq4bp24juyeV37ltjw6Gnd9YA7wPH2cDduOe1f0z4XlOneXjBFxWZX1Y0pF8ukaNJzyFf_W4zVjuj90bPAUuu5FRStFeL7F4ZLM1Me5w497H5Bgs0xiVat884EUasyCXVh88iR_NfiL4JNsSDS6gjpERB00kkIxRvs0_YzZSX-1xQQjpyTalm9HiD8i9qHSZq44GThRcts%3D)
---
Thank you for your support – and for giving me hope that truth will prevail! Yours truly,
---

Kari Lake

I hope you won’t either.**[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. name: End Of Year Performance Review
subject: We want brutal honesty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thank you in advance

|
---
| | |
Friend, we're not going to beat around the bush.

You're a top supporter who's always been honest and held us accountable; **now we need your honest feedback in House Republicans' End of Year Performance Review _before 9 PM TONIGHT._**

---
| | | [COMPLETE PERFORMANCE REVIEW](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac2ffd86f89a4859b51673ef59d0fddd&_e=xtImRwMaOu2-f7aAf8KkyZ6GQNzbezb2iNlQoS4_gouw5AdPXiMyfffSOlKYa1TbKTeqo_asDbgtUkoaZHQcBY3e_WD_i2geRbKWe09SKCBAg6x0h0W0V2LqeXWxlbkWUf-PZ3s5ty7yDgzKUnokgZ6QcxTf6YEmb9alVVaFid2bxLR2vfIeGTIy61QjkapNV-bG3D8pRsXZQocFxIUjewci24j2y5s1KNgGglerzVRDDkY1UjWfRuv7wEeNEc5rbcjSU4uEgvTaGry_PuQkUeTnRSRyHEwyBBrH9PyGWNJGtK6OqOwQ90hMFy76VwigdgfEhCGjghrm6Ti15bWyWJHYio8To8F6GK5lWP62hJYNRpmJGjoVDQF5QdkZeSMb-rZm_KTTbJPhSsr83MhGVVqYfKPLjuz7FtCLrpkgVE1iC_kdk6p173iIuqMS9sBNioKN3i_zGBdCZ0_aHpa1Jw%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---

**We need opinions from folks like you who've been with us through thick and thin.** Your input will be absolutely crucial in shaping the direction of the Republican Party throughout 2025 and ensuring a successful implementation of the America First Agenda.

name: Grover Norquist
subject: How I discovered Ayn Rand
body:
Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand?
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmVcqJMrUUdGwi1Grj7itZ3KCcBwulxukgKsyi7YdRhg859-gORnFWkRd45TlRQbSVgjTzKrmmlvhARI7OfGOfidWJuL3r_WRBXfNgR7xYDJEsujVjm9lLO3CS2cuZmQKHT2DvZZ0BWVO-UjVFa6uCw4AnGgsMl7sKiPkbCiiDnYw%3D) Friend,

Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I’d like to admit.

When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand’s name.

In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read _Atlas Shrugged_ or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate.

**So, I went out and read Ayn Rand’s novels and other writings.**

After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand’s ideas. _Because I was!_ I just didn’t know it yet.

**While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age — The Atlas Society.**

They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels.

I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. **_Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels_.**

**[Can you please send an urgent donation of $10, $50, or even $100 to The Atlas Society and help them bring these crucial novels to a new generation?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmVcqJMrUUdGwi1Grj7itZ3LhVI1z8GFAv3mVJqkB1qySPj_Z5T0AuCLLK51X3bFaxYag4b7nrtp6Z2AmWJVFb7ZVELaufiGw6kyrY0GJQlrDf6L5V7JV3XR8Xbz78oEEOHgWbnkLA35AJPLmYAx9TOIJFeYJ8bvgzp-GnZRPeQAw%3D)**
[Donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmVcqJMrUUdGwi1Grj7itZ3DrxfMT2at_rBP_PJrHgz1ITBeuqJ4FvbObE5TQ07egY0OLAsv8J9PiASor4jOj_A9AXKFf68OmivkO9yZda1j0VW-y9YbfgYH02GCJLwaPxfpzcrKSh5Ze84vpFLMMjfcVfOkhnDqfIxrFgyr45QIQ%3D)
Ayn Rand’s works reminded me of what was at stake.

What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand’s novels. They weren’t over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism.

I have met many John Galts, _but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys_. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight.

The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual.

The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand’s _ANTHEM_ and _Red Pawn_ this year — and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year.

[And with your support, they can reach that goal! Please rush your support today to help The Atlas Society distribute more graphic novels to young Americans.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmVcqJMrUUdGwi1Grj7itZ3PY6b65VLyy77xCxn6fUKX7Gu371xTwyHWKR8PqKug8Q9HAPaAwXqqXX2VZshENcEPSVdHgkZNeJTWYRUYidcDS7y62me2Y7mjGG8kFbTU5Z9J7WwkE9XdzMkgRM-yV4inxNL12Pw2xFGLk6ZWz3CTk%3D)
[Donate $10 & Distribute 5 Graphic Novels](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmHfopXPeRhoyZ3yAVoffpTnDtAJumpKnN4O7-yxPTvoOCiQ-gZeCqPJ8eOj-qWqBJ6OovgNXyKrVBInL2mj7nptv9Ew_DiH2W98ePn_MzlaAjbmITcU-zhsoyr1Hy-1mV67kjTTUOQzTJrQSKdgA-SY6CNazt_2277I9T5db9yt_ttofj-lfhjue7fvwmKUjy)

[Donate $20 & Distribute 10 Graphic Novels](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmYq6LVW74aIYw22B-yeKVRW5-8tdUoAV0aif3XtoQ_HWJwkS9tEQmJ73c0uO_8w_k2DrdiogAHWPL37_ECOfQCs_muzJEMjOd-nKh27bZig_P9LYSm4jqeyk8bZe_rHl2v5Q5zdwgITridS9TnRpS3PykohEhsz_e_YHcls1_ZAf-IwKMCWvNywow4A06pGhl)

[Donate $50 & Distribute 25 Graphic Novels](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmk-MIKzgXOLWlJ2jRk2ZczFo-GGFvOTScKAvS3AA9TFD8oE2xCFkFguhqmsDkgAWCUH3vCZm_dJ1qDKfOYC2sW4iBCcbk7aQdYsTFvoSHYsism9g84UPanJId6q9ILYTJuryKrMkBNVpJi6gHQKRBagSay_JXuR-vSqwsLUgvjjxzf77zQkN3zokpQpVyDeJM)

[Donate $100 & Distribute 50 Graphic Novels](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmV9cmrv5Rs47RTiE4xV6IJLonbTUHMZuxZmvoZiDuLm2YnEAcZEdknjBh134vJjZOBxOvT3M5CraNemfb9wPkzrWiXosUhJl2vPnnYGAlQ0bEA1Tl0HalHcfrxqpCRadzYxhY-RyQphl6wCGPJVlV1A3y6SyPt2GuiHKjmMeNibKNHKperP46QqrzZ4MoVhfu)

[Donate $250 & Distribute 150 Graphic Novels](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmFExMun30FqJtza2GQV73zc7xfFw2nWbafI0F7j3xmy3FDLrFVnjOkd2WFONJ8HFA_v1V8szDjXqNVkkt7aPTw9YPTEEHemwxv0ySDHGWK1skmGZUJOteGDyMyC23yqCJ_WojNofeltsQi1kXIv0q30GI8Jz9KRBAWBi0vOLdhrJAxL8KlWuBOwxXWBvqRBNh)

[Donate $500 & Distribute 300 Graphic Novels](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmAZ4zVoLasu4QfpefODMlJO_HDH8qVjGGngD02KSeuI6NTWT8_nL7taFk8Y2eyXyYGYlBrKDRQ_3PbTLYbIzxBgchQeUPCFf14SmDbc2Y6IhTyT2t86qnyEiEmGs6D56TLibPcr3_8p-fuQuNgtI9Hw7ueIcHxK1y369mK4KRLHLI_-OLQEyenjm_wNwamFHj)
They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture
downstream from? Philosophy!

Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment.

That’s why it’s so important to adapt Rand’s works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun — _today, only 12% do_.

By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand’s literature to life with vibrant art and action.

Ayn Rand’s works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others.

**If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others.**

Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand’s moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today.
[Donate ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=02b9aa37bd8c4c39b567c7517904c920&_e=RkeU1vbKYsLDFUqbwm0MJl5t5bhDh9cMNpObPGW3WGwa0mrtnIBI6D7FG2D3oOACfVaP9_gwAqk-ENUN8Sww-rA_b3q8URrkTLxcHLHOEMhdgVp5UpkmcR3mm9jZYThmVcqJMrUUdGwi1Grj7itZ3INIenqi6tzflqSYDQYB5cd7AXH6xG9GuLutDE21J2Lx4LzSApUEKPNhkEidkQ3S6sGB10pOPKPX9CEMM6Vx502sVbURlaunMTE5au9ig4pmqhUQ4wjRTMWa6ktwSo6krxI7_QFL4muPajERt2_Vtko%3D)
Thank you,

Grover Norquist

clean_body: Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Friend, Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I’d like to admit. When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand’s name. In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read Atlas Shrugged or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate. So, I went out and read Ayn Rand’s novels and other writings. After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand’s ideas. Because I was! I just didn’t know it yet. While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand’s philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age — The Atlas Society. They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels. I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels. Ayn Rand’s works reminded me of what was at stake. What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand’s novels. They weren’t over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism. I have met many John Galts, but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight. The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual. The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand’s ANTHEM and Red Pawn this year — and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year. They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture downstream from? Philosophy! Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment. That’s why it’s so important to adapt Rand’s works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun — today, only 12% do. By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand’s literature to life with vibrant art and action. Ayn Rand’s works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others. If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others. Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand’s moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today. Thank you, Grover Norquist The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

# Tuesday, December 17, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1951, WCBS debuted the "John Henry Faulk Show," which featured music, political humor, and listener participation facilitated by the native Austinite. Faulk’s program was canceled in 1957 after he was branded a communist, but he sued for libel and won a record $3.5 million judgment that was eventually downgraded on appeal. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFy6yAQgOHToE4adkFgFRSvUefXptSAWBliDB5ELOv2maTPBf5_vo_rcrUxxXz7bx9k2nsrC3KUPWAPevE2pnORnTeO-wk6MqCFlGLkE3TB0OSUEnARljQgXricrHfSC-QcUK1dND8xQNAAOI1qEKvTSm4w6nXkZB2TnHxspQ4tUKO33bd0lhfVYS2PLpnQ2nNn4h_DmeF8HMfQ9mBLTjHTUOqN4Rxs9q6UO8OZcquRdobzZr_Svf8sIfeBcj27avzziCnFXWkm-e1hY_p9tD_RL4PfAQAA__-oDlnp)) A Hill County deputy was in for a surprise when he pulled over an 18-wheeler reported for cargo theft last week. Check out the story in _Around Texas_ to learn what he found! Did someone send this to you? ## Teens Arrested After Escaping Detention Center
Three teenagers escaped from a Granbury juvenile detention center and [led authorities on a multi-county chase](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvozAQBOBfYzoj72LsS-HiGrpceyXa4AV8ZwOynZD8-yde_5ppRvo0mr_38U4hhm35Q4ldfc_7iAq1BJRgR08hfkbdePdQ_gYNO7Cd1l2vbtCszvh-IgQFaPRkoPdsyM5Wz_0vAq2mJrgLAwQLgLfetN30sEbP0NupV0wPoRX7UPfc1pUrv6nM8bO_OLfTnpro1lqPIrrfAgeBw3me7f-zvq9S4HDZAgfAK4zAoa6ZWVJO7KWnbeG8P4v893zxFiLLsCWqXCSXiQ72Mu15oU2mEKOkzCT9UWShTxE4NNn54wwxhmKs0GpJFOL3qPrjSy-HXwEAAP__HdppzA) Sunday evening, prompting a nearby school district to cancel classes Monday as a safety precaution. The boys, aged 15 and 16, injured two guards before [stealing a vehicle and firearms and robbing a gas station](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQhJ8Gd1jsGhu5oLjGXa690lrDOuaEIQIuTt7-lPR_O6NvNPr-3NYbhRjS_TedbNtrzysq1BJQglk9hfhedeftpvwMHVswg9bDqGboDqs3mhUNZGaYcPAwedQwa9K7QzV66IL9jAGCAcB5nPrBbWbSO4zGjYppE1qxDy2Xvh3c-EV1j-_85NK7fHbRHq09qhh-CVwELtd19W6ria_66QUuX0Tg8okELoP8--_JKUSukqujB0vPjVMLOUnHqXGRKZd2yC8oqztyjtKH2kpwTXqO9GYv6QxeVqbiDoFLV6x_XCHGUCcjtLqfFOL3YPvR2NPi_wAAAP__lr1wow) in Dublin. After stealing another vehicle, they led police on a chase to Lancaster and Hutchins, where they fled on foot and were eventually apprehended. Morgan Mill ISD, located about 20 miles west of Granbury, [canceled classes Monday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDuvnDAQhX-N6bxi_MBL4SIN3U2bEo3Hw-LIPGS8y-XfR9w-5dHReej78zV-Ycppff3GhX39nrZRtcpIUBLcGDHlazRN9KGNPTTswWljtG17aGY_QUDTR-gcByJE1GTZuh40BWayTfJ3GShwAKq33UNTcJ2ZwDqyLWMQpuWY6lYedebK33hM-do-XB60LU32c637IfQvoQahhvM8H-eEeJtCDVhqosxCDSufh1ADlbTcss6FWf59f3hNmQ_JB-HOUdL7qFu85LqVOsufOfkquIZ3ueS-5UR3Wj2d7HR8EoGSvSMnzdOADMH20gXtpqB5agGb4uN-ppzT0Tlh2teCKf_8rv8F-fHqXwAAAP__jG118A) after consulting with the Erath County Sheriff’s Office. News outlets published the juveniles’ names and photos while they were on the run but withheld that information after they were captured.
## Student Death Prompts Calls For Action
A town hall meeting was held Saturday morning in East Houston to [address concerns about a railroad crossing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuu4yAUAL8Gd1iAMYiCYht32XZLi8exQcIQmZM4_vtVbn_70Wg0_x7rw-WS6_7XHWDxs7VVMCEpF5TrNbpc7lUO0XoWDR_Acj1JOc3M8CFZp7XxhhvGgpm8UYYrBhqE9oqJIOWQ7VfGBdecCzOrcQpeK7nxWYeZgfNEMogZ2zliAoSP61u52xvOMbRjKDYhPjuZ_hCxELFc1zVu7SNUaq-OrX4hIpYKVydiOXLxN015T7SH1FqhHV8RKtIIDhPFdlWaXCn0AMBcd3q6XM7mIg2tBjgr7W4DvIfTxueVS8ldaSLZfrhcfoLw10NvK_4HAAD__34payA) where 15-year-old Milby High School student Sergio Rodriguez was struck and killed by a train while walking to school last Monday. Sergio’s parents filed a wrongful death lawsuit against Union Pacific Railroad and the train operator on Tuesday. Witnesses reported that the student [tripped while trying to cross the tracks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHSpCAQhJ8GMyxAXTQguMTsv_RCCwb4nToES8Z19-2v3KsLL5lgqr_u6v71tXxZTJi_f9otGHrFsiihei4Vl3rxFtN76RtvnPCTbIKRuuv7bhCTbFYTpQdwI4Cwg3DT1Ak5ulFoHx10I-gGzW0mldRSqml4tB04_eijHDQMIljHehE8UjlaWgOFl60xvcszHC2UrUlmJdor634wNTM1X9fVQkL4rdZyVir5VjE153BVpuZUwCam5juTqVmqf-fMWDLfLWBE4Eeoe8m-cio8WrKJ02ExcwuAPmTiJfINk3vztfJK5-cHyeJWOYWQOR0Y_E2Xk44z_8WZmpvD-P3ClLA-NOvF92YxfYrQf5d9GvUnAAD__yMbfZ4) in an undesignated area. Union Pacific claimed he “made a tragic decision to try and outrun a moving train.” Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick and Houston Mayor John Whitmire have supported calls for Union Pacific to [pay for a pedestrian bridge](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OpDAQBp_GZD3CbcBDQHAJ2V56IWr_Da0zeGT37C5vf5rLN_70lUr152P7IM58Pn7TERf5TmXDHgfQCNpugThf29CFxfVh1l1ctDXDYMZ-1t2-mGgJnbWzTcaEQDjre7rf4zghUjLU8fKGadRWa5zH6Wa8s9OQ9Gj92EdyauhjYCn1JnuU-E0t5at8xnrz5ejysos8mzK_FK4KV3Jem_eicH2WJgpXX47jdbJc4CnnBuSFywmVONdCARqlKBdQkljh4Owu2PmxQ_N7KRmavEI8BXYW-Ms5xwBSiU9w7_cXXeDq63CZLoWrHidzRzsoXLu6hOcX58xtsmroHwdx_u8sP0b8XPBfAAAA__-BpHaE) over the high-traffic crossing. At the meeting, U.S. Rep. Sylvia Garcia (D-Houston) urged action to prevent similar tragedies from happening in the future. "_We have to continue to work together to make sure this doesn’t happen again and no child is injured or harmed in any way crossing the tracks_ ," she said.
## Texas Family Moves to Help With Helene Relief
After witnessing the devastation caused by Hurricane Helene, Gholson native Caleb Fisher [moved his family to North Carolina](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOpSAUBOCnwQ4DR9S1oNjG7t92S4NwkJNFuAF-vfftN26_zTSTfJnM76_ty1CkdPwyJ-r29nkDAYpL4HLenKH42VTn9C7cIjvUch6UGkaxyC7oH054McM-ofQC0I-LHI21RiHiAA460g8mQc5SwjJO_WD3eVJejrMdBZqdKYGOWi59C9jwbaqPn3xh6W0-u6hDa6_Khp8MVgbrfd_9n7u9n5LB-tgMVglPTAzWI-RYc-LJNLqQn_nCygNV7s1J8cNTLi1wa0qOlAy3OTVK38gDxhelg9_UAg_fpZA1CbmjamrDwgtGQs9g7Yp2r5tipDrNTInjNBT_TW3__e7S8DcAAP__7-xzhw) to assist with disaster recovery efforts. “ _We were only here, I think it was five days, and I just had that same crazy burning urge to come back and help as much as we could. The good Lord’s blessed us with the opportunity to be able to_ ,” he shared. Fisher made the journey to North Carolina with his wife and their four kids in their camper earlier this month. They are [volunteering with Red Truck Men](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOnDAQBOCnMZ2RvRj8U7hIQ_enTYn27OVwsodPZg_u3j4ifbqRRvo0ml_f8zdmztv9Jz4oyHspMxhw2oK2fk6Y-TO7JoWbSaNtKFjfOdf1ZrTNGnyEBGaEMdkvh84slGjpUyLbufHLD00OF2bBemth7Ie2izc_uMX2PvaG8KacoZSl1FZWEnrjvvCnHFTbWB4Nh1Xkuavuh4JJwXSeZ_vnlPdVKpguW8FkrYLJXOkk_fu1i16IRUdkpqS5RGR9FH5tQlR3LRUPYr2VKquOWAvnDfVK_NRnllWvr1pzxI10ogN3QcllUzA1NaTnmZnzPnjlzP2Bmf_NlP_-dgT4GwAA__94-3Fl), a local nonprofit organization. Months after the storm ravaged the area, Fisher said there is still a lot of work to do. “ _Major bridges washed out, major roads are washed out, houses are still stuffed up in trees. There are still vehicles strewn everywhere_ ,” he said.
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqwyAYAOCnMbcG_1-jzcHDLmEwWsa6sWMw-msFG4uVtH37sd33Ah9834f5YFNOazzaC5n2CGVGjnIHuAM9e5vyc5adNwv3I3RkQAspxcBH6M5GjTgG4SwPRIB7oRYJ6JxdkIId1L5L5hcDBA2A46B64RatZIBBu4GTXZjk5FMrtW9navSwt5CfZaPau3Lpsjm3dr0x8cJwYjjFtKU19vdSs3dldVTXvtTIcLraSAyn6ev4_nF6O30eX7tq_PWeck43pZnk8WJT_lPbv83N4E8AAAD__z6JVMM) Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. **[Be Doers](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqwyAYAOCnMbcG_1-jzcHDLmEwWsa6sWMw-msFG4uVtH37sd33Ah9834f5YFNOazzaC5n2CGVGjnIHuAM9e5vyc5adNwv3I3RkQAspxcBH6M5GjTgG4SwPRIB7oRYJ6JxdkIId1L5L5hcDBA2A46B64RatZIBBu4GTXZjk5FMrtW9navSwt5CfZaPau3Lpsjm3dr0x8cJwYjjFtKU19vdSs3dldVTXvtTIcLraSAyn6ev4_nF6O30eX7tq_PWeck43pZnk8WJT_lPbv83N4E8AAAD__z6JVMM)** We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. [We’re matching the first $750; just give through this link](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqwyAYAOCnMbcG_1-jzcHDLmEwWsa6sWMw-msFG4uVtH37sd33Ah9834f5YFNOazzaC5n2CGVGjnIHuAM9e5vyc5adNwv3I3RkQAspxcBH6M5GjTgG4SwPRIB7oRYJ6JxdkIId1L5L5hcDBA2A46B64RatZIBBu4GTXZjk5FMrtW9navSwt5CfZaPau3Lpsjm3dr0x8cJwYjjFtKU19vdSs3dldVTXvtTIcLraSAyn6ev4_nF6O30eX7tq_PWeck43pZnk8WJT_lPbv83N4E8AAAD__z6JVMM).
---
|

**➤ Uvalde:** City council member Hector Luevano defeated acting mayor Everardo “Lalo” Zamora in Saturday’s mayoral runoff election, earning 665 votes to Zamora’s 636. clean_body: Three teenagers escaped from a Granbury juvenile detention center and led authorities on a multi-county chase Sunday evening, prompting a nearby school district to cancel classes Monday as a safety precaution. | | | | | | Tuesday, December 17, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1951, WCBS debuted the "John Henry Faulk Show," which featured music, political humor, and listener participation facilitated by the native Austinite. Faulk’s program was canceled in 1957 after he was branded a communist, but he sued for libel and won a record $3.5 million judgment that was eventually downgraded on appeal. () A Hill County deputy was in for a surprise when he pulled over an 18-wheeler reported for cargo theft last week. Check out the story in Around Texas to learn what he found! Did someone send this to you? Keep The Texas Flyover coming to your inbox by . We're sponsored today by the non-profit , offering an opportunity to help needy Christian children in Somalia. Abilene 🌦️ 67/40° | Amarillo 🌥️ 65/33° | Austin 🌦️ 76/64° | Brownsville 🌦️ 82/67° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 80/66° | DFW ☁️ 67/56° | El Paso ⛅ 67/35° | Houston 🌦️ 78/67° | Lubbock 🌥️ 67/31° | San Antonio 🌦️ 77/65° | Texarkana 🌦️ 70/60° | Teens Arrested After Escaping Detention Center Three teenagers escaped from a Granbury juvenile detention center and Sunday evening, prompting a nearby school district to cancel classes Monday as a safety precaution. The boys, aged 15 and 16, injured two guards before in Dublin. After stealing another vehicle, they led police on a chase to Lancaster and Hutchins, where they fled on foot and were eventually apprehended. Morgan Mill ISD, located about 20 miles west of Granbury, after consulting with the Erath County Sheriff’s Office. News outlets published the juveniles’ names and photos while they were on the run but withheld that information after they were captured. Student Death Prompts Calls For Action A town hall meeting was held Saturday morning in East Houston to where 15-year-old Milby High School student Sergio Rodriguez was struck and killed by a train while walking to school last Monday. Sergio’s parents filed a wrongful death lawsuit against Union Pacific Railroad and the train operator on Tuesday. Witnesses reported that the student in an undesignated area. Union Pacific claimed he “made a tragic decision to try and outrun a moving train.” Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick and Houston Mayor John Whitmire have supported calls for Union Pacific to over the high-traffic crossing. At the meeting, U.S. Rep. Sylvia Garcia (D-Houston) urged action to prevent similar tragedies from happening in the future. "We have to continue to work together to make sure this doesn’t happen again and no child is injured or harmed in any way crossing the tracks ," she said. Texas Family Moves to Help With Helene Relief After witnessing the devastation caused by Hurricane Helene, Gholson native Caleb Fisher to assist with disaster recovery efforts. “ We were only here, I think it was five days, and I just had that same crazy burning urge to come back and help as much as we could. The good Lord’s blessed us with the opportunity to be able to ,” he shared. Fisher made the journey to North Carolina with his wife and their four kids in their camper earlier this month. They are , a local nonprofit organization. Months after the storm ravaged the area, Fisher said there is still a lot of work to do. “ Major bridges washed out, major roads are washed out, houses are still stuffed up in trees. There are still vehicles strewn everywhere ,” he said. | Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. . | ➤ Uvalde: City council member Hector Luevano defeated acting mayor Everardo “Lalo” Zamora in Saturday’s mayoral runoff election, earning 665 votes to Zamora’s 636. This marks the third mayoral election in the past year due to a series of resignations. () ➤ Austin: The University of Texas System Board of Regents has approved $106 million to construct a series of caps over I-35, connecting the university’s campus with the other side of the interstate. () ➤ Hill County: Law enforcement recovered 34,000 stolen avocados during a traffic stop Thursday after being alerted to a potential cargo theft by the Laredo Police Department. () ➤ Bryan: A Texas Historical Marker was unveiled at the First Mexican Baptist Church of Bryan on Saturday, recognizing the church’s significance as the region’s only Spanish-speaking congregation when it was founded 102 years ago. () ➤ Houston: Two teens were killed, and four were injured, in a shooting at a makeshift club in an empty business Saturday night. “ Makeshift, unsanctioned pop-up parties can quickly lead to chaos and violence ,” said Harris County Sheriff Ed Gonzalez. () ➤ Dallas: UT Southwestern medical student and Rice graduate Travis Dowd won this year’s BMW Dallas Marathon on Sunday with a time of 2:26:08. It was his first race at the distance. body:
A 17-year-old girl opened fire at Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, on Monday, [killing a teacher and a student](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8GNiLfgUM8MHTxlq4dLQLn-CoMlqG28vdVund-0nt6X_fp7jlxfn76lVyby4QdGgWowE7Rc3pNRkY3EyFpSQ6sNkb3fW_k4tDgYzCztRpNuKK1cAv4IArawxAhSHZvGyBYAD2Avgx6hu4ReuxAx9vghekociv75btwbgvN6VUO2i-hrDK5pbWtCv0hcBQ4-i3TWd9I4Jj4IIHj6iPXktXJNZRcOasallKSqkspjfNT_WzRN6pyd3E7OSWuVytM91w9p79M-2_7cPgbAAD__z0oWto) and injuring six others.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1903, [Orville and Wilbur Wright](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQxvGnwQ4jA4oWFNfY7bVXmlkZ1rmwYoCs8e0ve7n26l_yffl_3ZYbcuT98YlPcjWkBTowUoFUdvHI8VpM410gAtINOWW1Mbrve9Nsbli9MdgrO4y0BovjAEgWp7vpwKzj0LB7rylQVik9Kd1OOqjuvvbQKe3HCYXpyHNNuf1OvNeNQrzSi3K7pmcT3VbrUYT-EDALmM_zbDcuNeXr7QLmunGRHi_Ju_wTAXPgXKpEzkfEnWSITKXJzh8nx8hlsMJ0jydy_H2p_1W_HPwEAAD__w6JWl4) achieved the first successful flight of a self-propelled, heavier-than-air aircraft, flying for 12 seconds and covering 120 feet. ## Two Killed in School Shooting
A teenage student opened fire at Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, on Monday, [killing a teacher and a student](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8GNiLfgUM8MHTxlq4dLQLn-CoMlqG28vdVund-0nt6X_fp7jlxfn76lVyby4QdGgWowE7Rc3pNRkY3EyFpSQ6sNkb3fW_k4tDgYzCztRpNuKK1cAv4IArawxAhSHZvGyBYAD2Avgx6hu4ReuxAx9vghekociv75btwbgvN6VUO2i-hrDK5pbWtCv0hcBQ4-i3TWd9I4Jj4IIHj6iPXktXJNZRcOasallKSqkspjfNT_WzRN6pyd3E7OSWuVytM91w9p79M-2_7cPgbAAD__z0oWto) and injuring six others, two critically, according to officials.

Police identified the shooter as [15-year-old Natalie Rupnow,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOozAQBp8GOiPWNgEXLq6hy7VXIsdeh42MF2ETLm9_yvV_9RWfNBrNn_tyd5QoP3-7DW2NvMheagFSwLgER-mz6DbYiChRtWhhVFqrYRh0u1o9OHgELRFHP6kJpngzXhkwaPpgwLRkvzSQMAIoA6ozKkL_8IPsQYXJuEb3GKjy0b2Ycl0xpg-_8eg8b22ya617adSvRs6NnK_r6iL_zXiV79_I-SyNnDcXqHAWFxXPuVAWOyfyKIr7iO1MlfaEYkf-DuXXeWAQZWWulJ_CPc4cXK4iUUTh14NKJZdF8Stzag8b9otSonIbG90_N0fpv1z9Kdbbyn8BAAD__2kyb60) who went by the name Samantha. She was found dead at the scene, an apparent suicide. No motive has been reported. The shooting occurred around 11 a.m. when Rupnow opened fire with a handgun at the private Christian school, which serves 400 students from kindergarten through 12th grade. Police said a second-grader called 911. Unconfirmed reports on social media said Rupnow had left a "manifesto" but police said they couldn't yet confirm its authenticity.
## SoftBank Plans $100B U.S. Investment
SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son and President-elect Donald Trump announced a [$100 billion investment in U.S. projects](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb_G3ojgATYMDF2ypWtHC_weCS0Gy5BE-fsq3TteXeno6HxdlotPOZXrp9_I9VgX4KCYACbmBX3Kr0WN6CIRkBzJiVkqJbXWarw579cVQa4geNBaaw6RTwa9RTNN6OOY3JsmQMxCSCvkycooeFg1cCHRWD8oTph6PU7fNZV-o5hf9UHHaa3bmN2t970N8mOA8wBnvxd6tvf1HkdPa6YBzliLz8j6cd921mrswZcflsqDWt-odHZvzGBU8zSZaKwKGi2AkRatMWYOIXAaD4f7M-Wc2jQPil83n_KfRP8vysPBbwAAAP__X6xi1A) over the next four years, focusing on artificial intelligence and infrastructure. ## Drone Activity Intensifies
Mysterious drone [activity persisted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu7CAQAL_GdFjsgo1dULzmunttSgub5UyCzQnIIf99dOnTj2ak-bgvdxtiOB__7UGm-rSgQMUBOejF2RCvRTFnPBGSZGRAS6XkMAyK7UZM46gQJolI0yDJb85OlqRCMa_aaxbM2wYIGkDOIPtZehDrNqAA6abZdkqQCzXl_jOFs-7k45VelPstHSyavdZn6eS_Dm8d3lpr_UmtNKKvN9Dh7bhKpXxxl9NJhZf9u3KX2snTHhK3IXOf8kZ8tYU4CgGgR5aNe7YQYyij7pR4HDbE32D9a8DL4E8AAAD__5ohXPA) over the weekend, leading to the temporary closure of Wright-Patterson Air Force Base in Ohio and the arrest of two people linked to drones at Logan International Airport. In New Jersey, the epicenter of activity, [Gov. Phil Murphy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7oiYGQimoHhNurx2SwubISGLTYRRIv5-le23vLrSOdL5us5Xn3Lab__9xq7FMqNEJQAFmDn4lPusxuAiMzKN7MCQUqS1VuPdKURvbYAJtNQBGSN51oZ9DGphpjG5Dw0QDABZoJOlCHJZNUqgMFk_KMkhtVJPj5L2dueYe3lxPa1lG7O7t_Y8Bvo34GXAi3_u_D4-12fUltbMA15CLTsfYutH49rFzm_x4HpwF73Ub7GQicFLZbSeJJFFMNMCkexizusaprG68HynnNNxNoOSt82n_Otvf_V4OfwJAAD__0SuYMw) told reporters that there was little evidence suggesting that the drones posed a threat, but he urged the federal government to address the escalating concerns. Democratic Sen. Chuck Schumer [also expressed his apprehension](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCngY6IXbAdFxR_4y5_e6WFzTqQwxABl8hvf3L660b6pBlpvm7zzYYY0v2_3cm0Lc8oUQtAAcPsbIjHrLkzGxGS4mRgUFqrrus090YuvVvGUdreaeyQyIEelgVGtP1VbpoHc7YBwgCgRlCXUW0gl7VDCcpdR8u0JBdaLpdHDql52uKRX1Qua955NL61Z2XqH8OJ4dQ8-RDjaQwnn3dK9K4Mp0rJNmI4dVID9lLU1f_sVMRuj1y-bRWu5ETCUaO1hZxEo9WLRG9x-ic8qFQ6GE68GPd8hxhD7Qem5X234bPJ21__vAz-BgAA___KuGgn) about drones, urging Homeland Security head Alejandro Mayorkas to deploy special drone-detection tech to help local authorities. "_Something strange is going on,"_ President-elect Donald Trump said Monday._"For some reason, they don’t want to tell the people_."

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left is hoping to break me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me...

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3ef9055d981483285988063f8e61fbb&_e=w-OtHhJYoky39ZK1MIUI5ZHwlQxEOL7XjMaFMX1wouYGd3fOaIxaDcE1bXqUfKEl4813En-jf9b12WNAjBxyjxTnFuQedrLFfZ69kZ4e6gfRHvh56T9Mgdru0Yq4W_WKlIp-jB0Dsr6gsn2dSXhYCj_lCVOairnDExbTC7ogVT973VxFvmvxQklKtGEqz0cmhUx4786sJlNM0GiTIwYCb0O7xwkzULfV0BpFTN9RvLTEjHqyaumIG5_KbM5ZGIN7BSNT_tC_e8nRNShWQ-DwUd8lKLsFP08d3Bip4fqeTUTE6acYHDI2DJcNnkUitLeAMIgxcFuFDhdy2HH6vJkqTDCKJDz6sZlnyjDj8fcyHh9_llH2Kx94e-MnS1tU-y8axAQlM3sBcoufQTkPIx3YW7NvW3pcbFAd4Iznx5-4FLk%3D)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, They did it to Trump, They did it to Rudy Giuliani, and now they are coming for me... All for speaking the truth. It is imperative that we rise up and resist when things feel wrong. And you and I both know that something was _very_ wrong...
---
When Democrats allowed illegals to vote without identification... When an Anti-MAGA election official said he wanted to "make life hell for Kari Lake"... When election officials destroyed evidence and refused to comply with discovery...
---
I've never been afraid to speak the truth. But corrupt sinister Leftist parties are trying to destroy me for it... When I spoke out against their blatant fraud and rigged electioneering... They decided to make an example of me. Yes, I dared to speak the truth about election fraud. I dared to listen to the people and fight to Make America Great Again. And that's when I found out just how far the Left will go to silence and destroy American patriots like you and me. And for that, I'm now facing enormous fines. In the Left's America, the truth will put you behind bars. Each day that the weight of this lawsuit feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down. Just think about what happened to him. Radical Never-Trump prosecutors, working with radical Never-Trump Judges, holding show trials in cities that voted 99% for Biden, tried to take EVERYTHING away from Donald Trump. His businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. And he fights on. I'm certain that if President Trump had suspended his campaign for President, all these lawsuits would have magically disappeared. But he didn't give the Left what they wanted. He's going to fight for America First. Always. He's truly unstoppable, and that inspires me every day. And I'm inspired to fight back against the Left and their schemes. I'm not going to be scared away. I will fight to my last breath. But I need help. [_Today I am asking you to support my First Amendment Fund which will help me fight the Left 's "lawfare" before they can financially destroy me._](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3ef9055d981483285988063f8e61fbb&_e=w-OtHhJYoky39ZK1MIUI5ZHwlQxEOL7XjMaFMX1wouYGd3fOaIxaDcE1bXqUfKEl4813En-jf9b12WNAjBxyjxTnFuQedrLFfZ69kZ4e6gfRHvh56T9Mgdru0Yq4W_WKlIp-jB0Dsr6gsn2dSXhYCj_lCVOairnDExbTC7ogVT973VxFvmvxQklKtGEqz0cmhUx4786sJlNM0GiTIwYCb0O7xwkzULfV0BpFTN9RvLTEjHqyaumIG5_KbM5ZGIN7BSNT_tC_e8nRNShWQ-DwUWAYjS0YY5DfPva70enLUaxbu3In5ygOZr1ePHMMFoVW6sHpzTzbxF02EUdePLzUY2w546pqyspLTydASgagV4c7aZoZ6FKWyuE3CN5dLv0PxNgd3Rj1cV5sjnVskjpYijDgrAciXTX9FrEHi23-l0k%3D) American Media Council created the First Amendment Fund to help me and others threatened by lawfare. My husband and I have been living off our savings. But there is no way we will be able to pay these massive fines. And I've got good reason to worry about that. The Left is hoping to break me - bankruptcy... defamation... whatever it takes. [ _If you 're able, would you consider supporting my "First Amendment Fund" to help me defend myself and defeat the Left's sham lawfare?_ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3ef9055d981483285988063f8e61fbb&_e=w-OtHhJYoky39ZK1MIUI5ZHwlQxEOL7XjMaFMX1wouYGd3fOaIxaDcE1bXqUfKEl4813En-jf9b12WNAjBxyjxTnFuQedrLFfZ69kZ4e6gfRHvh56T9Mgdru0Yq4W_WKlIp-jB0Dsr6gsn2dSXhYCj_lCVOairnDExbTC7ogVT973VxFvmvxQklKtGEqz0cmhUx4786sJlNM0GiTIwYCb0O7xwkzULfV0BpFTN9RvLTEjHqyaumIG5_KbM5ZGIN7BSNT_tC_e8nRNShWQ-DwUbJl60k5JImKcZkCN2finRNPA6YQ_zxwT3rDfNL5EQWDM6ZTwbvf3x-4V76ujuThHQzFjvCM-nsvDB8mrMtvUAclAsGXwaE_3J0G7RnjtMDe2cSOC3yICxCV3joBDEvtawdLNrFpzxxJnTnpw5Je8x8%3D) Your gift of any amount is tax-deductible. And it will help me cover every expense associated with this insane attack on me.
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3ef9055d981483285988063f8e61fbb&_e=w-OtHhJYoky39ZK1MIUI5ZHwlQxEOL7XjMaFMX1wouYGd3fOaIxaDcE1bXqUfKEl4813En-jf9b12WNAjBxyjxTnFuQedrLFfZ69kZ4e6gfRHvh56T9Mgdru0Yq4W_WKlIp-jB0Dsr6gsn2dSXhYCj_lCVOairnDExbTC7ogVT973VxFvmvxQklKtGEqz0cmhUx4786sJlNM0GiTIwYCb0O7xwkzULfV0BpFTN9RvLTEjHqyaumIG5_KbM5ZGIN7BSNT_tC_e8nRNShWQ-DwUSH6Zbsy09XqWIQLQKyXymaZ8MnUreB6O5Bgxs-Z7JR01GhMr0kmVH4yfcDp4pZ1kr1vyLW9rTOg5RwHqKVfJHSoGFuuzjbxPobwXSMlaFaEFxB3ou3fw0xRRckHtVlxUEjMmJT97ZB6OQbyUa6NTGE%3D)
---
Thank you for your support - and for giving me hope that truth will prevail! Yours truly,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Kari Lake

But I'm still taking on this fight because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America. I will never give up. I hope you won't either. **[Please, rush your most generous, tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more. Thank you for your support during this difficult time.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a3ef9055d981483285988063f8e61fbb&_e=w-OtHhJYoky39ZK1MIUI5ZHwlQxEOL7XjMaFMX1wouYGd3fOaIxaDcE1bXqUfKEl4813En-jf9b12WNAjBxyjxTnFuQedrLFfZ69kZ4e6gfRHvh56T9Mgdru0Yq4W_WKlIp-jB0Dsr6gsn2dSXhYCj_lCVOairnDExbTC7ogVT973VxFvmvxQklKtGEqz0cmhUx4786sJlNM0GiTIwYCb0O7xwkzULfV0BpFTN9RvLTEjHqyaumIG5_KbM5ZGIN7BSNT_tC_e8nRNShWQ-DwUQ75-puz2A0rcVbUB2li7IYYETn5JTf_o4I6s1uIWx9iwIP4yX8c577Sxbb2zTMu-COmA27ykxe2lryY09pCYE3ESrwAAZRKXUkPsRSswJREsvLcB6basHKkmWTKqNLVYpJcrGwTE4DRjRfdfO978q0%3D)**

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87cfc5719c404619aee2fbce362d143b&_e=hC4dS0wQBSrFKC0HM8PXs_BopVOoM2Zmy73A53UR9kBPoTBu9k_69DVPBXPoufbHShS9Nzrem46VzNZ1Z5IyCPICLndiRT08rAmVWwLT2Zbz77TEiMiGl7qF-oT6HjgT0YA3BQVClJvcMexMbAPKaFEIvbIabU7mh-A8IVBmK22oZUWL3SagbU79YjPTkjtLdaHDAUocE7NCEIEub7xdZ8hu_7jNOHJuw4pBCx28ErUMlI3VMS_EE3wBvZcrfcwY2-MLCOiZp9ja3t7rg70cr_vZJZAdweJ7JokslmydGlLc2UkEDJa9W-vKK0OcOhKW-yj906G45CnNsWwY7e1CKZawTZl5qB1SdAVPMXbmdjemTBYM2OCtXqCqJELs-ZEtKICR8gqz_-6oPO6D22LYDhQNwSZHatBAvhGWSjfS00ySl3-FPYvheF4zv7NgAnwu) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87cfc5719c404619aee2fbce362d143b&_e=hC4dS0wQBSrFKC0HM8PXs_BopVOoM2Zmy73A53UR9kBPoTBu9k_69DVPBXPoufbHShS9Nzrem46VzNZ1Z5IyCPICLndiRT08rAmVWwLT2Zbz77TEiMiGl7qF-oT6HjgT0YA3BQVClJvcMexMbAPKaFEIvbIabU7mh-A8IVBmK22oZUWL3SagbU79YjPTkjtLdaHDAUocE7NCEIEub7xdZ8hu_7jNOHJuw4pBCx28ErUMlI3VMS_EE3wBvZcrfcwY2-MLCOiZp9ja3t7rg70cr_vZJZAdweJ7JokslmydGlL78x_uuvdQHk0ZNKSUL6EL0dFq0aWQYG_TP4zbqBPaPurqtmsHfcmmtFTaiLyz9eHiMsLgQNGzdBF64A1ol5xdsCwl-eogWb4A24UpTOoHC0BDiySw1sZ7exrBtqThqazUqZIeLoS39hUT4KRG9lJs)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. name: History Facts
subject: Is the "Iliad" fact or fiction?
body:
Homer’s Iliad is perhaps the most famous work of mythology in history, not to mention one of Western literature’s foundational texts. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cnbtvzqlt2xggg5j8r6xrzmpq2uic18nof18ma8sxq9i8mffn3j11ptm8thpbkh18oycpdt1kbe3hbj0b8ag0qvfkv9b5bst80874p0srmgt6w0078wsajh7db4r9w10ovgqrn9s53odjbn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The “Iliad” was thought to be pure fiction until Troy was discovered.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| H omer’s _Iliad_ is perhaps the most famous work of mythology in history, not to mention one of Western literature’s foundational texts. And though [the Trojan War](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=3ogxad55cjdrc3ry1g8k6zfsq6x2lrse3988jkreir49nnc7akflmpuveb50gy6msxkaf8oy6f4icdh2rv2zle5q2lmdagqycn74hnxi75v8d60g67ar0bdel41zcguo59iyttur99tzeusx9jwkaeia5cch4rpag4ouh5mwch5xl3ennzj64ae7tb9b4rbab84xh9950dzafvfkg7gfogbeumja1o3hw0k41ltng6npqo5yqo59l8u7t43ntftf2n96l8icpbwc0l12&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and its legendary combatants are fictional, [the city of Troy is not](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — not that everyone always knew it. First settled in the Bronze Age, Troy was destroyed and rebuilt several times during its 4,000 years of existence, and was eventually forgotten and lost to history. Because of this, the _Iliad_ was thought to be [pure fiction](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for centuries until the city of Troy was rediscovered in the 1870s. It was uncovered by Heinrich Schliemann, a businessman and amateur archaeologist from Germany, who also excavated the ruins of Mycenae and Tiryns.
---
What was once called Troy is now Hisarlık, an archaeological mound in present-day Turkey. Schliemann’s discovery also reignited the [debate](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) around whether the Trojan War itself actually took place. The ancient Greeks themselves certainly thought so, but there simply isn’t enough evidence to state that a conflict of the sort portrayed in the _Iliad_ actually lasted 10 years and was waged by such larger-than-life figures as Achilles, Odysseus, and Agamemnon. There were certainly wars (or at least battles) fought in Troy, but not of the stature depicted in the epic poem.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Very little is known about Homer, including whether he was a real person.
If you were to ask 10 historians when and where Homer was born, you might get 10 different answers. [Very little](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son0a7&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) is known about the famed poet, including what century he lived in, if he was actually blind, and whether he was a real person or rather a composite of several people. The consensus is that Homer — if he indeed existed — was born between the 12th and eighth centuries BCE, possibly on the coast of Asia Minor, and that he died on the Greek island of Ios. Because the _Odyssey_ , the _Iliad_ , and other epic poems were spoken aloud, not written down, some believe they were composed by a group of people to whom the single name Homer was later given, or that Homer was simply the one to compile their efforts. Even the idea that he couldn’t see is based solely on the fact that Demodocus, a poet in the _Odyssey_ , is blind, and that Homer based the character on himself.

clean_body: Homer’s Iliad is perhaps the most famous work of mythology in history, not to mention one of Western literature’s foundational texts. | H omer’s Iliad is perhaps the most famous work of mythology in history, not to mention one of Western literature’s foundational texts. And though and its legendary combatants are fictional, — not that everyone always knew it. First settled in the Bronze Age, Troy was destroyed and rebuilt several times during its 4,000 years of existence, and was eventually forgotten and lost to history. Because of this, the Iliad was thought to be for centuries until the city of Troy was rediscovered in the 1870s. It was uncovered by Heinrich Schliemann, a businessman and amateur archaeologist from Germany, who also excavated the ruins of Mycenae and Tiryns. What was once called Troy is now Hisarlık, an archaeological mound in present-day Turkey. Schliemann’s discovery also reignited the around whether the Trojan War itself actually took place. The ancient Greeks themselves certainly thought so, but there simply isn’t enough evidence to state that a conflict of the sort portrayed in the Iliad actually lasted 10 years and was waged by such larger-than-life figures as Achilles, Odysseus, and Agamemnon. There were certainly wars (or at least battles) fought in Troy, but not of the stature depicted in the epic poem. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Lines in The Iliad 15,693 | | Days over which The Iliad takes place 52 | Days over which The Iliad takes place 52 | | Box-office gross of 2004’s Troy $497 million | | Different settlements of Troy throughout its history 9+ | Different settlements of Troy throughout its history 9+ | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Very little is known about Homer, including whether he was a real person. If you were to ask 10 historians when and where Homer was born, you might get 10 different answers. is known about the famed poet, including what century he lived in, if he was actually blind, and whether he was a real person or rather a composite of several people. The consensus is that Homer — if he indeed existed — was born between the 12th and eighth centuries BCE, possibly on the coast of Asia Minor, and that he died on the Greek island of Ios. Because the Odyssey , the Iliad , and other epic poems were spoken aloud, not written down, some believe they were composed by a group of people to whom the single name Homer was later given, or that Homer was simply the one to compile their efforts. Even the idea that he couldn’t see is based solely on the fact that Demodocus, a poet in the Odyssey , is blind, and that Homer based the character on himself.
