name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/17/2024
body:
Boebert calls upon Senate to get her ZIP code bill to President’s desk
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Congresswoman Lauren Boebert pushes for the Senate to pass her [bipartisan ZIP Code bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), aiming to bring tax revenue relief and improved emergency response to Colorado communities. Meanwhile, Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd pledges to [champion energy dominance](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Western Colorado, promoting oil, gas, and nuclear energy development despite state-level regulatory hurdles. In Douglas County, Commissioner-elect Kevin Van Winkle [joins the Board early](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), promising a focus on affordability, public safety, and economic stability.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Congress struggles to avert a [looming government shutdown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as funding negotiations remain stalled, highlighting divisions over economic assistance and spending priorities. Meanwhile, a [tragic school shooting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Madison, Wisconsin, leaves four dead and five injured.****

**🗣️ Don't miss today's RMV original commentary...** Mark Hillman reflects on Colorado’s [dramatic political shift](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), outlining how progressive policies and demographic trends have turned the state solidly blue.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 17, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Boebert calls upon Senate to get her ZIP code bill to President’s desk](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
“While this may seem like a niche issue to some, it is extremely important to these cities and towns that asked for this bill to be put forward on their behalf,” Congresswoman Lauren Boebert told her colleagues on the House floor as she urged them to pass her bipartisan ZIP Code bill, H.R. 8753.
Boebert shared, “It is estimated that the city of Lone Tree, in my new district in Colorado, is losing about $5 million in sales tax revenue each year because of this ZIP Code issue.”
The bill promises far-reaching impacts, from strengthening local identities to improving emergency response times.
Boebert discussed its significance and the hurdles it faced before urging her colleagues to support it. “This is a very frustrating thing that we have to be in Congress debating and issuing legislation on,” she admitted. “I’m so proud to be here and have a part in that, but this is something that should have been done.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd will be a vote for energy dominance in Western Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd pledges to champion energy production in Western Colorado, including coal, oil, gas, uranium, and nuclear energy, aligning with Trump’s agenda for energy independence.
* Hurd criticized Democrat policies and overregulation for stifling Colorado's energy economy, promising to work with allies to roll back harmful regulations and boost energy development.
* Hurd emphasized the importance of lower energy costs for families, small businesses, and national security, supporting LNG exports and advanced nuclear energy solutions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Madison, Wisc., school shooting leaves 2 dead, 6 injured; juvenile suspect dead](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A juvenile shooter killed two people and injured six others at Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, before being found dead at the scene.
* The victims included a teacher and a teenage student, while two critically injured students remain hospitalized; police confirmed the shooter acted alone and used a handgun.
* President Biden and local leaders condemned the violence, calling for action to address gun violence and emphasizing the need for safer schools.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Lawmakers struggle to reach deal to avert government shutdown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE HILL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Congress struggles to finalize a funding package to avert a government shutdown, with disagreements over farm aid and economic assistance causing delays.
* Republicans push for $12 billion in economic relief and $16 billion in weather-related assistance for farmers, while Democrats counter with their own proposals.
* Lawmakers face a tight deadline, as failure to reach a deal could result in a government shutdown, impacting federal agencies and services.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Kevin Van Winkle to make early arrival as Douglas County commissioner](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Following the sudden resignation of Commissioner Lora Thomas, Kevin Van Winkle, a state senator, was appointed early to fill the vacant seat in Douglas County.
* Van Winkle emphasized priorities such as public safety, school security, and affordability, vowing to make Douglas County a model of prosperity and low taxation.
* The annual State of the County report highlighted recent successes and a vision for the future, with leaders addressing concerns like growth, homelessness, transportation, and emergency preparedness.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Hillman: This ain’t your father’s Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MARK HILLMAN, [MARKHILLMAN.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_If you’re 40 or older, today’s Colorado is very different politically than the state where you grew up – assuming you grew up here._
_Except for Lyndon Johnson’s landslide win over Barry Goldwater in 1964, no Democrat won more than 45% in Colorado between 1952 and 2000._
_When Bill Clinton won Colorado in 1992 (with 40% in a three-way race), we became a “swing state” in presidential races through 2008. Three of those elections were decided by less than 5%._
_Republicans’ most decisive win in that era was George W. Bush by 8.4% in 2000. Ranked by margin of victory, Colorado was then 19th most-Republican state, darker red than Ohio, Missouri, Tennessee, Florida or Iowa._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Douglas County School District narrowly approves charter school release amid heated debate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF | LOCAL | DECEMBER 15** _In a pivotal 4-3 vote on Tuesday night, the Douglas County School District board approved the release of the John Adams Academy charter school to apply for authorization through the Colorado Charter School Institute (CSI)._
**[Gaines: Recalling drones of our own in Eastern Colorado and a ‘nothing to see here’ response](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY CORY GAINES****| COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 13** _Maintaining a healthy skepticism can be a challenge.__So many things these days are there to monetize your attention, and all too often the people generating the eye-catching content on social media (and sometimes in regular media) are none too picky about grabbing you without exaggerating or, sadly, making things up._
__
[**Hindawi: If American media will chill, Syria can be made great again**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY SALAM HINDAWI****| COMMENTARY |****DECEMBER 13** _Every time I scan American news outlets, especially the right-wing ones featuring the latest news on Syria, I get split between laughing or crying because of their outrageous panic about the future of Syria’s minorities._

The strategy, which involved releasing painted foxes or fox-shaped balloons to exploit superstitions, was tested but ultimately deemed impractical and abandoned.

clean_body: Boebert calls upon Senate to get her ZIP code bill to President’s desk | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi friends, Here's a summary of today's newsletter: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Congresswoman Lauren Boebert pushes for the Senate to pass her , aiming to bring tax revenue relief and improved emergency response to Colorado communities. Meanwhile, Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd pledges to in Western Colorado, promoting oil, gas, and nuclear energy development despite state-level regulatory hurdles. In Douglas County, Commissioner-elect Kevin Van Winkle , promising a focus on affordability, public safety, and economic stability. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... Congress struggles to avert a as funding negotiations remain stalled, highlighting divisions over economic assistance and spending priorities. Meanwhile, a in Madison, Wisconsin, leaves four dead and five injured.** 🗣️ Don't miss today's RMV original commentary... Mark Hillman reflects on Colorado’s , outlining how progressive policies and demographic trends have turned the state solidly blue. This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, December 17, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, “While this may seem like a niche issue to some, it is extremely important to these cities and towns that asked for this bill to be put forward on their behalf,” Congresswoman Lauren Boebert told her colleagues on the House floor as she urged them to pass her bipartisan ZIP Code bill, H.R. 8753. Boebert shared, “It is estimated that the city of Lone Tree, in my new district in Colorado, is losing about $5 million in sales tax revenue each year because of this ZIP Code issue.” The bill promises far-reaching impacts, from strengthening local identities to improving emergency response times. Boebert discussed its significance and the hurdles it faced before urging her colleagues to support it. “This is a very frustrating thing that we have to be in Congress debating and issuing legislation on,” she admitted. “I’m so proud to be here and have a part in that, but this is something that should have been done.” | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd pledges to champion energy production in Western Colorado, including coal, oil, gas, uranium, and nuclear energy, aligning with Trump’s agenda for energy independence. Hurd criticized Democrat policies and overregulation for stifling Colorado's energy economy, promising to work with allies to roll back harmful regulations and boost energy development. Hurd emphasized the importance of lower energy costs for families, small businesses, and national security, supporting LNG exports and advanced nuclear energy solutions. | A juvenile shooter killed two people and injured six others at Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, before being found dead at the scene. The victims included a teacher and a teenage student, while two critically injured students remain hospitalized; police confirmed the shooter acted alone and used a handgun. President Biden and local leaders condemned the violence, calling for action to address gun violence and emphasizing the need for safer schools. | Congress struggles to finalize a funding package to avert a government shutdown, with disagreements over farm aid and economic assistance causing delays. Republicans push for $12 billion in economic relief and $16 billion in weather-related assistance for farmers, while Democrats counter with their own proposals. Lawmakers face a tight deadline, as failure to reach a deal could result in a government shutdown, impacting federal agencies and services. | Following the sudden resignation of Commissioner Lora Thomas, Kevin Van Winkle, a state senator, was appointed early to fill the vacant seat in Douglas County. Van Winkle emphasized priorities such as public safety, school security, and affordability, vowing to make Douglas County a model of prosperity and low taxation. The annual State of the County report highlighted recent successes and a vision for the future, with leaders addressing concerns like growth, homelessness, transportation, and emergency preparedness. | BY MARK HILLMAN, If you’re 40 or older, today’s Colorado is very different politically than the state where you grew up – assuming you grew up here. Except for Lyndon Johnson’s landslide win over Barry Goldwater in 1964, no Democrat won more than 45% in Colorado between 1952 and 2000. When Bill Clinton won Colorado in 1992 (with 40% in a three-way race), we became a “swing state” in presidential races through 2008. Three of those elections were decided by less than 5%. Republicans’ most decisive win in that era was George W. Bush by 8.4% in 2000. Ranked by margin of victory, Colorado was then 19th most-Republican state, darker red than Ohio, Missouri, Tennessee, Florida or Iowa. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ RMV STAFF | LOCAL | DECEMBER 15 In a pivotal 4-3 vote on Tuesday night, the Douglas County School District board approved the release of the John Adams Academy charter school to apply for authorization through the Colorado Charter School Institute (CSI). body:

The Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of
America-loving young people about AMERICAFEST 2024
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWzKA_FWNy

Friend,

The
Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of America-loving
young people about AMERICAFEST 2024 - and I don't want to turn
away ANY student!

With
MILLIONS MORE young people turning away from Leftism and deciding
to LOVE AMERICA again, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is on
track to be our BIGGEST EVENT EVER.

Friend,
can I count on YOUR support to help bring EVEN MORE young people
to AMERICAFEST this year? Your gift today of $50 will help
sponsor ONE MORE student to attend ... your gift of $100 will
help sponsor TWO MORE students to attend ... and so on.

But any
amount is a true blessing ... and it will help me bring another
patriotic young person to this year's AMERICAFEST.

Support
the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund

Turning
Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of
America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's
event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American
Culture War.

Over four
action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will:

Hear
from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement,
including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and
MANY MORE,

Get
critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these hard-working
kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their
generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and

Build
a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS - with 15,000+
attendees from ALL 50 states! - so that our pro-America Movement
is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025!

Your gift
today to Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could
be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default:
your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this
one-of-a-kind event.

Friend,
would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE MORE student
... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students ... and so
on? Truly, any amount you're able to chip in will make a
difference for young patriots across the country.

Support
the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund

Earlier
this year, I told Turning Point USA supporters that - when we
worked together - we could inspire GEN Z to become the MOST
CONSERVATIVE and MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation EVER.

Now we
have seen the BIGGEST CONSERVATIVE SHIFT among young people in
generations!

While we
must celebrate this MASSIVE VICTORY, we must also continue to
press our advantage and keep up the pressure on the "Woke" Left
... so we can make this PERMANENT GENERATIONAL CHANGE.

I truly
believe that bringing THOUSANDS MORE kids to this year's
AMERICAFEST can be a GAME-CHANGER for our pro-America Movement -
which is why I hope you'll make your most generous gift today to
support Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund.

Thank
YOU, Friend, for standing with Turning Point USA to build the
NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots!

For
America,

Charlie
Kirk
Founder &
CEO
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Team TFVC
subject: TFVC Tuesday: Bombshell Congressional COVID Report
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQwOTcwOTk4MTIxODkxMDg2LFwiclwiOjE0MDk3MTAzMDQxNjk4MzExNH0iLCJzIjoiZDMxOTk4ODQ4YjY5MzhjYiJ9)
| |
---
|
---
|
---
After multiple hearings and several months, The Congressional Committee on Oversight and Accountability has released its **summary of findings related to the governmental response to the COVID pandemic**. The 500+ page report entitled [“After Action Review of the COVID-19 Pandemic: The Lessons Learned and a Path Forward”](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQwOTcwOTk4MTI2MDg1Mzk0LFwiclwiOjE0MDk3MTAzMDQxNjk4MzExNH0iLCJzIjoiM2U4NjNkNzRiNjNjYzFmNyJ9) details the lies and harms perpetrated on the American people by public health agencies and others. Included in this review are summations about the **negative economic impact of lockdowns** , particularly for small businesses; the long-term effects on youth mental and physical health from school lockdowns and vaccine policies; and how vaccine safety concerns were ignored or suppressed. **While TFVC has long-suspected that our government knowingly implemented policies it knew were both unwarranted and detrimental, the report is nonetheless shocking.** The review also underscores the need for vigilance in the medical liberty movement. Our work truly never ends because we can never predict when we will be hit again with an onslaught of premeditated misdirection and misinformation intended to rob you of your fundamental rights. With the Texas Legislature set to convene in less than a month, we remind you that **the majority of this battle is won (or lost) with our electeds in Austin**. Watch for TFVC Action Alerts and opportunities to engage effectively during Session. **Your voice matters and is vital to protect our state from medical tyranny**.

|
---

With that in mind, here is this month's question:

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_e=APH7PUBZ9L3tIlrcbibh6dZNiOYQSYUZJnWAjjAWesQCKts2j29aHwPuefLFs5_-EE65Lcs52fxhKVk7Lm-PHRnLeFqht1BRrBiTczgG0abPP7LM0z5Y2KyzBsOyyQmGaKypXJsTMQ8pi2Xssjq70kIhkquMZarLMe-LzctVyrgP9oIrIA1xnR8NP6ivyowJ6NnF-bpwY4iEFAmuYmFbydIRbQauC1KYeJ2P-HehmdSfdCv2bpH7O4qY_D5rddTKuZgBWrACCEq9CrmgBTVfjp9VPeotKEzQE7Tx1PdAkKvtj7wFhFy7Yq0WgIMKWEpBwzxs53QLKIEkM-435-PCDssf29Py3SRmC52Qq7X17CrKTczuINs58QtE3ul9G1oY)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_e=APH7PUBZ9L3tIlrcbibh6dZNiOYQSYUZJnWAjjAWesQCKts2j29aHwPuefLFs5_-EE65Lcs52fxhKVk7Lm-PHRnLeFqht1BRrBiTczgG0abPP7LM0z5Y2KyzBsOyyQmGaKypXJsTMQ8pi2Xssjq70kIhkquMZarLMe-LzctVyrgP9oIrIA1xnR8NP6ivyowJ6NnF-bpwY4iEFAmuYmFbydIRbQauC1KYeJ2P-HehmdQDFghYm7GxbzAgsS6XE3zBuCUPTOd0SYsK7p8gECnks8-nYKlXwM1erOA13-avhPO4J4EdkMW1K0zmPmOOBgvYq7pMZ5LIMZ84ukAOjsaLAWiR0O3diPYPaDm_9kvaQkm6ziZAzLZT9V9E6U4UVpUE)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_e=APH7PUBZ9L3tIlrcbibh6dZNiOYQSYUZJnWAjjAWesQCKts2j29aHwPuefLFs5_-EE65Lcs52fxhKVk7Lm-PHRnLeFqht1BRrBiTczgG0abPP7LM0z5Y2KyzBsOyyQmGaKypXJsTMQ8pi2Xssjq70kIhkquMZarLMe-LzctVyrgP9oIrIA1xnR8NP6ivyowJ6NnF-bpwY4iEFAmuYmFbydIRbQauC1KYeJ2P-HehmdR92xnP_KSvC9DJiCaIcb73BsMOyDyndI_vuOyMPYtS1lp6yQIkn-5OSyQYUfrcC_myvEMeMG1RLbEiB_YKxVdQ4c8IqV5oIpj2ZDiTW4RRFkqscnTDo-hN5anLL7xUP4PiYYCUYxgReRjHaWy7-gif)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_e=APH7PUBZ9L3tIlrcbibh6dZNiOYQSYUZJnWAjjAWesQCKts2j29aHwPuefLFs5_-EE65Lcs52fxhKVk7Lm-PHRnLeFqht1BRrBiTczgG0abPP7LM0z5Y2KyzBsOyyQmGaKypXJsTMQ8pi2Xssjq70kIhkquMZarLMe-LzctVyrgP9oIrIA1xnR8NP6ivyowJ6NnF-bpwY4iEFAmuYmFbydIRbQauC1KYeJ2P-HehmdSsM4kEc8Z1Ok7RQ-vw5gki_TByYEwwtn5bnoo4faQ232AveQ77DDtk0fnGIe1ZdvbEvbosOKM_kzuChEBGhyyBGVl9d_djPNZSLWPkHf1cZSxmAQSUofAT_vRpF05pL5rjGQ-BXHHV6CLbZMNf1PMH)
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_t=x3c9bAud-6wM8pxqGOwT3o79B__snh5UdKudBu2w0SbDO8BtmJHlLjxM0UNV-fX9UseHKrYoVzBEiZQVZDoCvjsnK4p-FgIvhjfQdUONW68_tqR9OBjfT8Nfpn0Jda1P3_jAfq8Z7MHWSdGbizvSCS7SvNT3g2lwMe0R9d2RNPo%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_e=f9o2oYrCCML59fpNYSPaA8eEDmYeeJw_4-ewhYAaXfyKU8y812B4qDjSmpbmTUkwkSB1oBujJV0dI-XUSanIwTgUZwLMbnL7m8UsjfJCapTewDdBBLpz7CUZoAlJnMSjLhCl0FiMIWsfK79IE6bLvk8j4fCNJ5wx3sAptRPvsSDHXh69j5SSvfsk0-hhZ9XmuigbeAchOyJ0-DJCZDMX5FAV54Myj8eK7SLZwyaWhi51oE8pPF3dTRA3pQegqSzAcmd8NJeGIq5nvtmhF6BjknU53frczYJSH_2MJb5DaG4%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=064398da998d4489946e067e6ac9f0ec&_e=APH7PUBZ9L3tIlrcbibh6VBq6QPsxLB5q5jXDAUdlF1HsxX43Athlt4hlfyVAdy2LWdz4-15dvy7_w6SIJig2CxHAT96XH5OUHaMYuIGp8XjlgdX8k3dtPytyjk5v5vjzdVw_TYCEeXO0_T3l36oayMFFU8rG2wd2IpM2XwpRtZTjpf7VIQyoDC9soLtnJCYyY5Mvy5wxBYRxDfb_3zTf55fpywDJyR0zSzjU31fnhA%3D)_

body:

### **URGENT UPDATE FROM ELECT REPUBLICANS HQ**
As we approach the end of the year, I'm writing to you with a sense of urgency and alarm. The radical left is pulling out all the stops to sabotage President Trump's agenda and undermine our values. But I know I can count on you, **Fellow Conservative** , to stand with us and help Elect Republicans. Just recently, NFL legend Joe Theismann showed us what it means to truly support our heroes. He gave two free cars to U.S. military veterans ahead of the Army-Navy game, reminding us of the greatness of America and the importance of honoring those who serve. But let's be clear: the left doesn't share our values. They're more interested in tearing down our heroes and undermining our institutions. That's why we need your help to push back against their radical agenda. **[CONTRIBUTE $15 OR MORE immediately to stand with Republicans and save America from the Radical Left.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z853k931t0bnh6l2ajo3mnfmtes6fv4ee4ibm6to_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm0oj2c3h2bs)** | | [$15](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmra3hqf5ee7j32b9lajeui0ntrjvflmftbr9c1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm0oj2c3h2bs) | [$25](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm3atb3oo05frdhonr054i2g6duq87shhp7g86t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm0oj2c3h2bs) | [$50](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zok8v6captb2ph7dmsktnk3v9o11fvk5mv7id6r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm0oj2c3h2bs)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/dont-touch-me-scott-jennings-snaps?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

CNN republican Scott Jennings **[snapped at guest panelist Bakari Sellers](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd3c887-3f35-442f-a4fc-85bb45c06b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense exchange about Trump lowering grocery prices.
During the debate, Sellers turned to Jennings and put his hand on his shoulder in a very condescending way while giving a monologue.
"Don't touch me!" Jennings assertively told Sellers. **[Watch the exchange below:](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd3c887-3f35-442f-a4fc-85bb45c06b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd3c887-3f35-442f-a4fc-85bb45c06b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Before grabbing Jennings, Sellers was in the middle of calling Donald Trump a liar for telling the American people that he would bring down grocery prices during his campaign.
"Today he said those prices, particularly grocery prices, are not going to come down,... If your children tell you one thing on one day and then they come back and tell you that's not what is going to happen, that is considered a lie," he said.
"Scott was actually 50% correct, in that Democrats did not do a good job telling our story, we did not do a good job of addressing the pain that Americans felt,... one of the mistakes we made was saying that inflation was 'transitory.' Those things were not accurate," Sellers continued.
"One of the things Scott was NOT accurate about..." Sellers said **[just before slapping Jennings' shoulder and grabbing it](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd3c887-3f35-442f-a4fc-85bb45c06b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in a big-brother belittling way.
After being told off, a CNN host chimed in "You have to keep your hands to yourself."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cfd3c887-3f35-442f-a4fc-85bb45c06b2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented by American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/3773b662-8ce1-4c2a-817c-3e636801f921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here ...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3773b662-8ce1-4c2a-817c-3e636801f921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how **the Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
* More than 2 million lost jobs
* Stocks plummeting over 20%
* IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

**We can 't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/3773b662-8ce1-4c2a-817c-3e636801f921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/3773b662-8ce1-4c2a-817c-3e636801f921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Request Your Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/3773b662-8ce1-4c2a-817c-3e636801f921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Conservative influencer WRECKS pro-trans feminist for crossing the line...**
Turning Point USA influencer Isabel Brown **[challenged a pro-trans feminist](https://substack.com/redirect/90633de5-d810-44bd-836d-b85fc352f131?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who says biological men should be allowed in women-only spaces to be "inclusive" to all.
"That's NOT feminism!" Brown fired back. "It is undeniable that in the west today that women are suffering at the hands of accommodating for men who call themselves women. And I just can't in good conscience call that actual feminism."
**[Watch the clash below:](https://substack.com/redirect/90633de5-d810-44bd-836d-b85fc352f131?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/90633de5-d810-44bd-836d-b85fc352f131?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[No, he can't reverse Biden's damage](https://substack..muwyeUBf4XUpJVPt-Ojx46Jx5IA_J05Mr1bhoxpS6bg?)

# **Woman plays innocent after high-speed chase but her SHOCKING EXCUSE UNRAVELS! This doesn't end well...**
Police body cam footage shows **[the arrest of a woman](https://substack.com/redirect/42bf9778-7201-4634-bb2e-8cb52ec6495f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Panama City Beach, Florida.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/42bf9778-7201-4634-bb2e-8cb52ec6495f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The female suspect was**[driving what was reported as a stolen vehicle](https://substack.com/redirect/42bf9778-7201-4634-bb2e-8cb52ec6495f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and when officers attempted to pull the vehicle over, a high-speed chase ensued.
Once the female suspect was apprehended, she insisted that there was a male passenger in the car with her who she dropped off "just a few blocks away" and it was this male passenger who insisted she speed away from the cops.
However, during the subsequent investigation, police found no signs of a male passenger and eyewitnesses saw only the female suspect in the car. When police searched the vehicle, they uncovered a firearm in the suspect's bag, along with other illegal items in the vehicle such as narcotics and drug paraphernalia.
When the female's name was searched in the nationwide database, it was discovered **[she was a felon with an active warrant.](https://substack.com/redirect/42bf9778-7201-4634-bb2e-8cb52ec6495f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
The suspect was charged with Reckless Driving, Fleeing/Eluding, No Valid Driver's License, Possession of Firearm during Felony, Possession of a Firearm by a Felon, and Drug Possession.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/42bf9778-7201-4634-bb2e-8cb52ec6495f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

‘Disastrous Burdens’: Joe Biden’s Rosy Spin On His Economic Legacy
Defies Reality
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhm006sj39fk815tkjj2nb1il23nsick234r87co_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm0oj2c3h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9gmf932cui66pt16ir78djhe9rratjlk8qn4s9l6er7b8lnmkqq4d5h6kprctd2eur79td6e1qb7dd7meqq1d5memijcdtjmuqr9dhlk6qjed1m6jqq2d9j6iqjctd2ekq33d5hejrq49fg

Despite President Joe Biden recently lauding his economic record, many

* * *
**The Looming Retirement Crisis** **Will Your Retirement Savings Survive the Next 10 Years?** For decades, we’ve been told to trust 401(k)s, pensions, and mutual funds to ensure a comfortable retirement. But today, this trust is being shattered. Cracks are forming in the very systems retirees have relied on for decades**.**
* **Inflation is quietly eating away at the value of every dollar you’ve saved.**
* **Market volatility can wipe out years of gains in mere weeks.**
* **Rising life expectancy is forcing many to stretch their savings far beyond what they anticipated.**

These aren’t hypothetical scenarios—they’re happening now in front of our very own eyes hiding in plain sight. Experts warn that millions of Americans are on track to outlive their retirement savings.**[What would that mean for your future? ](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h)** You don’t have to imagine it—it’s already happening. Retirees are being forced to return to work, cut back on essentials, or depend on family for financial support. This is not the retirement they envisioned, and it doesn’t have to be yours.

**You’ve probably read a thousand articles like this before, yet you’ve hesitated to act. Why?** Is it your inner voice that whispers, “Maybe the system will fix itself”? Or perhaps you’re relying on advice from a financial advisor who lives paycheck to paycheck, just like you. **The secret to wealth isn’t just about making money—[it’s about keeping it.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h)**

The truth is, if you’re hoping things will magically change on their own, you’re wrong. Look at what America was built on:**decision-making, hard work, and the dream of owning your financial freedom.** So why aren’t you making the decision to invest in gold?
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h) Let’s be honest—**gold and silver have been relied upon for thousands of years.** Maybe that’s not an accident. **God created gold and silver for a reason: He knew we would need something to depend on when everything else fails.** When nations crumble, when currencies lose their value, when markets collapse—[**gold and silver endure.**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h) **How many times have you ignored this message? A thousand? More?** Think of this as your sign. Stop waiting, stop doubting, and take action to protect yourself and your loved ones.**Just as the government takes care of itself first, it’s your responsibility to do the same for your financial well-being.**

Governments, banks, and the wealthiest individuals in the world still rely on gold to balance and stabilize their financial positions. **Why are you ignoring the same solution they trust?.**

Look around you. Do you see signs that things are getting better—or worse? **The world is spiraling into uncertainty, and you’re running out of time to protect yourself.** Stop fighting your instincts. Stop convincing yourself that everything will magically improve. **Act for yourself, for your loved ones, and for the financial freedom you’ve always wanted but never achieved.** For thousands of years, [**gold and silver**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h) have safeguarded wealth through economic crises, currency collapses, and global uncertainty. They aren’t tied to market trends or political decisions—they are intrinsic, reliable, and proven.
* **A Hedge Against Inflation:** Gold holds its value even as paper currencies lose purchasing power.
* **Proven Stability:** When markets crash, gold and silver endure as safe havens.
* **Intrinsic Value:** Unlike paper assets, gold and silver have value that doesn’t depend on market performance.

This isn’t about abandoning traditional investments—it’s about protecting what you’ve worked so hard to build. Picture yourself 10 years from now. Will you feel relieved that you made the **[right choices to secure your wealth](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h)** —or regret leaving it exposed to the same vulnerabilities millions are facing today? **The time to act is now.** You don’t need to overhaul your entire portfolio. Adding a layer of protection today could make all the difference tomorrow. That’s why we’ve created _[**The Gold & Silver Playbook: Building Wealth with Tangible Assets. **](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=son4qj&__onlt=h)_

**Inside, you’ll discover:**
* **Why the traditional retirement system is failing to meet today’s challenges.**
* **How tangible assets like gold and silver can provide stability in an uncertain economy.**
* **Actionable steps to diversify your portfolio with confidence**.

name: Susanna Gibson
subject: Fwd: You may have heard of me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98823449/517939111/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241216bump_N_SG_90DO_8_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNGExNjQ3LTdmYmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RrnbJYS2Bt0qXbUmHN1F6tYmSGLxa595LQIlkteTsXc=)
---
I wanted to make sure you saw this message from me, Susanna Gibson. I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district in Virginia until I became the target of a reprehensible and sexist attack that derailed my campaign.

The official Republican party of my state sent _explicit photos_ of me to everyone in my district. My neighbors.

My children had to be accompanied by security at school. I received hundreds of death threats and rape threats. I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.

**Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me.** They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, and they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign.

**At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words.**

**I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state.**

Her Bold Move is proud to do this work to ensure that women who are brave enough to run for office – like me – have the support they need and deserve. With your help, they can continue providing this critical support for candidates running in future elections.

[**Will you help support HBM’s efforts to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates in 2025 and beyond by rushing $25 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98823450/517939113/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241216bump_N_SG_90DO_8_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNGExNjQ3LTdmYmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RrnbJYS2Bt0qXbUmHN1F6tYmSGLxa595LQIlkteTsXc=)

Thank you,

Susanna Gibson

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

Ahead of the holidays, I wanted to introduce myself. In a previous election cycle, Her Bold Move endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. The polls showed I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district – **until my campaign was the target of a uniquely sexist attack.**

In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person.

In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the _official state Republican party_ – sent out explicit photos of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes.

**Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks:**

❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death.

❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks.

❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.

❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house.

❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season.

Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. **But here’s the thing:_we need women to run for office._ Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t.**

I’m writing this email today to spread an important message to any woman considering a run for office: Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer.

**Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me.** They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a _sexist attack_ reserved for _women candidates_. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words.

I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state.

[**That’s why I am reaching out today. I am so grateful for the work that Her Bold Move is doing to defend and empower women like me. Will you join me in supporting this important organization by pitching in $25 or more today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241216bump_N_SG_90DO_8_NG_N_L2&amount=25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98823451/517939126/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241216bump_N_SG_90DO_8_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNGExNjQ3LTdmYmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RrnbJYS2Bt0qXbUmHN1F6tYmSGLxa595LQIlkteTsXc=)

They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, and they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words. I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state. Her Bold Move is proud to do this work to ensure that women who are brave enough to run for office – like me – have the support they need and deserve. With your help, they can continue providing this critical support for candidates running in future elections. = Thank you, Susanna Gibson \---------- Forwarded message --------- Hi Peter, Ahead of the holidays, I wanted to introduce myself. In a previous election cycle, Her Bold Move endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. The polls showed I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district – until my campaign was the target of a uniquely sexist attack. In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person. In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the official state Republican party – sent out explicit photos of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes. Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks: ❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death. ❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks. ❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner. ❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house. ❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season. Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. But here’s the thing:we need women to run for office. Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t. I’m writing this email today to spread an important message to any woman considering a run for office: Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer. Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me. They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words. I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Running for office as a woman can be dangerous and scary. The political landscape is a safer and more supportive place for women with Her Bold Move at the forefront. Thank you, Susanna Gibson | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures. Support this work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. Her Bold Move One Park Row 5th Floor Providence, RI 02903 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe this email was sent in error, please contact us at info@herboldmove.org. We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can . To learn more about Her Bold Move Action, please visit us at herboldmove.org.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d633313ef16467fa35b8a8fd0cb74b0&_e=ZegX7s0XKFW0k46okqzC9fH0kXYhOJpzgr_U0jbX_9CG3RMPMrHA852FTlVsaWEEs_tixLFCGoMBIIuOM2PatgL6PIImA2hPl263-j2DQtV3gW0LqsixNDJj_w9Cbl_AjYarKe0ofe0y9w1f-6_hMC9SF9fuQJw_nz2Mlfm631fEuOqJ3vfYfJ6uuuIX1gV6Gc6yWKn-ungFRbiyX65FD0TNlRZhMsgbWzF0OWEj-zIqgfypc0W8QUToCwiAoVws6UhU5DWF-Cj4kwq8vST_idG29IWYYsUlLRQ8b28s7T_Ot6wA6sA17MDufv5AkGI-IIFidJre2YnhPBayEbNIXzGHHRDITjOe_ChusJa8KsrXdENrapByItDPz1wMx_cV)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d633313ef16467fa35b8a8fd0cb74b0&_e=ZegX7s0XKFW0k46okqzC9fH0kXYhOJpzgr_U0jbX_9CG3RMPMrHA852FTlVsaWEEs_tixLFCGoMBIIuOM2PatgL6PIImA2hPl263-j2DQtV3gW0LqsixNDJj_w9Cbl_AjYarKe0ofe0y9w1f-6_hMC9SF9fuQJw_nz2Mlfm631fEuOqJ3vfYfJ6uuuIX1gV6Gc6yWKn-ungFRbiyX65FD0TNlRZhMsgbWzF0OWEj-zIFEvtxLiTgdENr38WSmcmCD8JtGydEtSrYf_iZ0jngGEvhzuIhyiahPI3nHm1guhT6d6DE6Td9V5METEazDgz5ojIYP3DH4UMIdw-A8AmOgLqF4MSIpGPw2Hyipdpp5TRrTh8Cs9AobrRaFpVaUPgW)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d633313ef16467fa35b8a8fd0cb74b0&_e=ZegX7s0XKFW0k46okqzC9fH0kXYhOJpzgr_U0jbX_9CG3RMPMrHA852FTlVsaWEEs_tixLFCGoMBIIuOM2PatgL6PIImA2hPl263-j2DQtV3gW0LqsixNDJj_w9Cbl_AjYarKe0ofe0y9w1f-6_hMC9SF9fuQJw_nz2Mlfm631fEuOqJ3vfYfJ6uuuIX1gV6Gc6yWKn-ungFRbiyX65FD0TNlRZhMsgbWzF0OWEj-zKr08_gIjj5_pBoorrDQmLCEBk_eBYeNZQuvATe_fGhNy-JIewPbdtHM6I4Z5lTdQB8g9b8HvTVgNCW-sEWnt5jKvmp-BmFt2rBo5ZoJ3OVrUi27jkbiZl2IePDJ056-x3kgSQaEtf3My9AAQA9_7l2)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1d633313ef16467fa35b8a8fd0cb74b0&_e=ZegX7s0XKFW0k46okqzC9fH0kXYhOJpzgr_U0jbX_9CG3RMPMrHA852FTlVsaWEEs_tixLFCGoMBIIuOM2PatgL6PIImA2hPl263-j2DQtV3gW0LqsixNDJj_w9Cbl_AjYarKe0ofe0y9w1f-6_hMC9SF9fuQJw_nz2Mlfm631fEuOqJ3vfYfJ6uuuIX1gV6Gc6yWKn-ungFRbiyX65FD0TNlRZhMsgbWzF0OWEj-zK6haQjSYdf92kY6jOeCcQwl-0wbfl5Po5dusyp8UdyHbkPOKtkwt6jo3ZCEMUU7VsHYvgvYRLaHmwNlJtSJVx3XdTc5XWnDxLqXn7DWYq9IvtMKEuI5TOa86VF5818MB8Mw7r6CR3Ek9WpMTrkDeU5)
---
| |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Thank President Biden for his leadership >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with the election behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85509?t=6&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85509?t=7&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85509?t=8&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85509?t=9&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85509?t=10&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18241%2E878179%2Ep8jL5G)

name: Congressman-ELECT Gabe Evans
subject: Hi, this is Gabe – the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m responsible for one of your NEW Red seats in Congress

| |
---
| | | Hi, this is Gabe Evans - the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.

---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1akpmg2btcb9bmdr3u6a0s491ijlou1edg48718_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm4p76cph2bs "Gabe Evans")
---

After dedicating over twenty years serving my country, state, and community as both a US Army Black Hawk pilot and municipal police officer, I am proud to be CO-08's Congressman-Elect!

Flipping this district was a knock-down, drag-out fight to the bitter end. I went full force until the last second to make sure my mission was a success - _winning CO-08 in the end by _less_ than 3,000 votes._

Now I'm entering a brand new arena and the stakes have never been higher.

With the Democrats pushing their radical policies that threaten our economy, our safety, and our values - from decriminalizing fentanyl to defunding the police, eroding our Second Amendment rights, undermining school choice, and censoring Conservative voices - **we have no choice but to hold the line.**

**I 'm prepared to fight alongside my House colleagues to start taking our country back on DAY ONE.**

_But the Democrats are desperate for political revenge. They're ready to sabotage our House Majority at every possible turn._**That 's why we need the resources to fuel the next phase of the fight.**

_**[This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000- split between the two of us - to help win this key seat again AND help Leader Scalise send critical resources to other ultra-competitive districts across the country.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znebut486khn7tmvlaq52tqnl8eng4mvmf4p8ttg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm4p76cph2bs "This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000 – split between the two of us – to help win this key race again AND help Leader Scalise win other key House races across the country.")**_
| | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhv6o7402nuoeqng4meukbkooqijfanj9g7bn2bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm4p76cph2bs "SPLIT A DONATION")

This is 100% a no-fail operation, and your support - _no matter the amount_ - will make all the difference. Together I know we can secure our values for our nation.

_I am deeply honored to fight alongside you in this critical battle._

For God and Country,

**Gabe Evans**
_Congressman-Elect, CO-08_

name: Holiday Meals MATCH via USO
subject: Send a gift to military heroes who can’t be home
body:
Make a matched gift to deliver support such as holiday meals to those deployed far from home.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---

[**HOLIDAY ALERT:**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-08Yjh3/SWE1VTZjaUxTaDMrVGtkMzJvdjNpUjZRWEdQVG4zSmhNUmlaeFBoMUR5NGlqVXU3M213bFd0ZnJkTXRLWFZxMjc0K2I5SFVQZTMydFJEWWdFQ2gvRXVHSjhrUlpBL2RlamFOTHpTVlZEcms9S0/SFFsbEZjdjRreGxCcnZ4U2Z0dFFzcnUwLy8wWWszT1F0eTRRTVJlSytkM0FBaUYyTCtHL1FNbmZzaGFnOXNkUkdSL3lPT2cvSWdyV2laOHA4WGdHZ1BxODVTZkxSU3pXS0)

---|---|---
[_GOAL: 3,000 MEALS_](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-08Yjh3/SWE1VTZjaUxTaDMrVGtkMzJvdjNpUjZRWEdQVG4zSmhNUmlaeFBoMUR5NGlqVXU3M213bFd0ZnJkTXRLWFZxMjc0K2I5SFVQZTMydFJEWWdFQ2gvRXVHSjhrUlpBL2RlamFOTHpTVlZEcms9S0/SFFsbEZjdjRreGxCcnZ4U2Z0dFFzcnUwLy8wWWszT1F0eTRRTVJlSytkM0FBaUYyTCtHL1FNbmZzaGFnOXNkUkdSL3lPT2cvSWdyV2laOHA4WGdHZ1BxODVTZkxSU3pXS0)
| [MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
Next week, families around the country will gather to celebrate the holidays -- sharing warm meals, cozy fires and joyful traditions. However you celebrate, we wish you a season filled with love and comfort.
But for so many of our service members deployed around the world, next week will be like any other. The same lonely barracks, thousands of miles away from loved ones. The same mess hall food and MREs. None of the special traditions we all look forward to each year.
**At the USO, we believe it 's on all of us to make the holidays a little brighter for our military heroes. That's why we're working to deliver critical programs, including at least 3,000 Christmas and holiday meals to service members around the world.**
**[Thanks to our generous partners at The Coca-Cola ® Company, gifts donated will be MATCHED, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000 -- but only for a limited time. We can't reach our goal without your help, so please, rush $37.50, or whatever you can.](https://links.e.uso.)**
| [$37.50 CAN HELP
DELIVER A CHRISTMAS MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP
DELIVER TWO CHRISTMAS MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CypXDgtL8/SWE1VTZjaUxTaDMrVGtkMzJvdjNpUjZRWEdQVG4zSmhNUmlaeFBoMUR5NGlqVXU3M213bFd0ZnJkTXRLWFZxMjc0K2I5SFVQZTMydFJEWWdFQ2gvRXVHSjhrUlpBL2RlamFOTHpTVlZEcms9S0/SFFsbEZjdjRreGxCcnZ4U2Z0dFFzcnUwLy8wWWszT1F0eTRRTVJlSytkM0FBaUYyTCtHL1FNbmZzaGFnOXNkUkdSL3lPT2cvSWdyV2laOHA4WGdHZ1BxODVTZkxSU3pXS0)
---
[$150 CAN HELP
DELIVER FOUR CHRISTMAS MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj3-~YsZw/SWE1VTZjaUxTaDMrVGtkMzJvdjNpUjZRWEdQVG4zSmhNUmlaeFBoMUR5NGlqVXU3M213bFd0ZnJkTXRLWFZxMjc0K2I5SFVQZTMydFJEWWdFQ2gvRXVHSjhrUlpBL2RlamFOTHpTVlZEcms9S0/SFFsbEZjdjRreGxCcnZ4U2Z0dFFzcnUwLy8wWWszT1F0eTRRTVJlSytkM0FBaUYyTCtHL1FNbmZzaGFnOXNkUkdSL3lPT2cvSWdyV2laOHA4WGdHZ1BxODVTZkxSU3pXS0)
---
[GIVE ANY AMOUNT TO HELP DELIVER CHRISTMAS MEALS AND OTHER CRITICAL SUPPORT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Our service members make sacrifices every day to protect our freedoms. Spending the holidays away from family is just one of them. We can't **bring them all home, but we can deliver a warm and festive Christmas meal that reminds them they 're not forgotten.**
**[So we're asking: Will you rush a tax-deductible gift of $37.50 or more now to have the value of your gift DOUBLED and let our heroes know they're in your thoughts this Christmas?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting our brave service members at such a meaningful time of year.
--The USO
*The Coca-Cola® Company is matching all donations to the USO through a mail, text and email campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 31, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

---
| John McGuire Appointed to House Oversight Committee
---
| |
---
| | | |
---
Team,

I am honored to be appointed to House Oversight Committee and Accountability in the upcoming 119th Congress!

We will aggressively advocate for reducing waste, fraud and abuse in government and we will work tirelessly to reduce burdensome regulations and boost government transparency and accountability. In addition to working with Chairman James Comer, DOGE Sub-Committee Chair Rep. Rep Marjorie Taylor Greene, Rep Jim Jordan, fellow Navy SEAL Rep Eli Crane, and others, I will also be working on House Oversight with two fellow freshmen Rep elects Brandon Gill, and Brian Jack. We are excited to work with Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy in 2025 to help Trump hold Government accountable.
| John McGuire Congressional Swearing In Ceremony January 3rd
---
| |
---
| Friends, Come celebrate with us. I will be sworn in as a Member of Congress on Friday, January 3rd, 2025. This is a historic opportunity in our Nations Capitol, and I hope you can make it. [Click here for details.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t_CeWXoFtLGzGUyEhWc6NHxvnrshTiXENvXK96ekx7e4zCWor92Mau6Kuav7ibai9HKIKU1uLu7RERZSISfC_ajm787PX5bS5sfyOEyFp-qbAcEVf86SjK3YgGmbRKRbNMQ1WL0nQmiz9jI4J-3fcvAgXup4fV_nSBwes3oMo7S26CrLCHmb9c8l0n9pcbRLKuCaJWbeQO7z6xWalKNKdawf5cWZmknTcLaTZAinbLZbzl3-PzFQOg==&c=xNhKzANgaJregbnRxsBmLYhv-BRMlgDddCWZeKM5aN7x2-mo7O6BcA==&ch=P2LTNMxF_KwJ_M_kU0Yh1JRvyBJpNMSgwreemYsDrUyZI_aTPJhnLw==)

On November 5th, through the grace of God, Trump won, we won the US Senate and the House, and John McGuire received the most votes ever in Virginia's 5th district (72,373 more votes than his predecessor received in 2022)! Thank you for your prayers and your vote. We have much work to do. I am looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress!
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria
Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL [Business Owner](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t_CeWXoFtLGzGUyEhWc6NHxvnrshTiXENvXK96ekx7e4zCWor92MaufJkog1DcZlp7An9kupINlGuV_qk2VdwF-Dfo7sJv9yZeO4pm7NmjwHzRaXWolQUkyA6_R9d0pumxc5Fu3_eCTdJLiMlGKs0g==&c=xNhKzANgaJregbnRxsBmLYhv-BRMlgDddCWZeKM5aN7x2-mo7O6BcA==&ch=P2LTNMxF_KwJ_M_kU0Yh1JRvyBJpNMSgwreemYsDrUyZI_aTPJhnLw==)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2f37357bd36f42ceb0d9d7a3f0bf47b8&_e=71tytR03_UcfhNVFpHOk_zu0fnTWV_G-o1f6xwdLZp3Q4_EX09QOIUk1l1tarJiGjW4ts7cTYdX7BfhzznUj9MFIU0ELjvJXaukP671zMhGrRlzw3WA433IXV1M5x2fvsVLS8tkGJzCTSwHMRUZD_YVEAIi_4j_SUJltvKHP0gX3b9CpRumvkyGzDxSTyUd0YrvKHSojYCEilEHvgDtvX5vMNJQi9_GDYunxBqfLxPozkhWUg6ZyeHIlStR01tn_dfRgcauAnOMLul9pLvu2l6fmYt4K3PFiNW3AakAaLkLfR_iM1E7hUsHTvuq3yZrNdBB0rhC60QB6vDljG7lQ3XgLXAPxsOFUmhxxIuLpdz-4HISzriPP-MOHr4S0nq_ATG88piZmznHg5yuQiCDWYQ%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2f37357bd36f42ceb0d9d7a3f0bf47b8&_e=71tytR03_UcfhNVFpHOk_zu0fnTWV_G-o1f6xwdLZp3Q4_EX09QOIUk1l1tarJiGjW4ts7cTYdX7BfhzznUj9MFIU0ELjvJXaukP671zMhGrRlzw3WA433IXV1M5x2fvsVLS8tkGJzCTSwHMRUZD_YVEAIi_4j_SUJltvKHP0gX3b9CpRumvkyGzDxSTyUd0YrvKHSojYCEilEHvgDtvX5vMNJQi9_GDYunxBqfLxPozkhWUg6ZyeHIlStR01tn_o-l6_r9ZyyPdiCGqIPhMBlEOn07B4IrBT9JQMt_NyxKuqlmpuS8H5FdvuHmIT7wkrePPxwDJbkyL5rKMIq28-XwzP61b3_86F-4xXoxcKSZdsaEdDkL5Y_D--ZhMHKr9JN9I1VjD0PPngteW90z22w%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2f37357bd36f42ceb0d9d7a3f0bf47b8&_e=71tytR03_UcfhNVFpHOk_zu0fnTWV_G-o1f6xwdLZp3Q4_EX09QOIUk1l1tarJiGjW4ts7cTYdX7BfhzznUj9MFIU0ELjvJXaukP671zMhGrRlzw3WA433IXV1M5x2fvsVLS8tkGJzCTSwHMRUZD_YVEAIi_4j_SUJltvKHP0gX3b9CpRumvkyGzDxSTyUd0YrvKHSojYCEilEHvgDtvX5vMNJQi9_GDYunxBqfLxPozkhWUg6ZyeHIlStR01tn_uRU4NjdaiJa-86cR5IekfPotwWiwDM-h2xvlrYteC0RuiWFjxSAeDxBsofPd85Gv6jwTL1FJNWLhupTtUCnY-KSv5ZadsyA0C6CX5U21QBoUSVPtU3JPU2Dxhd0R_dGl9tOsebw1TKa8tCu55aMf9Q%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2f37357bd36f42ceb0d9d7a3f0bf47b8&_e=71tytR03_UcfhNVFpHOk_zu0fnTWV_G-o1f6xwdLZp3Q4_EX09QOIUk1l1tarJiGjW4ts7cTYdX7BfhzznUj9MFIU0ELjvJXaukP671zMhGrRlzw3WA433IXV1M5x2fvsVLS8tkGJzCTSwHMRUZD_YVEAIi_4j_SUJltvKHP0gX3b9CpRumvkyGzDxSTyUd0YrvKHSojYCEilEHvgDtvX5vMNJQi9_GDYunxBqfLxPozkhWUg6ZyeHIlStR01tn_JUorWtenLyvFi9SwsdpLGY881bKNsILXIXsbPIihXUecNrp_4_RUZzDGNFxf7eHMlNsvKDhDnwgvCtPaLhmCDN1fB7t2P3Kv4Q56o6m4oTNPiVtIuH4rgSjjLNohPS56VDnMMJJlYmDnzNeGkzxb7w%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jim Jordan and GOP leaders lied to us again...
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
Fox Business recently reported another disturbing ULTRA-MAGA attack on everyday Americans:
When Republican congressional leadership met with Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy’s so-called DOGE committee, they decided everything is on the table for cuts.
And yes, that includes cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.
The same party that spent the election season swearing they’d protect seniors and healthcare is now plotting to gut the very programs millions of Americans rely on.
And who’s one of the biggest cheerleaders of this movement?
You guessed it – Jim Jordan.
Jordan has spent years working to dismantle Social Security and Medicare, voting time and again to chip away at these programs.
We can’t let this stand. That’s why we’re building the next phase of our movement to take Jim Jordan head-on and stop this reckless agenda. Will you chip in $25, $50, or more today to supercharge our efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241217_ss_medicare_cuts_link1]
With the richest man in America whispering in their ears, ULTRA-MAGA is fully embracing a plan to strip away the safety nets we’ve paid for with our hard-earned tax dollars.
Social Security and Medicare aren’t handouts – they’re lifelines.
They’re the ALL AMERICAN Retirement Plan and promises we’ve made to ourselves and to each other: that after a lifetime of work, we’ll have the support we need to live with dignity.
But instead of honoring that promise, Jim Jordan and his extremist allies are cozying up to billionaires while selling out everyday Americans.
Jordan doesn’t want to fight for seniors, workers, or families – he just wants power and a Fox News camera in his face.
After 17 years of grandstanding, his record speaks for itself. Jordan has done nothing for everyday Ohioans while actively working to dismantle the programs that keep so many people afloat.
But our movement is gearing up to create major problems for the conspiracy theorist-in-chief and sexual predator enabler Congressman, Jim Jordan.
We’re not going to let him or any of his ULTRA-MAGA cronies trample over our rights and our future.
Together, we will build a coalition strong enough to take on Jordan’s harmful agenda and protect the programs that matter most to our families, friends, and neighbors.
Let’s show them we mean business.
Contribute today and help us fight for a future where every American – not just the ultra-rich – has the support they deserve. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241217_ss_medicare_cuts_link2]

subject: JD Vance goes NUCLEAR on the Democrats.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
“The effort to ruin Pete Hegseth is a coordinated smear campaign.”

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmvrfjf3ksdg9enao750m3oriknubrir0u7c8tn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c9h2bs)

---
Vice President JD Vance has had **_ENOUGH_** of Democrats and deep-state puppets smearing Pete Hegseth’s good name.
“The effort to tank Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.” - JD Vance.
The reason Dems want Pete Hegseth gone is because they’re **_TERRIFIED_** of a Defense Secretary who is strong, fearless, and would lead an America-First Military.
As we speak, deep-state bureaucrats are spreading heinous lies about Pete Hegseth; defaming his character and his family in an attempt to tear him **_DOWN_** and make him **_WITHDRAW_** his nomination.
**The America-Last Left’s petition to DESTROY PETE HEGSETH has reached MILLIONS OF SIGNATURES seemingly overnight.**
If we let Pete Hegseth **_FALL_** to the **_WOKE MOB_** – they’ll be **_NOTHING_** stopping them from going after President Trump, his **_ENTIRE_** administration, and eventually **_YOU._**
[With such little time until inauguration day, we’ve organized a counter petition to STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjhfbm8jduj8go0bh8us15reigo5oi5t30q4gc5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c9h2bs)

---
Time is of the essence and we need **_EVERY_** signature that we can get if we’re going to save Pete.
[SIGN THE PETITION](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaur0p7q0crncbirukdup4g1ro11t189eschos08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c9h2bs)
