name: Congressman-ELECT Gabe Evans
subject: Hi, this is Gabe – the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m responsible for one of your NEW Red seats in Congress

| |
---
| | | Hi, this is Gabe Evans - the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.

---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1baqoc6qgt1q43mo981k4dmup4dd6hnbgg26gag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs "Gabe Evans")
---

After dedicating over twenty years serving my country, state, and community as both a US Army Black Hawk pilot and municipal police officer, I am proud to be CO-08's Congressman-Elect!

Flipping this district was a knock-down, drag-out fight to the bitter end. I went full force until the last second to make sure my mission was a success - _winning CO-08 in the end by _less_ than 3,000 votes._

Now I'm entering a brand new arena and the stakes have never been higher.

With the Democrats pushing their radical policies that threaten our economy, our safety, and our values - from decriminalizing fentanyl to defunding the police, eroding our Second Amendment rights, undermining school choice, and censoring Conservative voices - **we have no choice but to hold the line.**

**I 'm prepared to fight alongside my House colleagues to start taking our country back on DAY ONE.**

_But the Democrats are desperate for political revenge. They're ready to sabotage our House Majority at every possible turn._**That 's why we need the resources to fuel the next phase of the fight.**

_**[This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000- split between the two of us - to help win this key seat again AND help Leader Scalise send critical resources to other ultra-competitive districts across the country.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zjsm2ch1p4sts4u727o6k9mfd6hqof3laspvnsqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs "This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000 – split between the two of us – to help win this key race again AND help Leader Scalise win other key House races across the country.")**_
| | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zeb6fuu1bd2ji8ksq4r59of2fvl80a6kme2a79so_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs "SPLIT A DONATION")
---

This is 100% a no-fail operation, and your support - _no matter the amount_ - will make all the difference. Together I know we can secure our values for our nation.

_I am deeply honored to fight alongside you in this critical battle._

For God and Country,

**Gabe Evans**
_Congressman-Elect, CO-08_

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhnf056jiaio1p3rotr3os3al8fcl119b2n1m5ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zr9d8dkj19nca1mpthdt7d5v4tikc7jba4i57c60_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z9obnnvj6qp3s98jgh9ongj74c3uo0q02h1gfgn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2za26o3s5o31a50822ingt9df313uhm4uu70n67jg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmco72c3h2bs)

Update For America

name: Congressman-ELECT Gabe Evans
subject: Hi, this is Gabe – the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m responsible for one of your NEW Red seats in Congress

| |
---
| | | Hi, this is Gabe Evans - the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.

---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zblmj90hvldci5fh82vcsuf048s3da7rtvuglak8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm2pr0cdh2bs "Gabe Evans")
---

After dedicating over twenty years serving my country, state, and community as both a US Army Black Hawk pilot and municipal police officer, I am proud to be CO-08's Congressman-Elect!

Flipping this district was a knock-down, drag-out fight to the bitter end. I went full force until the last second to make sure my mission was a success - _winning CO-08 in the end by _less_ than 3,000 votes._

Now I'm entering a brand new arena and the stakes have never been higher.

With the Democrats pushing their radical policies that threaten our economy, our safety, and our values - from decriminalizing fentanyl to defunding the police, eroding our Second Amendment rights, undermining school choice, and censoring Conservative voices - **we have no choice but to hold the line.**

**I 'm prepared to fight alongside my House colleagues to start taking our country back on DAY ONE.**

_But the Democrats are desperate for political revenge. They're ready to sabotage our House Majority at every possible turn._**That 's why we need the resources to fuel the next phase of the fight.**

_**[This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000- split between the two of us - to help win this key seat again AND help Leader Scalise send critical resources to other ultra-competitive districts across the country.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zommi109skoi0lqbadm3s67sjt7nm8fv5ttn2uc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm2pr0cdh2bs "This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000 – split between the two of us – to help win this key race again AND help Leader Scalise win other key House races across the country.")**_
| | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z08oqkdjc4eaagbc7n8ubc8ednl0jq8q17s6tr00_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm2pr0cdh2bs "SPLIT A DONATION")
---

This is 100% a no-fail operation, and your support - _no matter the amount_ - will make all the difference. Together I know we can secure our values for our nation.

_I am deeply honored to fight alongside you in this critical battle._

For God and Country,

**Gabe Evans**
_Congressman-Elect, CO-08_

| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm568totur0qpaihj7n8qp5ionq55tg0o3e1ejd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm2pr0cdh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8fbu1a605bcc4odpg21hpfi40v33cgseupgjm8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm2pr0cdh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4mq66de60rbnjf5auttpkm0dukgf6ugb5idvkrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hm2pr0cdh2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: You can't be fooled by Delco's fairytales
body:
Wally Nunn | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dce9512348&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **__Wally Nunn:_ Delco council can’t fool all of the people all of the time_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f84ad21ecf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "The Delaware County Council has concluded that its citizens just fell off a turnip truck. They think that they can tell us magical fairy tales and, like a bunch of five-year-olds, we will just believe.

On November 1, the executive director delivered to Council a proposed budget — more about that later — which had, at the least, a structural $76 million dollar deficit. The reason it was only $76 million was that they increased taxes twelve months ago by $8 million. Without that, the deficit would have been $84 million.

Let that sink in: the Democrats have **increased spending by at least $80 million** since they took over the county government in 2020."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b8177a5226&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eee5d0ec4c&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| _Wally Nunn is the former Chairman of Delaware County Council._

We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=953d694209&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to present Wally's writings, and to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

Read more columns on [w](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=27cba69ae2&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6324f98c62&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.

---

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: Exciting time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:
And even though the campaign is over, our work isn't slowing down.

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98834632/517973694/1079316600?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.17_DecMM2_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzY2OWFhOC04N2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLnaL2cIFaB-pb4kJYdstevY5elZAeUndBkOUNIV_E0=&emci=19f2e913-cbb7-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=0c669aa8-87bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=11913588)** To unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=fJXtqeXJ%2Bp5B4QfgQeD1bOaWWzE0wTHVTafu7c34X15g3ecoFjJ%2B2UQ7Yb%2FQr37Ji8EZMDxXnEPkULtr1DRlhHXkG1jZoJkqiPTMHeM0dZPBiZRWLWTrYufs%2BE8g2aITtZP%2Bv3vmEAGQ15oD%2BcvKlnQMYxdwZBjbrSc7EQm7k9JgXjzSNjZ8TtdX41LADYICWc9giZGtX36Y5ES0js4QuWvWD0vbfDY3e31TELL01%2F4SLiyeFS%2BuJQPuMDjLSkqTa6X09LY1pcLJqT844bI0LrS%2F0Pyln%2FqYLh5lF16e2hdok2Az4WqJTjEosUS4oTjlRkTgWNBaSubkS83n2Z8M4vsSCfxoCQOLsrXClLE5VHNIOOWdtNCeg01PRWxukrSBHa5F80VQun9CtxeY8y3%2Bmi8Gl90vaQf%2FR7kfs7SZfrw61pEdHWonJCr76JwoZk1G)**
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98834644/517973701/631174349?refcode=LOC_LBR_EM_FR_2024_Email-Header&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.17_DecMM2_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzY2OWFhOC04N2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLnaL2cIFaB-pb4kJYdstevY5elZAeUndBkOUNIV_E0=)
---
Hi there – I won't lie, I’ve been busy between getting ready for the holidays and getting ready for my new role as Senator from Delaware. But I wanted to take a moment to reach out because I have an important message. This year, we watched people come together and support my historic campaign to bring a Bright Hope to the Senate. And even though the campaign is over, our work isn't slowing down. I'll have big hurdles to overcome in the upcoming months as we adapt to another Trump Administration. Right now, my team and I are facing a **critical fundraising deadline** and need your help to reach our goal. [**We have less than 24 hours to meet our mid-month December goal. name: Congressman-ELECT Gabe Evans
subject: Hi, this is Gabe – the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m responsible for one of your NEW Red seats in Congress

| |
---
| | | Hi, this is Gabe Evans - the guy who just won one of the closest races in the country.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs97qe1nndcfr68o3ihrfjshultf17e0q4rbq5po_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmaor6c1h2bs "Gabe Evans")
---

After dedicating over twenty years serving my country, state, and community as both a US Army Black Hawk pilot and municipal police officer, I am proud to be CO-08's Congressman-Elect!

Flipping this district was a knock-down, drag-out fight to the bitter end. I went full force until the last second to make sure my mission was a success - _winning CO-08 in the end by _less_ than 3,000 votes._

Now I'm entering a brand new arena and the stakes have never been higher.

With the Democrats pushing their radical policies that threaten our economy, our safety, and our values - from decriminalizing fentanyl to defunding the police, eroding our Second Amendment rights, undermining school choice, and censoring Conservative voices - **we have no choice but to hold the line.**

**I 'm prepared to fight alongside my House colleagues to start taking our country back on DAY ONE.**

_But the Democrats are desperate for political revenge. They're ready to sabotage our House Majority at every possible turn._**That 's why we need the resources to fuel the next phase of the fight.**

_**[This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000- split between the two of us - to help win this key seat again AND help Leader Scalise send critical resources to other ultra-competitive districts across the country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8u3p87g7n7dj1012n27u1ndq5bj58os8gmb4ufo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmaor6c1h2bs "This fight came down to the wire. Every dollar helped me win. That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $25,000 – split between the two of us – to help win this key race again AND help Leader Scalise win other key House races across the country.")**_
| | [SPLIT A DONATION](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znnt6gfd7f695c7aij0k9giu6l265mnp77avvolo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmaor6c1h2bs "SPLIT A DONATION")
---

This is 100% a no-fail operation, and your support - _no matter the amount_ - will make all the difference. Together I know we can secure our values for our nation.

_I am deeply honored to fight alongside you in this critical battle._

For God and Country,

**Gabe Evans**
_Congressman-Elect, CO-08_

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9eto524q7u5f078kkuan3c2mp7ha2bl20ac25po_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmaor6c1h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

As your Majority Leader - my first order of business is checking in with our best supporters. I just launched my NEW MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. _**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4v3aqkfcq5tt2gv96dnspnt9nt873n3okoo5qgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmaor6c1h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link. ")**_

**Your input will help me better understand what we're doing well and where we can improve.**
---
| | | [TAKE THE SURVEY ->](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfgco2g19e8enc2tu7rantspb6g43eou8rm0gumo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c5hmaor6c1h2bs)
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=634fded1e8334f82bf92069f1c4fdf4e&_e=sxXsODIP4btW86ITlFTxxMkwiWcbYimg5Xq8Q56teToIcbpMUVjG3ik3YFif-sFsMoM6KKuXqmgwwTlZL4fGoqXd_Y0DgvYVWxFWNpCV-gPOA8ZR0kqBgg9dNDQk1R55VT0JzPxWOsksAiwUNa8xhlogVRD4Q3xpnQNLDMVFBZMz3qqBW6W_5IyOZ_I7L1N9Brgg7R-fxfgI_I5SBP9jb-E_JSbHt3EPVOKyuKzSQadG2lkcEqu2k54Cc2FLYtSWBR0y0etmxx8Rl0ihO_3pvHk1awvBBTEQ6B5l79GR6JMrktdPa9tioR7wMvtLBNkSIwLPtE94aXbTvcySHSyBGdxo42WQehzb3QJM_dUtpwuhz7MCwghhp-1RTWNieQBh)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=634fded1e8334f82bf92069f1c4fdf4e&_e=sxXsODIP4btW86ITlFTxxMkwiWcbYimg5Xq8Q56teToIcbpMUVjG3ik3YFif-sFsMoM6KKuXqmgwwTlZL4fGoqXd_Y0DgvYVWxFWNpCV-gPOA8ZR0kqBgg9dNDQk1R55VT0JzPxWOsksAiwUNa8xhlogVRD4Q3xpnQNLDMVFBZMz3qqBW6W_5IyOZ_I7L1N9Brgg7R-fxfgI_I5SBP9jb-E_JSbHt3EPVOKyuKzSQacsTiwUnGIiSJIpUcRifsvvh7QCQ7jJnVmZ7KTbTEwOpuFOIRvWp8DA2MND42IGuGy1DaDtjKeKzTTG3laWrYzAjivl0RWC-2U9oIKwnmjxqltNz8NV4vaxusBGQlIs0yUSBzMeuwy7eA-fwoLHECUs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=634fded1e8334f82bf92069f1c4fdf4e&_e=sxXsODIP4btW86ITlFTxxMkwiWcbYimg5Xq8Q56teToIcbpMUVjG3ik3YFif-sFsMoM6KKuXqmgwwTlZL4fGoqXd_Y0DgvYVWxFWNpCV-gPOA8ZR0kqBgg9dNDQk1R55VT0JzPxWOsksAiwUNa8xhlogVRD4Q3xpnQNLDMVFBZMz3qqBW6W_5IyOZ_I7L1N9Brgg7R-fxfgI_I5SBP9jb-E_JSbHt3EPVOKyuKzSQacL_D8CNZyIkyl0CpFh9qfvnvXmWDoLOIeKuF9jLpZCBejWy2elgA98pZQ18_Gfm-SwB74Xw4pUzb9_rY7DCotp3LJM2jNoYyKPvucr9Jc5ee3U98d2CuICmNODHVT8lSaX4C-TS0nSI0apo6hq4s5P)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

Holidays have you feeling frazzled? In the chaos of December, it can be easy to forget the real reason for the season. Moms for
America Board Member Sam Sorbo joins the podcast to discuss ways that families can keep Christ as the focus of their Christmas
celebration.

Sam is no stranger to hectic schedules. She is an actress, radio host, model, and homeschooling mama. It does not get busier than
that! Sam and her husband, Kevin, released a Christmas devotional to help families focus on what matters most. All that and more!
Like, share and subscribe.

6 Ways to Teach Your Kids the True Meaning of Christmas

The Christmas season already feels like a lot to many of us – a lot of details, shopping, events, parties, and pretense. Amid the
fun, it can sometimes seem overwhelming if you're the creative, keeper-of-Christmas in your home – which many moms are. In the
holiday rush, take time to catch your breath and remind yourself of a humble stable where a savior was born. It's something we
long for our children to embrace, and that's why we are sharing six creative ways to teach your kids about the true meaning of the
season.

clean_body: In the busyness of the holiday season, we're bringing you simple ways to remember the true Reason for the Season! If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 17, 2024 • Newsletter Keeping Christ the Center of Christmas Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Holidays have you feeling frazzled? In the chaos of December, it can be easy to forget the real reason for the season. Moms for America Board Member Sam Sorbo joins the podcast to discuss ways that families can keep Christ as the focus of their Christmas celebration. Sam is no stranger to hectic schedules. She is an actress, radio host, model, and homeschooling mama. It does not get busier than that! Sam and her husband, Kevin, released a Christmas devotional to help families focus on what matters most. All that and more! Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] 6 Ways to Teach Your Kids the True Meaning of Christmas The Christmas season already feels like a lot to many of us – a lot of details, shopping, events, parties, and pretense. Amid the fun, it can sometimes seem overwhelming if you're the creative, keeper-of-Christmas in your home – which many moms are. In the holiday rush, take time to catch your breath and remind yourself of a humble stable where a savior was born. It's something we long for our children to embrace, and that's why we are sharing six creative ways to teach your kids about the true meaning of the season. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: You vs. him [TIME-SENSITIVE]
body:
| Hi Peter, Let's imagine it's the year 2053. Your screen flashes with political news and stock market updates as you sip your morning coffee. Your mind wanders as you reflect on your life. You see... You and your friend, Johnny, started working at the _same_ company on the _same_ day. You held the same position. You rose the ranks at the same pace. You had similar family obligations. And you had almost _identical_ paychecks, bills, and finances. But one of you took action, made savvy financial decisions (including squeezing as much as possible from current opportunities), and retired early. The other struggled financially and worked well into retirement age. The good news is... it's not 2053 yet. [**You get to decide**](https://financeinsights.net/OpaDfLK1qS4q2dDSP5w3rfBpVgn?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)**which of these characters you'll become**. Are you: 1\. The investor who took action, made **[savvy financial decisions](https://financeinsights.net/OpaDfLK1qS4q2dDSP5w3rfBpVgn?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)** , and retired early? OR 2\. Are you the investor who was forced to work until late in life, missing out on so much pleasure in retirement? Of course, you want to be the first one. No one wants to be the second one. But the decision to live the first scenario happens TODAY. Not in 30 years. If you identify more with #1, this FREE 2024 tax guide is for you. [**Discover 5 IMMEDIATE Opportunities to Lower Your Taxes... BEFORE Dec 31, 2024**](https://financeinsights.net/OpaDfLK1qS4q2dDSP5w3rfBpVgn?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Inside, you'll discover:
* The costly "domino effect" caused by changes to tax laws (and what to do)
* Specific tax savings to tap BEFORE income tax rates jump
* The Dec 31 tax "bunching" strategy used by the highest income earners

Make the decision to take action before you file. Every tiny, savvy financial decision you make adds up to who you'll become in 2053 and beyond. **_READ NOW:_****[Discover 5 IMMEDIATE Opportunities to Lower Your Taxes... BEFORE Dec 31, 2024](https://financeinsights.net/OpaDfLK1qS4q2dDSP5w3rfBpVgn?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)** Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6ImQxNmpmUWVKTWY1ZEcxTCIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. A quick word of caution. No matter what you do with the information you learn inside (or if you decide to do nothing at all), I highly recommend running your options by financial and tax professionals. Tax laws are littered with "fine print" details that could have serious consequences if executed incorrectly OR not executed at all. If you have any questions, please "reply" to this email or call to set up a quick chat.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Check out the grade your state received on our annual scorecard ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This year’s scorecard once again proved that states with stronger gun laws are significantly safer, with lower gun death rates and more lives saved.
#

Friends -
For more than a decade, GIFFORDS Law Center has released a scorecard to grade each state on its gun laws.
Here’s a look at where your home state ranked this year:
**GIFFORDS GUN LAW SCORECARD**
**Your State:** Pennsylvania
**Pennsylvania Gun Law Grade:** B
**Gun Deaths per 100,000:** 13.6
**Gun Law Rank:** **16**
This year’s scorecard once again proved that states with stronger gun laws are significantly safer, with lower gun death rates and more lives saved.
States like California, which has the strongest gun laws in the nation, demonstrate what’s possible when leaders make gun safety a priority and take real action to save lives. If the national gun death rate matched California's, more than 19,300 lives would have been saved in a single year—and more than 13,000 of those lives saved would be in states that currently receive an “F” or “D.”
At GIFFORDS, we’re working each and every day towards a future where every state receives an “A” on our annual scorecard. Unfortunately, we aren’t there yet: This year, 22 states still received an “F.”
We have a lot of work to do to make sure everyone in our nation can live free from gun violence—no matter what state they live in. And we can’t do this work alone.
[**So please, make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us continue the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence in Pennsylvania and all across our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec24.MAKoxe&refcode=em241217-1-b&t=1&akid=9650%2E3935704%2E_Gdni1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&amount=3&refcode=em241217-1-b&t=2&akid=9650%2E3935704%2E_Gdni1)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-dec24.YP__Dn&refcode=em241217-1-b&t=3&akid=9650%2E3935704%2E_Gdni1)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=9650%2E3935704%2E_Gdni1) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi
subject: Our son, Raja
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[_**Hi, Peter! We’re Raja’s parents, Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi -- and we’re reaching out to tell you why we’re so proud of our son. We’d love it if you would read this whole email -- but if you’re short on time, will you chip in $14 to help us reach 597 grassroots donations for Raja before midnight? It would mean the world to him to have your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98837217/517982132/-1810142050?amount=14&refcode=20241217_em_fr_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTFhNTQ1MS04YWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uel4w65UChFYMht-7FgsnMpPRbIb4B-h7KAueTrQMe4=) Peter, our family comes from humble beginnings. We faced economic hardship when we first immigrated to the United States. But we worked hard to achieve the American Dream. clean_body: | URGENT UPDATE FROM ELECT REPUBLICANS HQ As we approach the end of the year, I'm writing to you with a sense of urgency and alarm. The radical left is pulling out all the stops to sabotage President Trump's agenda and undermine our values. But I know I can count on you, Fellow Conservative , to stand with us and help Elect Republicans. Just recently, NFL legend Joe Theismann showed us what it means to truly support our heroes. He gave two free cars to U.S. military veterans ahead of the Army-Navy game, reminding us of the greatness of America and the importance of honoring those who serve. But let's be clear: the left doesn't share our values. They're more interested in tearing down our heroes and undermining our institutions. That's why we need your help to push back against their radical agenda. | | | | ---|---|--- | | Don't wait – the clock is ticking. Every minute counts in this fight, Fellow Conservative. #
Peter – it’s Dick.
The holiday season is in full swing, so I took the time to make a wishlist that I’d like to share with you:
1. Spend quality time with my family and friends.
2. Enjoy the holiday lights in our neighborhood and throughout Springfield.
3. **Defend our democracy and stand up to Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda.**

This year, the holidays feel a bit different and even uncertain – especially knowing that Trump will head back into the White House. So to have a brighter holiday season, we need to band together and defend our democracy from this extremist administration.
It’ll take a big effort, but I believe in our community and the will of the American people who will always fight for a better future.

clean_body: It’ll take a big effort, but I believe in our community and the will of the American people. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Peter – it’s Dick. The holiday season is in full swing, so I took the time to make a wishlist that I’d like to share with you: 1. Spend quality time with my family and friends. 2. Enjoy the holiday lights in our neighborhood and throughout Springfield. 3. Defend our democracy and stand up to Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda. This year, the holidays feel a bit different and even uncertain – especially knowing that Trump will head back into the White House. So to have a brighter holiday season, we need to band together and defend our democracy from this extremist administration. It’ll take a big effort, but I believe in our community and the will of the American people who will always fight for a better future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ****=** **=** **=** **=** **=** **=** Thank you, Dick Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. We just finished combing through our records to find the TOP 500 Trump-Vance supporters on our file, and your supporter profile blew us away! So now we are inviting YOU, Peter, to be the FIRST signature on our victory card to say CONGRATULATIONS to Vice President-Elect JD Vance! We are opening up this card to everyone on our list first thing tomorrow morning, so make sure to take advantage of this exclusive opportunity as soon as possible to be the first to sign and leave a message! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2f9f2be80c6e527017e4b6adafa35973e7be8df6fb538e923bbad9470ef7e730bbcdfae7e89e2373628aea60051e8d0f160545d991a43011 Will you sign your name now and leave a message of support? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2f9f2be80c6e527017e4b6adafa35973e7be8df6fb538e923bbad9470ef7e730bbcdfae7e89e2373628aea60051e8d0f160545d991a43011 “CONGRATULATIONS JD VANCE!” https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=2f9f2be80c6e527017e4b6adafa35973e7be8df6fb538e923bbad9470ef7e730bbcdfae7e89e2373628aea60051e8d0f160545d991a43011 >" alias="ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">ADD YOUR NAME NOW >> We hope to see your name at the TOP of this card when we check tomorrow! - TIME-SENSITIVE REQUEST (via Team Marsha) P.S. We’re forwarding ALL messages submitted tonight directly to the Trump-Vance team, so sign ASAP to be flagged by Team Marsha! body:

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62e18fe50cf14d3c880274bf5e132377&_e=IcmONXNxx1RJAH1Pb6r5sAo_TyNaB5Rck3dva2oXoA8nuzQFRiMVLvCy1d9sdeGiLSu1zV6HL2dEosCy7JmNvxoyx2j7KZVBeMYubmpV6WTbO_xGJPVgfHRto6bZ27M-xaT5_YtD0nLe47q6AeybeCYq_y4ti-L8YmfG_ZDSZicsX6PAxqSfwLPXSO7yRYow4cKrnOwn3kxV2j07j2tbxWuXwzDv8FrD1V_BZJ9sxeGd-MCOzPNkizW4IaeuItnXK5tdudpEOdEnccQrEMcJrAabdl5etfEVY87z7l4SNGcr4stWcNmNEtM1luVh-NzWndJH8pT-xzg5iVo6CRLKipGEFVMt_03LdA--Sd3UEQG_giA170kP2VH7-u057IDyaRGSsK7vfxY7GMdtc7KrXGxYqz81uctWs4FrUIjk2GA4L9JWkTXLfjswPxWQYfeGfG7e5OCCJEUDNh3u0dmy8g%3D%3D)

Vice President JD Vance has had **_ENOUGH_** of Democrats and deep-state puppets smearing Pete Hegseth’s good name.
“The effort to tank Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC.” - JD Vance.
The reason Dems want Pete Hegseth gone is because they’re **_TERRIFIED_** of a Defense Secretary who is strong, fearless, and would lead an America-First Military.
As we speak, deep-state bureaucrats are spreading heinous lies about Pete Hegseth; defaming his character and his family in an attempt to tear him **_DOWN_** and make him **_WITHDRAW_** his nomination.
**The America-Last Left’s petition to DESTROY PETE HEGSETH has reached MILLIONS OF SIGNATURES seemingly overnight.**
If we let Pete Hegseth **_FALL_** to the **_WOKE MOB_** – they’ll be **_NOTHING_** stopping them from going after President Trump, his **_ENTIRE_** administration, and eventually **_YOU._**
[With such little time until inauguration day, we’ve organized a counter petition to STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62e18fe50cf14d3c880274bf5e132377&_e=IcmONXNxx1RJAH1Pb6r5sAo_TyNaB5Rck3dva2oXoA8nuzQFRiMVLvCy1d9sdeGiLSu1zV6HL2dEosCy7JmNvxoyx2j7KZVBeMYubmpV6WTbO_xGJPVgfHRto6bZ27M-xaT5_YtD0nLe47q6AeybeCYq_y4ti-L8YmfG_ZDSZicsX6PAxqSfwLPXSO7yRYow4cKrnOwn3kxV2j07j2tbxWuXwzDv8FrD1V_BZJ9sxeGd-MCOzPNkizW4IaeuItnXK5tdudpEOdEnccQrEMcJrAabdl5etfEVY87z7l4SNGcr4stWcNmNEtM1luVh-NzWeUa8MZ90Qul3mMhxC4W1EKa-aWb74IxbOgMfUFS2uGXZcgVZUOPTftF8vZxL-NFlrFFLrMKMlmd3vJa4P5wtMhdTEAHw8gmMsYjKuqvEyvNrxx4WOS5Naah6CiXZ5hl64hRvT6ffWRUf5urvfugRpw%3D%3D)

| [SIGN THE COUNTER PETITION](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62e18fe50cf14d3c880274bf5e132377&_e=IcmONXNxx1RJAH1Pb6r5sAo_TyNaB5Rck3dva2oXoA8nuzQFRiMVLvCy1d9sdeGiLSu1zV6HL2dEosCy7JmNvxoyx2j7KZVBeMYubmpV6WTbO_xGJPVgfHRto6bZ27M-xaT5_YtD0nLe47q6AeybeCYq_y4ti-L8YmfG_ZDSZicsX6PAxqSfwLPXSO7yRYow4cKrnOwn3kxV2j07j2tbxWuXwzDv8FrD1V_BZJ9sxeGd-MCOzPNkizW4IaeuItnXK5tdudpEOdEnccQrEMcJrAabdl5etfEVY87z7l4SNGcr4stWcNmNEtM1luVh-NzW4bxByQTXbHTbRm6LMzHdrmxl-2f14uODnkbnmq-TP76D86rIQy-23TYaIzxfDZTdlKIb-ARTvIwDBg2zEdO3pOBn0jTZat9plEV71gbLBhEkpuMW6Wg5IcvEZgFof5JbEYs1cafhilY2TqV7wePWAQ%3D%3D)

subject: The Most Corrupt Administration In History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bd789843abd94e0c8ce19ae4f755f9df&_e=ZygTH1OhysXvZI7dSHqEJ_22aen9kB1Q03-MYATmV0bWg5rsz9rv2rojj5Vw9Dlk6zn6IOLgCDw5wF8O1ZTp5JeBqmA6inwmdI4xp1EfvVmUHQ1RpgW3Twuu_oexiS94w-5bNkfS5vg_4DDGWJ5ZjMX2GYElnmeO-AX4G5W75C_226MRHSaaZ9nbniUVZQ9oMqJh2cLMDIJjvMKd8Yf1Pu3Sg3YNNZJzh6GutsvARw5-LJUNSBk91C6j8bPXBIeLVFZT87_QHOeY_1TAePMBH48YUUWTQEQ_vAJk1UmzohvKPFkXsV-PAXcrw8grdyyHi5F0rB1gVJhHyscgmOMz5ysHsTOAeZmtipd4s6aciKlkqFJXVgL9_WWG5Zb7YuvI)
---
Peter,
---
The Biden Administration’s actions defy belief, cementing its legacy as the most corrupt administration in U.S. history. Joe Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter is a blatant abuse of power and a slap in the face to law-abiding Americans. Hunter’s influence-peddling scheme, selling access to “the big guy,” exemplifies the Biden family’s exploitation of public office for personal gain. The pardon shields this corrupt enterprise from accountability.

While Hunter cashed in on his father’s position, the Department of Justice was weaponized against conservatives—raiding pro-life leaders, infiltrating Catholic parishes, targeting parents as domestic terrorists, and relentlessly prosecuting President Trump. This administration has mocked the rule of law, eroding public trust in our institutions.

Despite these pardons, the fight for justice is far from over. The Biden Administration’s corruption must be exposed, and I will not rest until the truth is uncovered. Preemptive pardons are admissions of guilt, and I am committed to holding the Biden family and their cronies accountable.
---

Joe Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter is a blatant abuse of power and a slap in the face to law-abiding Americans. Hunter’s influence-peddling scheme, selling access to “the big guy,” exemplifies the Biden family’s exploitation of public office for personal gain. The pardon shields this corrupt enterprise from accountability. While Hunter cashed in on his father’s position, the Department of Justice was weaponized against conservatives—raiding pro-life leaders, infiltrating Catholic parishes, targeting parents as domestic terrorists, and relentlessly prosecuting President Trump. This administration has mocked the rule of law, eroding public trust in our institutions. Despite these pardons, the fight for justice is far from over. The Biden Administration’s corruption must be exposed, and I will not rest until the truth is uncovered. Preemptive pardons are admissions of guilt, and I am committed to holding the Biden family and their cronies accountable. - In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Teichert in the Trenches
subject: 💥 Successfully dealing with toxic and unsupportive bosses!
body:
I am privileged to speak frequently on
---
| | | | | |
---
| | 💥 **Successfully dealing with toxic and unsupportive bosses!**
---
I am privileged to speak frequently on variety of leadership, innovation, national security, and international affairs topics (please reach out if there is something along these lines that I can ever do for you). There are two questions that come up again-and-again from audiences of all types.
* How do you lead properly with toxic and unsupportive bosses?
* As a leader, how to you break through the frozen middle as you strive to innovate?

I’ll tackle the first one of these here, and you’ll see my answer to the next one soon! The solution is found in these following four concepts. ** _Feed Your Team_** A toxic or unsupportive boss (I will never call someone like this a leader – they don’t deserve such a title regardless of where they fall in the organization’s hierarchy) can be suffocating and strangling. As a subordinate leader underneath such a boss, you are constrained, pressured, and demoralized. Don’t pass it on! In fact, go out of your way to provide a distinctiveness that can draw your team together in the face of such adversity. If you work for a micromanager, it is easy to become a micromanager. If you work for a tyrant, it is easy to slip into tyrannical tendencies. Don’t! Break the chain! It takes strength, resilience, and moral courage to shield your team from what is coming from above, but your team deserves a leader who is willing to stand strong and create a culture within their sphere of influence and realm of impact that is different from that felt from above. ** _Feed the Beast_** This type of boss typically has an insatiable desire for information driven by selfish ambition. Meet this demand, but do so on your own timeline while retaining the initiative. When you come across something that your boss thinks they need to know (based on your past experience with them), preemptively provide it to them. Not only does this meet their threshold for information intake, but over time, it also gives them a sense of trust in your information-providing-pathways that takes some of the pressure off of you and your team. You can also create a regular information forum like a weekly activity report (WAR) where your boss knows he or she can expect a steady diet of information. You retain the initiative in a way that is most convenient for you while avoiding much of the reactive communication requests that typically come at a time most inconvenient for you. ** _Feed Their Ego_** I don’t mean pandering or sucking up here. Never stoop to that level! Yet, I do mean recognizing the importance and value of understanding your boss’s priorities and their boss’s priorities. Find ways to communicate that gives your boss the ammunition to look good up the chain. By a strategic savviness that communicates in ways most meaningful to your boss, you also give your organization a respite from their toxic and unsupportive ways. This also takes pressure off of you and your team, and makes your boss generally more supportive than they would be otherwise. ** _Feed Yourself Wins_** Please use the following piece of advice for good and not for evil. It works brilliantly! Almost never ask your boss for permission, but tell them what you are doing and why! An unsupportive or toxic boss loves to say NO, largely because a departure from the status quo is inherently risky (even when it is the right thing to do). So don’t give them the open door to say NO. Instead, tell them what you are doing and why. It meets their desire for information intake (you never want to surprise your boss). But, without asking for permission you don’t burden them with actually making a decision. Additionally, this does something extra brilliant. If they don’t say NO, then they have implicitly supported the idea and have also accepted the risk of implementing it. They didn’t have to say YES or NO, but in their silence they actually said YES!
By the way, this only works repeatedly if you have done your homework and the ideas don’t result in a large downside (actual or perceived). Thus, prepare well or the spigot of implicit YESES will be shut for good. Feed Your Team, Feed the Beast, Feed Their Ego, and Feed Yourself Wins! These four techniques will allow you to provide the best possible conditions for success even with a toxic or unsupportive boss.
* John

| | | | **Teichert in the Trenches**
---
| Washington, DC
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
| You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter.
---

---

name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy Holidays! I hope this message finds you and your family safe and healthy.

The holiday season brings us all together to celebrate the love of our families and the strength of our communities as we reflect on our blessings. No matter what your holiday traditions are, I hope you get to enjoy them with your loved ones.

Thank you for your steadfast friendship and support all these years. I wish you and your family a safe, restful, and happy holiday season.

Warmest regards,
Raja

Vice President JD Vance has had **_ENOUGH_** of Democrats and deep-state puppets smearing Pete Hegseth's good name. "The effort to tank Hegseth's nomination is one of the most coordinated smear campaigns I've ever seen in DC." \- JD Vance. The reason Dems want Pete Hegseth gone is because they're **_TERRIFIED_** of a Defense Secretary who is strong, fearless, and would lead an America-First Military. As we speak, deep-state bureaucrats are spreading heinous lies about Pete Hegseth; defaming his character and his family in an attempt to tear him **_DOWN_** and make him **_WITHDRAW_** his nomination. **The America-Last Left 's petition to DESTROY PETE HEGSETH has reached MILLIONS OF SIGNATURES seemingly overnight.** If we let Pete Hegseth **_FALL_** to the **_WOKE MOB_** - they'll be **_NOTHING_** stopping them from going after President Trump, his **_ENTIRE_** administration, and eventually **_YOU._** [With such little time until inauguration day, we've organized a counter petition to STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f4a554a1c8df444ca4abbe279000059a&_e=M9T_Vr-S1Q5Y7MK2JfWsbzAJ3Hd_6b_QD_EhkLpyQrCEdyvLCxnjTGgaZg5r5kN0DWrD6sudtBo-K8KOTY1VEDO_9flZFUBSxyoWxT-yJI-KtPsOyZMUSU5dypVA6P82JVHWp3Q7fl3_w7pkbQ5iLhxl4t7wBGLDjrbax1MwM8nvbul-5IjKXi0pJcTFJFJ0IkxGyTB5W68E2-3JTYXAwa9qmnmKinR6rY8fXo3QUJ5wJqf61cRUfxVBi4ASVWwkuPC6Qh-24Jn6A1tdzlufLAy_gJE3RN5Oc1QzLF4cWAmit-ED1kk0SN36fQL0nh_IsDIU2kVvdWIEkbLU8seVAIhon0fmQ4hUXPjYW1PMDE-mav7GAUHbIasehw46wS_y-awvGwfKd-FR7zW-gMlI5C2LqcXudSTs-v9uIezlmHNzZ2s0pKioB-BiwE-qj_UIrUfEuo4gAvzJbGja8HAURg%3D%3D)

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Across all levels of government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The races listed below aren't all, folks. School boards, county officials, judges for lower state courts and county counts... the list goes on. We need to fight for our right to vote up and down our government, up and down the ballot, and not just focus on Congress or who is president.
Team, state legislatures start in less than three weeks, these special elections are coming up fast, and our efforts to defend voting rights across the board depend on you. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121724_1&amount=25] RUSH $25 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to fight everywhere our right to vote is threatened >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121724_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121724_1&amount=25]
Team,
2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot:
* Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives

* Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate
* Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges

* All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates

* All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly

* State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward

* 10 major Mayoral races in big cities
And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts, which is why we have our goal of raising $50,000 from grassroots donors in December to help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend voting rights when state legislative sessions start in just a few weeks.
Team: Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us prepare for these important elections, fight for voting rights in state legislatures, and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=121724_1&amount=25]

clean_body: The races listed below aren't all, folks. School boards, county officials, judges for lower state courts and county counts... the list goes on. We need to fight for our right to vote up and down our government, up and down the ballot, and not just focus on Congress or who is president. Team, state legislatures start in less than three weeks, these special elections are coming up fast, and our efforts to defend voting rights across the board depend on you. [] RUSH $25 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to fight everywhere our right to vote is threatened >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Team, 2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot: Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward * 10 major Mayoral races in big cities And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts, which is why we have our goal of raising $50,000 from grassroots donors in December to help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend voting rights when state legislative sessions start in just a few weeks. name: COURIER
subject: WaPo, LA Times, Meta, and ABC bow to Trump
body:
After a disastrous 2024, the legacy media is desperate to curry favor with Trump.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98842648/517998860/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTA5ZTBmOTQtOTFiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HSL3XZqw9T_-C_KQ68Aa3DgPgk4GEvn9WWO7VErx91I=&emci=839e0f94-91bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=909e0f94-91bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
Throughout his 2024 campaign, Donald Trump openly declared war on the free press. He threatened to jail reporters, revoke media licenses, and punish anyone who dared to challenge him. He weaponized his right-wing media army—on platforms like Elon Musk’s X—to harass journalists and silence dissent.
The cracks in the legacy media’s resolve showed even before Trump won. Under pressure from owner Jeff Bezos, _The Washington Post_ pulled its endorsement of Kamala Harris, seemingly out of fear of Trump’s retaliation.
**Now, with Trump set to take office, legacy media outlets aren’t just capitulating—they’re actively working to avoid his wrath, even at the cost of democracy. **
[**If you’re ready to help build a progressive media network that refuses to cave to Trump’s intimidation, can you chip in $25 now to help COURIER hold power accountable?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98842649/517998861/-593472309?refcode=20241217-EM-MediaTrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTA5ZTBmOTQtOTFiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HSL3XZqw9T_-C_KQ68Aa3DgPgk4GEvn9WWO7VErx91I=)
Here’s what capitulating looks like in practice:
* **LA Times:** An opinion columnist resigned after the publisher pledged to “balance” coverage by hiring Trump ally Scott Jennings to the editorial board.
* **Meta:** Mark Zuckerberg, once a vocal advocate for immigrant rights, visited Trump at Mar-a-Lago and pledged $1 million to Trump’s inauguration fund.
* **Amazon/Washington Post:** After blocking _The Washington Post_ ’s endorsement of Harris, Jeff Bezos doubled down by pledging $1 million to Trump’s inauguration.
* **ABC News:** The network baffled legal experts by settling a $15 million defamation claim with Trump over comments George Stephanopoulos made about Trump’s sexual assault civil case.

Instead of standing up to Trump’s authoritarian tactics, the media is showing that intimidation works—rewarding his threats, emboldening his behavior, and abandoning their duty to hold power accountable and protect democracy.
**COURIER is different.**
We don’t answer to billionaires or cave to fascist threats. Our national team and state-based newsrooms work tirelessly to expose far-right lies and deliver fact-based reporting to the communities most vulnerable to right-wing propaganda. And we do it all without paywalls, ensuring that truth is accessible to everyone.
[**Your contributions power truthful reporting, fact-checking, and issue coverage in battleground states—stories the legacy media won’t tell. If we’re going to build a progressive media alternative that stands up to Trump’s authoritarian agenda, chip in $25 now to support COURIER’s mission.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98842651/517998863/-593472309?refcode=20241217-EM-MediaTrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTA5ZTBmOTQtOTFiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HSL3XZqw9T_-C_KQ68Aa3DgPgk4GEvn9WWO7VErx91I=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: After a disastrous 2024, the legacy media is desperate to curry favor with Trump. Peter – Throughout his 2024 campaign, Donald Trump openly declared war on the free press. He threatened to jail reporters, revoke media licenses, and punish anyone who dared to challenge him. He weaponized his right-wing media army—on platforms like Elon Musk’s X—to harass journalists and silence dissent. The cracks in the legacy media’s resolve showed even before Trump won. Under pressure from owner Jeff Bezos, The Washington Post pulled its endorsement of Kamala Harris, seemingly out of fear of Trump’s retaliation. Now, with Trump set to take office, legacy media outlets aren’t just capitulating—they’re actively working to avoid his wrath, even at the cost of democracy. = Here’s what capitulating looks like in practice: LA Times: An opinion columnist resigned after the publisher pledged to “balance” coverage by hiring Trump ally Scott Jennings to the editorial board. Meta: Mark Zuckerberg, once a vocal advocate for immigrant rights, visited Trump at Mar-a-Lago and pledged $1 million to Trump’s inauguration fund. Amazon/Washington Post: After blocking The Washington Post ’s endorsement of Harris, Jeff Bezos doubled down by pledging $1 million to Trump’s inauguration. ABC News: The network baffled legal experts by settling a $15 million defamation claim with Trump over comments George Stephanopoulos made about Trump’s sexual assault civil case. Instead of standing up to Trump’s authoritarian tactics, the media is showing that intimidation works—rewarding his threats, emboldening his behavior, and abandoning their duty to hold power accountable and protect democracy. COURIER is different. We don’t answer to billionaires or cave to fascist threats. Our national team and state-based newsrooms work tirelessly to expose far-right lies and deliver fact-based reporting to the communities most vulnerable to right-wing propaganda. And we do it all without paywalls, ensuring that truth is accessible to everyone. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Faraway agencies grant Harris County landlords millions in tax cuts,** " Houston Chronicle's **Yilun Cheng** -- "Three faraway Texas government agencies [have quietly erased](https://substack.com/redirect/d8dbed8f-06c4-46d2-98bd-58226527a151?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) $635 million in property value from Harris County's tax rolls, resulting in over $10 million in lost revenues every year for services such as schools, police and hospitals.

Public facility corporations (PFCs) and housing finance corporations (HFCs) are two [once-obscure programs](https://substack.com/redirect/13ba501b-d792-4e59-b246-d28568fa9407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) designed to spur affordable housing development. Empowered by state law, they allow apartment developers to get 100% property tax breaks in exchange for marking some units as "affordable" - a term so loosely defined that it often [results in no meaningful rent reductions](https://substack.com/redirect/dd8db1e6-1193-4a97-bd4d-fdd9d43e3fcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

In recent years, shrewd operators have also found a way to profit from what many consider a program loophole. Since 2021, Cameron County, the city of Pleasanton and a tiny public agency in Austin called SH130 Municipal Management District have teamed up with real estate investors to make at least 17 Harris County properties tax-free.

Most of these deals were done in secret, without the knowledge or consent of local officials.

The government agencies that sponsor the tax breaks -- dubbed by some lawmakers as "traveling" PFCs and HFCs -- collect hefty fees of up to $1 million per project.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/1a969528-f1bf-4e45-a645-7c6fd124241d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Meanwhile, Houston-area taxing entities, including Harris County and the Houston Independent School District, stand to lose over $10 million in tax revenue every year for decades to come.

The Houston area is grappling with a severe affordable housing shortage, but these tax deals do little to address it, according to researchers, advocates and officials.

A Chronicle analysis found many participating landlords are on track to save tens of millions in property taxes while creating little to no affordable housing. In one instance, a Houston developer used the tax breaks to quickly increase the value of his apartment complexes, flipping them for a $100 million profit.

"There's no absolutely no political accountability for these projects," said **Heather Way** , a University of Texas law professor and affordable housing expert who has closely studied the programs. "It's a get-rich-quick scheme that's coming on the back of the taxpayers."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/1a969528-f1bf-4e45-a645-7c6fd124241d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In 2023, state legislators passed a law banning government agencies from carrying out PFC projects outside their boundaries. Several lawmakers have also vowed to push for similar restrictions on HFCs next year.

Still, these new laws will not undo existing deals that allowed companies to lock in decades-long tax exemptions for their apartments -- some lasting up to 99 years.

Harris County officials denounced this practice, especially as residents already face [growing tax burdens](https://substack.com/redirect/e5c598ef-fcf4-4c79-9ab9-fdd6d344dd06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

"These exemptions are designed to promote the development of affordable housing in our community," County Attorney **Christian Menefee** said. "However, if bad actors are found to be exploiting these exemptions, my office will not hesitate to investigate and take legal action if necessary."" [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/9beb0353-8ddf-4a75-b8ab-d2288f859413?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Faraway agencies grant Harris County landlords millions in tax cuts, " Houston Chronicle's Yilun Cheng -- "Three faraway Texas government agencies $635 million in property value from Harris County's tax rolls, resulting in over $10 million in lost revenues every year for services such as schools, police and hospitals. Public facility corporations (PFCs) and housing finance corporations (HFCs) are two designed to spur affordable housing development. Empowered by state law, they allow apartment developers to get 100% property tax breaks in exchange for marking some units as "affordable" - a term so loosely defined that it often . In recent years, shrewd operators have also found a way to profit from what many consider a program loophole. Since 2021, Cameron County, the city of Pleasanton and a tiny public agency in Austin called SH130 Municipal Management District have teamed up with real estate investors to make at least 17 Harris County properties tax-free. Most of these deals were done in secret, without the knowledge or consent of local officials. The government agencies that sponsor the tax breaks -- dubbed by some lawmakers as "traveling" PFCs and HFCs -- collect hefty fees of up to $1 million per project. Meanwhile, Houston-area taxing entities, including Harris County and the Houston Independent School District, stand to lose over $10 million in tax revenue every year for decades to come. The Houston area is grappling with a severe affordable housing shortage, but these tax deals do little to address it, according to researchers, advocates and officials. A Chronicle analysis found many participating landlords are on track to save tens of millions in property taxes while creating little to no affordable housing. In one instance, a Houston developer used the tax breaks to quickly increase the value of his apartment complexes, flipping them for a $100 million profit. "There's no absolutely no political accountability for these projects," said Heather Way , a University of Texas law professor and affordable housing expert who has closely studied the programs. "It's a get-rich-quick scheme that's coming on the back of the taxpayers." In 2023, state legislators passed a law banning government agencies from carrying out PFC projects outside their boundaries. Several lawmakers have also vowed to push for similar restrictions on HFCs next year. Still, these new laws will not undo existing deals that allowed companies to lock in decades-long tax exemptions for their apartments -- some lasting up to 99 years. Harris County officials denounced this practice, especially as residents already face . "These exemptions are designed to promote the development of affordable housing in our community," County Attorney Christian Menefee said. "However, if bad actors are found to be exploiting these exemptions, my office will not hesitate to investigate and take legal action if necessary."" ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Empowered by state law, they allow apartment developers to get 100% property tax breaks in exchange for marking some units as “affordable” – a term so loosely defined that it often [results in no meaningful rent reductions](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ls/click?upn=u001.N0I2cGTBbeYYjH4PJAdoho5gzCQdEwwUn5P-2B-2BNx88RqxMQev-2BkrPzndaUUY9W7CnI7tCW3QW-2BqE9ybKgDXmB8dPD-2B60-2Fu2Rs-2Bl29lE2Kkp-2F6Impm-2BdBTQUKt9ReLiMwHkfHm41Z2R3rHP4a7mZR8vV3uPtZrUFTu7r1UDASWGkSTtMR33DEPcMZQloQyCKwrcilobgDWdKcR1cD6PuPPFre3a2BvJRMQ0Q18rG7btj1fVhTz-2FrbhF8jpSFmQvmybCOwoH5u-2FB8amHqcSAldLJcDIVjeKP5hmu4zmhOQzAyvOXySWGwBt0uuoQjkB5VYNNZ4RetIBOFc3yVM5uOhCKU4DVrNfGZeqN3AIcTnRR0kNu8sWd95jC-2Byc489dM4ZtRZp7-2B-2F3VgTLb5G-2B7eebLnCYgf96x8CruZh5kKQ50D-2BBCBOTtiZ-2FLcUCCcW-2BuJXxgax2AmWLZbDjCDPXMIk6T9b1QCOsA1cQm-2F76hiTs9tFGdr6jTO-2BJHGZJcL5yb9NRg4O1GCZGxBzBDB9XPAO8wzrFHehIJ6z0sQdCXKzf7fiQ-3DvvKF_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCjyt8m4QsKpoD-2F5Ea4GDu2AToUgJnH7OSy0kZBj80QIEOunMGTSeSCF22-2FwL9KvTDtvhRUak5zphjjN-2FXe5J6-2BW1bvfcKTGDCReGMi2YP1PPNANHjU0-2BWCKzljkw8qyRWdUsdWt3-2Bxmz-2Fk5NSn3qNsviIXBIEN7lXQ2E2SUau-2BSCmuML4xKy2zcluK4JogM6eeYZoLszEWAPTAsQQIhECkmBcxPHYqYquEXeIL2lAUIeAT8KDCAn-2F5v6rOOHfZSnb7c5h-2B65tqrNAJ7dX8-2FTnNjZNsENUOe1NBNYTdZk9Tr-2F8Sk6nCQvnzloE1lXWX3tTwNaF2jCcAlankTQt4FliWytgfAQ-2FsrGQVhacKRfq8xv3LZ6a2I8QeAfKn4igWRrSkM01zXzkgGABTOR2CZWaa).

In recent years, shrewd operators have also found a way to profit from what many consider a program loophole. Since 2021, Cameron County, the city of Pleasanton and a tiny public agency in Austin called SH130 Municipal Management District have teamed up with real estate investors to make at least 17 Harris County properties tax-free.

Most of these deals were done in secret, without the knowledge or consent of local officials.

The government agencies that sponsor the tax breaks — dubbed by some lawmakers as “traveling” PFCs and HFCs — collect hefty fees of up to $1 million per project.

Meanwhile, Houston-area taxing entities, including Harris County and the Houston Independent School District, stand to lose over $10 million in tax revenue every year for decades to come.

The Houston area is grappling with a severe affordable housing shortage, but these tax deals do little to address it, according to researchers, advocates and officials.

A Chronicle analysis found many participating landlords are on track to save tens of millions in property taxes while creating little to no affordable housing. In one instance, a Houston developer used the tax breaks to quickly increase the value of his apartment complexes, flipping them for a $100 million profit.

“There's no absolutely no political accountability for these projects,” said **Heather Way** , a University of Texas law professor and affordable housing expert who has closely studied the programs. “It’s a get-rich-quick scheme that's coming on the back of the taxpayers.”

In 2023, state legislators passed a law banning government agencies from carrying out PFC projects outside their boundaries. Several lawmakers have also vowed to push for similar restrictions on HFCs next year.

Still, these new laws will not undo existing deals that allowed companies to lock in decades-long tax exemptions for their apartments — some lasting up to 99 years.

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Faraway agencies grant Harris County landlords millions in tax cuts, ” Houston Chronicle's Yilun Cheng — “Three faraway Texas government agencies $635 million in property value from Harris County’s tax rolls, resulting in over $10 million in lost revenues every year for services such as schools, police and hospitals. Public facility corporations (PFCs) and housing finance corporations (HFCs) are two designed to spur affordable housing development. Empowered by state law, they allow apartment developers to get 100% property tax breaks in exchange for marking some units as “affordable” – a term so loosely defined that it often . In recent years, shrewd operators have also found a way to profit from what many consider a program loophole. Since 2021, Cameron County, the city of Pleasanton and a tiny public agency in Austin called SH130 Municipal Management District have teamed up with real estate investors to make at least 17 Harris County properties tax-free. Most of these deals were done in secret, without the knowledge or consent of local officials. The government agencies that sponsor the tax breaks — dubbed by some lawmakers as “traveling” PFCs and HFCs — collect hefty fees of up to $1 million per project. » Meanwhile, Houston-area taxing entities, including Harris County and the Houston Independent School District, stand to lose over $10 million in tax revenue every year for decades to come. The Houston area is grappling with a severe affordable housing shortage, but these tax deals do little to address it, according to researchers, advocates and officials. A Chronicle analysis found many participating landlords are on track to save tens of millions in property taxes while creating little to no affordable housing. In one instance, a Houston developer used the tax breaks to quickly increase the value of his apartment complexes, flipping them for a $100 million profit. “There's no absolutely no political accountability for these projects,” said Heather Way , a University of Texas law professor and affordable housing expert who has closely studied the programs. “It’s a get-rich-quick scheme that's coming on the back of the taxpayers.” » In 2023, state legislators passed a law banning government agencies from carrying out PFC projects outside their boundaries. Several lawmakers have also vowed to push for similar restrictions on HFCs next year. Still, these new laws will not undo existing deals that allowed companies to lock in decades-long tax exemptions for their apartments — some lasting up to 99 years. Harris County officials denounced this practice, especially as residents already face . “These exemptions are designed to promote the development of affordable housing in our community,” County Attorney Christian Menefee said. “However, if bad actors are found to be exploiting these exemptions, my office will not hesitate to investigate and take legal action if necessary."" We’re pushing for transformative changes that help everyday families not only survive, but thrive. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWR8Fr7aAgIgmBBciENL8nCVcHMoYmyFM1caXPMT_vb9IBFHPp_zTnmaGDFPDUWA0iRor0MOqh31qyV_G6aH-L8b8yesuPKt_lApM5ktG0ol9Xxm8jJ2RdVqrPTiLLCudCpm2BQ30j4fpvm_1iAlxsNC4atWy3yWzLHlr-bRzLb5Zm_P7Aesun4PlydQtVR4hj_80FZDQBCvgZQopKDOfAmA/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h0/h001.7L_NqmVKUYgKnwrh6jKbHYBd3Oz7y1QnPtPXgoUpgWM)

Friend, I’ve been honored to fight for Palestinian human rights alongside New York State Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani, including joining him last November as he led a hunger strike for a permanent ceasefire in front of the White House. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0Vnigeety8ZNfO_iLHaB28awGu3unkoTLAPo2uTtKkZ-1tDPtGYkGZwNdKHHY53GnqVnUFpeMXLVdGVOFy1fA7f88Far4dVep8Rouzoh48bT9E3xxm4pYKkhqP0YQ0DEJl-hcqM3VWbF3TD629NITt7Ypyum0VBfv3tHc4ll5C24XUDcR2iTAqr4xiuREb6OAB2QDhwIQGG1PKQwwa98HNqta_l92yFFJha07uDNT2fGxXs_ZH6aO4UtQ3oItEJJkj_8fpvz-SgfFT64xEmpYrcvIWlcxAMS5M77GxZjsBHxw7p535vXqDXE2ec1bZsH7UoVqHTifXJf4NeXcAe5PueU/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h1/h001.e_5JsUzABDkZ-v3PJ5d05qynqJv6R10TrZz4GwJMQI4) **Zohran is a champion in the interconnected struggle to save lives at home and abroad. Now he’s running for New York City mayor, an office that represents more people than most senators do.** As is the case across the country, more than half of all families in New York City are struggling or unable to cover basic expenses—with rent and childcare as the two biggest costs. So Zohran is proposing bold changes like starting city-owned grocery stores that operate without a profit motive, to provide city residents with much more affordable groceries. **Zohran’s transformative agenda includes free buses, a rent freeze for over 2 million New Yorkers, and universal childcare for residents.** Unlike many elected officials, Zohran understands how urgently people need change. He’s working toward a city and a world where everyone can live a dignified life, regardless of background, identity, or zip code. [**Will you split a donation today between my and Zohran Mamdani’s campaigns to save lives at home and abroad?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0VlEYhylHfs3lDqMMNG94M08eO8l-BjrzicgRQho9u0cZI3kQU8BFmlxSOKOdhoMbg7mnBlNiPk8ZOn0-ygAXvxolghKHEOPzz8h15SJ1pHGt10ZVyu5yN5dbWlEwHipGKRA2zGzM00cU3MvIfC9nOSY6LgEOlejxMyQFX_4rBwTTnIt44Qy89q13XgnYV7VyhSGsdBG_nNtK7EolUkP6oW1A9Y_T-nzunHnIVemsKLiN5gmh3h6gMIDP7RB5P05A8wTlvNwQMAahgvcIN-YSW_5kcIb4SKR8VolMk0rybh0Xj_VN6tX7QlMHH2IddFOpA_AC9ydnf507om9iEpSCZPE/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h2/h001.yHnutVjVmhzAGl7ePsaD_kJ3eCv4EmpH1MxObaaxJeo) | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0Vk6u1c0XVsYKDzFLbQh8WpGhp0jTN0DrOSj3IXlPplsPheV6VeoVx17vf-ZBHhuVdwXWlfjV5KjCbB1DsvSc2Fr3mugey2-k7KoXer8-gNaEbxPY2w52sSyTs0z5jIk6qpzY7Y9I4yLBA0-9yzTG3O1cIUeLIGyxeEk6FwhKWJ662s9Z-ZmZPR2MnYuH3lY9ibAEFhGpEaAjXft1XIb0Un9GJBHoQzvcQFovziBKGnQQEL9vDaqiG3OaE1t4Wux3aLoAvvMoZvDpp7ucjFBGPSPQLvw_lveDBJdLpxlxeTG_mzSODuWEY39SRnW1G3gYVJEkwEIQo9yNdKSBQ6G4XRk/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h3/h001._UmZjas7uunoQsXOCRdoqwNSgbyjSwbN5ERa0WKADGM)

As a state legislator, Zohran introduced the _Not On Our Dime Act_ to stop New York’s charities from funding Israeli settler violence. **Instead of investing in violence, Zohran has won investments in public transportation and much-needed debt relief for workers.**
Zohran and I also recognize the vital importance of unions in the fight for workers’ rights. **While endorsing Zohran for New York City mayor, the United Auto Workers Region 9 said:** “Zohran Mamdani is a movement builder. He lives UAW values in the fight for economic and social justice, both here in NYC and around the globe.”
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0VnlbLykC8EzlVXHyxgHU6fwlixzzbjhSLfQtTkMi6E7jOQV0qtLsDlmk7bjF2GVQkYkTa7ya7VBlQXuPi_jox5uJGpXEQ-mepfm0bhd_6uqyTUkYcgL41mZ3UIkn-mf6W06fSb7382eKCA1fbQxBx7z3APYguEoHs3FdA14s4qkqfAMpeB2txOLfCl4KAt_9XBSIgAfgFM4QL4kLZccuFP5i4PY13EAUd8jROuOe1yq2nAtmY-OQ94neFvTeAbM4y02SYUFnrn3kbXnuLISahfKp9kkHOxClld9sU4xNUozLxhzOMVHOCYqp470hPlv30n9rPFZZQdvkFME4z-Ei85c/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h4/h001.TPdSxsCUyy1udt9MpfmBpZKTUUmyDWMZuAFsiPTzID4)
**We especially need pro-worker leaders like Zohran as we approach Trump’s second presidential term.** Unlike NYC’s current pro-Trump mayor, Zohran made clear: “With a billionaire scab returning to the White House, our city must become a model for addressing the material needs of working people.” This is exactly the leadership we need at all levels of government.
Not only is he a champion for workers, Zohran would also be the city’s first Muslim mayor. He recognizes the value of all life, regardless of background—which is vital in this time of growing dehumanization.
[**Please split a donation today between my and Zohran’s bold campaigns to invest in life rather than corporate profits or genocide. Together we can win transformative changes that help everyday families not only survive, but thrive.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0VuEnYtN6PNjjiowSPB5NuIGRvskYCEY2QmzmdzM50mSGCvqZFnj_nw6J-I_nIVb-czn-ZKBNXIeVXSZGHpbpl4E3NnCcCOkdzr-AKV68OnIIHpzLWOVsMgSRpOD1eCV7k2KiLkcdJhrpgj2FLamq_pzNTfgv6gxRtkP7j8MZ5rFNp4qBKlbMk-MDa2AblLeXL-UB9yOFpOM6AK84ScC0zqf78RpDftgQvF2iPZ3OW7wxj38bD_9DT6Q5p_0czDO2KT7Dl-mVxCPmlGM2ZCnUahtsL3HNlA-ixPcFESlpqucR5hQt-NVHMHRGuTX4npl6I-GlSDLRCGjdXY8-RZiJC4E/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h5/h001.qDN3U-HBFVWD_9Db51QswWua5_kxxb9pVkJAKKluFYs)
