From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Mon, Dec 16, 2024
Subject: Anti-genocide mayoral candidate needs our support
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
I’m proud to protest for human rights alongside fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani. As a New York State Assemblymember, Zohran introduced first-in-the-nation legislation to stop NY charities from funding Israeli war crimes, and last November he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJqlNR6rXIP7wquZneRZn0Vu-cpY_9fJFZ1uU_XIQMQfLNcOxXSSk1hdleTGvtJwvvG3KLmgM9iBuaLidRkH4mspUAvPGT-ZiKAucd6CP0gksRdLq3zsDHnlStIaWj8l7Wc4MOW-CngpSdYYVt09x97nbuBS-uhW4WY-VE9hqmc7hKZHYNv469Rp2gy--ttUoW8_sSRyjQSZRgS-ckWvLBmOUklxPkKrSKsN0WTgPk218fckBuTw3EMa-8NBOl7hrq1y9KsVVFbxH45e3HmYC6IkOS91lY3Uj0DfjE6hY_TJVl8DBj1oIdrI4CNcwGbzklEx7dr4_08hRiP__9GrPr0iBaw_Vn6zQsE1JHFapUJfQ/4cd/BHaEHynHQOi3KE_ICaWw0Q/h12/h001.zjzItpyybdKEaTKkCXEmwS9XJ8n99U0eRQfcrHtYGgI)
**Now Zohran is running for mayor of New York City** , with a bold vision including fast and free buses, freezing rent for more than two million rent stabilized tenants, and universal free childcare for every young resident.
Zohran and I are both committed to helping working families thrive, including pushing back against corporate grocery stores’ price gouging. He recently proposed a plan to start nonprofit city-owned grocery stores that sell groceries at much more affordable prices, saying: **“The job of city government isn’t to tinker around the edges while one in four children across our city go hungry.”**
That’s the kind of energy we need at all levels of government, and because **the mayor of NYC represents more people than the vast majority of U.S. senators do** , this position plays a huge role in national politics. Zohran has already started a door-to-door canvassing operation in preparation for the June 2025 Democratic primary election. He doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs and needs grassroots donations to help show strong early support for his visionary campaign.

Throughout his career Zohran has fought for the working class, including hunger striking alongside taxi drivers to achieve more than $450 million in transformative debt relief, winning over $100 million in the state budget for increased subway service and a successful fare-free bus pilot, and organizing New Yorkers to defeat a proposed dirty power plant.
As Zohran said, **“This campaign is for every person who believes in the dignity of their neighbors and that the government's job is to actually make our lives better.”** We deserve a government that works for the people, not just billionaires.
Meanwhile, NYC’s current mayor has praised Trump, sent police to attack pro-Palestine student protesters, and will face a trial in the spring after being indicted for corruption. And a potential NYC mayoral candidate is currently working with Trump’s lawyer to defend Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu from the International Criminal Court’s charges of war crimes. In response to this news, Zohran said: “We need a mayor focused on the cost of living crisis, not defending a genocide.”
In this time when dehumanization endangers our communities and lawmakers are trying to criminalize protesters for exercising their First Amendment rights, we need more elected leaders who will stand up for our rights and see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity.

clean_body: We’re pushing for transformative changes that help everyday families not only survive, but thrive. | | | Friend, I’ve been honored to fight for Palestinian human rights alongside New York State Assemblymember Zohran Mamdani, including joining him last November as he led a hunger strike for a permanent ceasefire in front of the White House. Zohran is a champion in the interconnected struggle to save lives at home and abroad. Now he’s running for New York City mayor, an office that represents more people than most senators do. As is the case across the country, more than half of all families in New York City are struggling or unable to cover basic expenses—with rent and childcare as the two biggest costs. So Zohran is proposing bold changes like starting city-owned grocery stores that operate without a profit motive, to provide city residents with much more affordable groceries. Zohran’s transformative agenda includes free buses, a rent freeze for over 2 million New Yorkers, and universal childcare for residents. Unlike many elected officials, Zohran understands how urgently people need change. He’s working toward a city and a world where everyone can live a dignified life, regardless of background, identity, or zip code. | As a state legislator, Zohran introduced the Not On Our Dime Act to stop New York’s charities from funding Israeli settler violence. Instead of investing in violence, Zohran has won investments in public transportation and much-needed debt relief for workers. Zohran and I also recognize the vital importance of unions in the fight for workers’ rights. While endorsing Zohran for New York City mayor, the United Auto Workers Region 9 said: “Zohran Mamdani is a movement builder. He lives UAW values in the fight for economic and social justice, both here in NYC and around the globe.” We especially need pro-worker leaders like Zohran as we approach Trump’s second presidential term. Unlike NYC’s current pro-Trump mayor, Zohran made clear: “With a billionaire scab returning to the White House, our city must become a model for addressing the material needs of working people.” This is exactly the leadership we need at all levels of government. Not only is he a champion for workers, Zohran would also be the city’s first Muslim mayor. He recognizes the value of all life, regardless of background—which is vital in this time of growing dehumanization. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Zohran for NYC. | | | | | | | | | Thank you for continuing to demand better from our government and pushing for the bold changes we need. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Mon, Dec 16, 2024 Subject: Anti-genocide mayoral candidate needs our support To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m proud to protest for human rights alongside fellow democratic socialist Zohran Mamdani. As a New York State Assemblymember, Zohran introduced first-in-the-nation legislation to stop NY charities from funding Israeli war crimes, and last November he led a hunger strike in front of the White House demanding a permanent ceasefire. Now Zohran is running for mayor of New York City , with a bold vision including fast and free buses, freezing rent for more than two million rent stabilized tenants, and universal free childcare for every young resident. Zohran and I are both committed to helping working families thrive, including pushing back against corporate grocery stores’ price gouging. He recently proposed a plan to start nonprofit city-owned grocery stores that sell groceries at much more affordable prices, saying: “The job of city government isn’t to tinker around the edges while one in four children across our city go hungry.” That’s the kind of energy we need at all levels of government, and because the mayor of NYC represents more people than the vast majority of U.S. senators do , this position plays a huge role in national politics. Zohran has already started a door-to-door canvassing operation in preparation for the June 2025 Democratic primary election. He doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs and needs grassroots donations to help show strong early support for his visionary campaign. Note: People can donate up to $2,100 to Zohran’s campaign, and if you’re a New York City resident, the first $250 of your donation to Zohran will be matched 8 times thanks to the city’s public campaign finance program. Throughout his career Zohran has fought for the working class, including hunger striking alongside taxi drivers to achieve more than $450 million in transformative debt relief, winning over $100 million in the state budget for increased subway service and a successful fare-free bus pilot, and organizing New Yorkers to defeat a proposed dirty power plant. As Zohran said, “This campaign is for every person who believes in the dignity of their neighbors and that the government's job is to actually make our lives better.” We deserve a government that works for the people, not just billionaires. Meanwhile, NYC’s current mayor has praised Trump, sent police to attack pro-Palestine student protesters, and will face a trial in the spring after being indicted for corruption. And a potential NYC mayoral candidate is currently working with Trump’s lawyer to defend Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu from the International Criminal Court’s charges of war crimes. In response to this news, Zohran said: “We need a mayor focused on the cost of living crisis, not defending a genocide.” In this time when dehumanization endangers our communities and lawmakers are trying to criminalize protesters for exercising their First Amendment rights, we need more elected leaders who will stand up for our rights and see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Zohran for NYC. | | | | | | | | | Thank you for continuing to build a better world for all people. [Just go to this page to bid on lunch with Andrew Yang](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=5) and [this page to bid on lunch with Governor Whitman](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=6) and make a pledge. Whoever makes the highest pledge before 12/19 at 5 pm will win the chance for lunch! If you aren't the winning pledge, you won't have to donate the amount you pledged (but we would appreciate anything you can chip in, anyway!).
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=7 "Register Today!") ---
**Save the Date:_Looking Backward, Moving Forward_ End-of-Year Appreciation Event!**
Mark your calendars for our End-of-Year Appreciation event on **December 18th at 7:15**! This will be a special opportunity to:
* Celebrate what we’ve achieved together in 2024.
* Share our plans for building momentum in 2025.
* Hear from the leaders of the movement how you can have the biggest impact in 2025.

More details about the event are coming soon, but for now, register so you don't forget this opportunity to reflect on the year and hear about the one ahead—we can’t wait to see you there!
**Support us into the next year!**
To help build momentum into 2025, we've launched a big fundraising push! Two donors have committed to a **$20,000 match in December!***** That means every dollar you donate will count double (until we hit $20,000 raised)!
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=8 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=8)
---
Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this year such a success. We’re excited to see what we can accomplish together in 2025—and we hope to celebrate with you on December 18th!
With Thanks,
The Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=9)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=10)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=11)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=12)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_third_send&n=13)

The lunch with Andrew Yang would take place in New York City. The lunch with Governor Whitman would take place in Arizona. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoaxv4CkNgKVSaJxmTzaGtkx3irjl711wNJZYENqpI68tDCljq9jbera5unu_Z92CKYoevU-osStnKp_h_nHugnVsPOAvfOIIX7b_CWpfrOUo2BBdijwjsP8w5F8Lh8pw8cCxk3WpDS8KrQSN9q9q2hp4w%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoax_htS9BfWaCEl_HbAU67VD3RgjyZp2O82jIyGXQ-fQWZvrxkTbr_Qz5ZeVPZPzaQrO9AkMknFlNaXBv2fdCF7YXiGdBsMamWlUd0iTm6Ke0RTR2CJwhLdprVaanNFTLc3UBy0KlTrC6pBX0vqMIfAYQ%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoaxiuCsAv3lobw-kRyfzPOhsDissaa7WcaLTsE-Y3ZF0JW2jT8XiXDdmxUITYFAj80ZGsGyGdQcI6V4pD-MfwENb33vluLcefn1BytOHRqFJu-n9wqhZU7Vtwx85eVdPacBMFhZtqQCzHiFrrAx2Lg5ag%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoaxRN2F4yV8ms_2ydAha9OVEK-DRhufkTT_atZTkDfLxRGg3BCRkU8G0fN65JZY1UitzK2T6BWVOL0bsDcsVztdOO2WFKDrw0c3WmWDjw9hIhqc5KWJEKNlk1596Ci-MOxmStwAkB0gfumcDLiqO6E6ig%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoaxhOkPMAEIvSDwjrWDifUhy0nl4Edan9-1-rK7VIdImVwPluVgKfGZJWbPBX3FV3M1rr9yCHdDqu3dawsWSUgeaYla6KDZBJQ5qo_D0Ky3r6HkucvQWqr1-R-QdVaP4d1izlQCxf9WvAQ0MbH-jYVFvg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoaxhRNJAdlRdBi-ROZnm6qKoxvELTs-Z68CqStOgQ879ELAB7dKZbSvTqCtvd68_Ssz5yCtfV7F33HrNa8-cvKg7-7zziP069E560XFH2hhWiABM5KSzRh4nZK4DgFbQGBtBIRYMyW5PFxOqjPsbGwuRQ%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | [ **DONATE **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=59ec27c0b4144636bec60bb05d815dd7&_e=-fv0W_55OYJ29_QN649V8N_W4G6GxSTpTIxw6g2LLIYhDRrIrm1GL7tIcAb016C1M04j5b0bdqBXuASn9Nr5TYR5PPhVeMcHLrTz8RlyMNzroG-z_SALMMr1Qv6cUE7eoTuJ7eIqdLfNkJIlA_qtZZB9_vuWWLqaogFGmz1LDv9L3VliKdWdjSTHuAcFwX64oGatO0hGMRvVmyDxNUq2I433JbfHo3lSasssvVhTL-2RT_ihf0OzeuwaKCMURoaxJ11bWEpY2PHOrwM8u65NVFKnR0uy2y_BPatid5vHQdHBURKmOq32st-h8AP_GsGrnN-HXMb33uUk8sZDbIIwXljcYnBLG7Gctgs6esAps8Fk6tTq8PTHhUVRx6zOyAr46cUQV0rzdWMWVKNC4duODg%3D%3D)

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Let’s protect Oregon’s values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Oregonians know how to stand up for the things we care about. We want elected officials who protect access to reproductive health care. We want to strengthen environmental protections and fight against the dangers of climate change. We believe in protecting the rights of our immigrant communities. We center civil rights and equity in our policymaking. And we always lead with compassion and care for our neighbors and fellow Oregonians. **These are the values that guided my latest budget, which provides the resources we’ll need to protect Oregon from attacks we may face from Washington, D.C.** I’m working to gather support for my proposals with signatures from this team. name: John Rich
subject: This is an unusual favor, but I have to ask you
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c59f368c838d4b67983cb366a0aa5c2b&_e=_CmXeOMwD6cNMkb5TvDmjdbxfa517-vl_qmObHDlWaurccVA24aa3VElCf5CYeeFICZdz5KY1M2NTg0oIndJdwB6ml68VLfK6RA5brh6z2x4w_N0vVtCgb8XVD5LLpEKPfOZ6FL3VUGuO0LPnFqzBnyFSZxxEOU8pP473jyIdCYDZ9q4iXZwgSDxxmrCoB6C45E41JY0nAQdvi-0gPqrIyDccL1ShfIqyz4L7wKfp9zCHlXXIYGwKUpcxbZzaeJfwYAdgYVeh25TBMX7of32cdk7OWV3OC-RjEhd-uDNUHRGhe52DXmFuXyuOfVI87YMLybgr2GmL7YWxsB1yro4JN3iqM11oRWic85Qp848nIuWKeo3SdTfcuvv3x16sieKJEu5HvzbgDNkviaceKa-Yw%3D%3D "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Peter,

Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools.

But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?"

It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help).
It's not even school boards.
It's Scholastic Book Fairs.

Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like _Where the Red Fern Grows_ , _Huckleberry Finn_ , and other classics.

clean_body: "SkyTree Book Fairs" Peter, Remember when the FBI declared parents angry at school boards for inappropriate books were terrorists? Parents were rightfully angry at what they saw in schools. But have you ever wondered, "Who is putting these inappropriate books in schools for kids?" It's not Woke teachers (although they don't help). It's not even school boards. It's Scholastic Book Fairs. Now, you are probably like me. You may have fond memories of book fairs by Scholastic in your youth. You may have gotten a hold of books like Where the Red Fern Grows , Huckleberry Finn , and other classics. Scholastic is now promoting books like Welcome to St. Hell , which promotes trans ideology to kids. SkyTree Book Fairs offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic. Here's how you can help. SkyTree Book Fairs are already operating in schools to provide wholesome content for families. They are spreading across the entire country, and I wanted to share some photos of their recent events with you. SkyTree will bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. I once said if a teacher is doing their job correctly, you should never know about their politics, details of their personal life, or cultural stances. It's the same with our kids' literature. Thank you, and God bless, John Rich SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. |

name: DNC HQ
subject: $3 (not a typo!)
body:
We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $3 really do?”
---
Derek, this is an important request: Can you pitch in $3 to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back against the MAGA agenda? No, that’s not a typo! **Just $3.** We get it. You might be thinking, “How much can $3 _really_ do?” when Trump and his Republican-controlled Congress have billionaires behind them. **But it’s not just your $3.** It’s $3 from a single mom in Minnesota, $3 from a nurse in South Carolina, $3 from a small business owner in Nevada — millions of $3 donations coming together to power our grassroots movement. So Derek, we’re asking you to join your fellow Democrats in this fight. Because when we all pitch in, we can take on Project 2025, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend our democracy by ensuring we hold Trump and his administration accountable. [**Will you give $3 (or more!) to ensure we win local and statewide races next year, take back Congress in the next election, and the White House in 2028? name: Jennifer Jenkins
subject: The Michael Jordan of book bans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Educated
body:
| | | [](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=6f409baa7b4a45048ed55c0bda660dfe&_e=ZEQR7ovw63l6XF1Cm3urZTMnicUrhqAp1HUpUKPTC5sslMrNBeBVzHIb8WaAXO2YnF06pJyy4o1ftSSXn8PdQgZ_Ak1Ams61b9KkLlfb2s-5Jhl3eDYYcSbYT0K7g8hP_VKEaZYkPZhdhGJ1oCVAMH2riSOnzV2f67YrTL_1ZTkU1wCzTJ9oQCLIdPfYcdB7sskVDq6HYUzigDDOeyI8BgPXfqMesYvMtiOu-hStzntWIeupt8bYN6b4l6qPzwzbZa7itLTapn5__RYRpczrwPHiO9O0uHXr0JAcoDttl4Xcqq21NfQDvmmZgI52Inuw_JiHxosczOnZ2mIy7OWySAeNmHubtbjhy4m4zKDgNJRU1evguKjF-BC6fHf9ki3W-KwY5LVCOgGMSGKKExMwXRrNOuSpDydG8vCWPNxmT8wIGdpgTuli6WYcNi3ARNTZ) Peter, Last week, The Daily Show highlighted a disturbing trend in Florida: our state leads the nation in banning books from public schools. One man, Bruce Friedman—dubbed the "Michael Jordan of book banning"—**has personally challenged over 900 books in just two years.** That’s literally a pace of challenging more than one book per day. Friedman isn’t just targeting explicit material. He’s gone after children’s books like _Star Wars_ graphic novels because they feature an alien that didn’t advertise whether it was male or female. Classics like _The Handmaid’s Tale_ and _I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings_ have also been pulled from school shelves under Florida’s extreme censorship laws. The truth is, these book bans aren’t just about content—they’re about control. Now, parents are beginning to speak out about the fact that they don’t want strangers telling them how to parent their kids. But Friedman's relentless attacks—and the laws pushed by Moms for Liberty, Governor DeSantis, and Florida's GOP—are limiting those opportunities for our kids. [**We can fight back, but we need your help. Will you rush a donation to Educated We Stand to help us raise $9,000 by Monday night to oppose book bans and all who support them?**](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=6f409baa7b4a45048ed55c0bda660dfe&_e=ZEQR7ovw63l6XF1Cm3urZTMnicUrhqAp1HUpUKPTC5sslMrNBeBVzHIb8WaAXO2YnF06pJyy4o1ftSSXn8PdQgZ_Ak1Ams61b9KkLlfb2s-5Jhl3eDYYcSbYT0K7g8hP_VKEaZYkPZhdhGJ1oCVAMH2riSOnzV2f67YrTL_1ZTkU1wCzTJ9oQCLIdPfYcdB7sskVDq6HYUzigDDOeyI8BgPXfqMesYvMtiOu-hStzntWIeupt8bYN6b4l6qPzwzbZa7itLTapn5__RYRpczrwEjUM2IlQVtJ0C4Zb7FJGjgX9iPvP1D5tKz37qNKX0jyS6zijLQ6-ojU_ObMyYGiK_K9sdf8wsynRbX9ouN88DdtqqwNQJsKh_qUw10rS1YWcqxmNT7H-xfYSNHLUGF1XuFoCbwKW2sn04uh684h3dJUlqj3mut0-oUdlBPIiFi6) Every dollar you contribute helps us elect school board members in Florida and across the country who believe in education, not censorship. clean_body: | | | Peter, Last week, The Daily Show highlighted a disturbing trend in Florida: our state leads the nation in banning books from public schools. One man, Bruce Friedman—dubbed the "Michael Jordan of book banning"—has personally challenged over 900 books in just two years. That’s literally a pace of challenging more than one book per day. Friedman isn’t just targeting explicit material. He’s gone after children’s books like Star Wars graphic novels because they feature an alien that didn’t advertise whether it was male or female. Classics like The Handmaid’s Tale and I Know Why the Caged Bird Sings have also been pulled from school shelves under Florida’s extreme censorship laws. The truth is, these book bans aren’t just about content—they’re about control. Now, parents are beginning to speak out about the fact that they don’t want strangers telling them how to parent their kids. But Friedman's relentless attacks—and the laws pushed by Moms for Liberty, Governor DeSantis, and Florida's GOP—are limiting those opportunities for our kids. Every dollar you contribute helps us elect school board members in Florida and across the country who believe in education, not censorship. Let’s ensure our kids have access to a variety of perspectives, not just the narrow worldview of one man, one party, or one ideology. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Together, we can put a stop to this dangerous trend. In solidarity, Jennifer Jenkins Educated We Stand ** Paid for by Educated. We Stand. **

name: Dyneco Gibson
subject: Join us this Thursday for an Exclusive Virtual Townhall on December 19th
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| | Good Afternoon, Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our rights and freedoms remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “**Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall.”** **When: Thursday, December 19, 2024 ****Time: 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOM****Invited Speakers:** Confirmed speakers are Keith Thirion, interim co-president, vice-president of Strategy at Alliance for Justice, Mohan Seshadri, executive director at the Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance, and Kadida Kenner, founding CEO at New Pennsylvania Project. It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts to ensure they remain fair and independent. In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025’s judicial elections. Conversely, federal judges are nominated and confirmed for lifetime appointments. Their rulings have an expansive impact on our daily lives. Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement. We look forward to seeing you.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Good Afternoon, Are you asking yourself how together we can continue to defend democracy and ensure our rights and freedoms remain intact? If the answer is yes, we would like to invite you to join “Why Courts Matter 101, a Virtual Townhall.” When: Thursday, December 19, 2024 Time: 6:30-8:00PM on ZOOMInvited Speakers: Confirmed speakers are Keith Thirion, interim co-president, vice-president of Strategy at Alliance for Justice, Mohan Seshadri, executive director at the Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance, and Kadida Kenner, founding CEO at New Pennsylvania Project. It’s important that our communities are fully informed about the importance of our state and federal courts to ensure they remain fair and independent. In 2025, Pennsylvania will elect judges and justices in partisan elections, and participate in nonpartisan judicial retention elections, including three PA Supreme Court seats. A more civically engaged electorate is more likely to turn out to vote in PA’s 2025’s judicial elections. Conversely, federal judges are nominated and confirmed for lifetime appointments. Their rulings have an expansive impact on our daily lives. Please register at the link below, and invite a friend. We need more people to join the movement. We look forward to seeing you. | | When: Thursday, December 19thTime: 6:30-8:00pmWhere: via ZOOM Zoom Registration Link: | In Solidarity, Dyneco Gibson Director of Campaigns and Engagementdyneco@newpaproject.org ; (717) 847-1201 The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4) non profit organization, contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | |

name: M4A-Bernie via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: The answer isn't privatization, it's Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Elon Musk
and Donald Trump are preparing giant cuts to critical government programs
— all to benefit billionaires at the expense of everyday Americans. Bernie
isn’t just going to let that happen and neither are we.

When Musk complained about high healthcare costs, Bernie had an answer:
Medicare for All.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20713?t=1011&akid=7407%2E5885482%2EIsXYF_ ][IMG]

On healthcare, Elon Musk asks, “Shouldn’t the American people be getting
their money’s worth?” Our response is a resounding YES — Medicare for All
would save over $600 billion per year AND save lives. Bernie is grabbing
the reins of the narrative and pushing for the real answer to the deadly,
for-profit American health care system.

Musk wants to cut out administrative middlemen? Great, get rid of private
insurance middlemen and create a single payer system focused on actual
healthcare not enriching CEOs and generating obscene profits that push
Americans into medical debt.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20698?source=email-20241217&t=1012&akid=7407%2E5885482%2EIsXYF_ ]Sign on to show support for Bernie’s Medicare for All today and please
chip in a donation. We must use these moments to make the case loudly.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20698?source=email-20241217&t=1013&akid=7407%2E5885482%2EIsXYF_ ]STAND WITH BERNIE

Musk and Trump’s answers always seem to involve cutting things Americans
need and giving away billions to private companies. That’s exactly what’s
happening with Medicare Advantage.

If Musk wants to cut wasteful spending in healthcare, he should cut
Medicare Advantage — the privatization scheme that massively inflates
administrative costs and the profits of health insurance corporations.
This is why Our Revolution is also mounting a vocal campaign to block
Trump’s appointment of Dr. Oz to lead (and destroy) Medicare.

Bernie is taking the reins of the public discourse and striking while the
iron is hot — and he needs us at his back amplifying the message for
Medicare for All RIGHT NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20698?source=email-20241217&t=1014&akid=7407%2E5885482%2EIsXYF_ ]Stand with Bernie: Add your name and chip in a grassroots donation so
we can target our resources and make the most of this national spotlight
on M4A!

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: VoteVets.org
subject: You might be wondering, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Some of us served in Vietnam, or the Gulf War, or the War on Terror. We’ve been through it — and we got through it together. It’s more important than ever that we stick up for ourselves, for our communities, and for what’s right.
#
Peter,
You might be wondering how an organization like VoteVets went from this ad, back in 2006...
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241217-1-30&t=1&akid=34033%2E3013755%2EemfNNk)
...to becoming one of the largest and most successful organizations in politics in 2024.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241217-1-30&t=2&akid=34033%2E3013755%2EemfNNk)
Well, it started in the Iraq War. Bush and his administration lied us into that war. They sent us out with no strategy, and without the equipment we needed. Thousands were killed, and thousands more wounded. After we came back, a generation of Veterans was forced to live with that war for the rest of their lives.
Frankly, we were pretty pissed. So we came home and raised hell. We were told that Republicans owned the Military. They owned Veterans. They owned the flag, and patriotism. But we came back and found a hell of a lot of Veterans were just as pissed as we were, and we organized.
We made it our mission to take the fight to the GOP on ground they thought was safe — and beat them.
Over the years, we fought for the things that matter most to us. We fought to support our Active Duty, to make sure they got what they needed. We fought to make sure Veterans and their families were provided for when they came home. We fought to end the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan.
We’ve had setbacks along the way, but we’ve also had incredible victories. The wars are over. We ended “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” We’ve stopped every single attempt to privatize the VA and sell off care to the lowest bidder, and we’ve helped get improvements to efficiency and expanded care signed into law. We passed the PACT Act, and now millions of Veterans are getting treatment for the toxic exposures they were forced to endure overseas.
Most importantly, we’ve defeated more Republicans and pro-war, anti-veteran candidates than we can count over the last 20 years. Because of our work, thousands and thousands of Veterans are serving at every level of government.
And now, we’re gearing up for a second Trump administration.
Some of us served in Vietnam, or the Gulf War, or the Global War on Terror. We’ve been through it — and we got through it together. It’s more important than ever that we stick up for ourselves, for our communities, and for what’s right.
**Trump and the billionaires he’s filling his administration with are setting their sights on the VA. They aim to slash billions in care for Veterans.**
VoteVets is one of the only organizations standing in their way, and if we’re going to stop them, we need your help.
[**Please, whether you’ve had our back in the past or you’re just getting started now, one of the most impactful things you can do to fight back against Trump and his administration is to make a donation to VoteVets as we put our strategy for 2025 and beyond together. Chip in $5 or whatever you can.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241217-1-30&t=3&akid=34033%2E3013755%2EemfNNk)

clean_body: Some of us served in Vietnam, or the Gulf War, or the War on Terror. We’ve been through it — and we got through it together. It’s more important than ever that we stick up for ourselves, for our communities, and for what’s right. Peter, You might be wondering how an organization like VoteVets went from this ad, back in 2006... ...to becoming one of the largest and most successful organizations in politics in 2024. Well, it started in the Iraq War. Bush and his administration lied us into that war. They sent us out with no strategy, and without the equipment we needed. Thousands were killed, and thousands more wounded. After we came back, a generation of Veterans was forced to live with that war for the rest of their lives. Frankly, we were pretty pissed. So we came home and raised hell. We were told that Republicans owned the Military. They owned Veterans. They owned the flag, and patriotism. But we came back and found a hell of a lot of Veterans were just as pissed as we were, and we organized. We made it our mission to take the fight to the GOP on ground they thought was safe — and beat them. Over the years, we fought for the things that matter most to us. We fought to support our Active Duty, to make sure they got what they needed. We fought to make sure Veterans and their families were provided for when they came home. We fought to end the wars in Iraq and Afghanistan. We’ve had setbacks along the way, but we’ve also had incredible victories. The wars are over. We ended “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” We’ve stopped every single attempt to privatize the VA and sell off care to the lowest bidder, and we’ve helped get improvements to efficiency and expanded care signed into law. We passed the PACT Act, and now millions of Veterans are getting treatment for the toxic exposures they were forced to endure overseas. Most importantly, we’ve defeated more Republicans and pro-war, anti-veteran candidates than we can count over the last 20 years. name: Brianna Shamsuddoha (NDRC)
subject: How we can work smarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need to know what kind of financial support we can count on next year.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98851213/518024742/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzIxY2E4LTlkYmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B5ARYgwfS2BcP5i0m2av2twlGQRIIUAulGp_oE5kAG4=&emci=77e2fb71-8bbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=10c21ca8-9dbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, As the NDRC’s Mobilization Director, I see the daily impact that grassroots donations make on our organization’s ability to fight for a fairer democracy. Thanks to your support in 2024, we were able to help pro-democracy leaders win races across the country — in places like the North Carolina State Supreme Court, the Wisconsin State Senate, the Michigan State Supreme Court, the Georgia State House, and the Pennsylvania State Senate. **But our work did not end on Election Day. We have a lot to do in 2025 and the years ahead. And with an incoming Trump administration and Republican control of Congress, the stakes are immense. ** As we plan budgets for our 2025 programs, we need to know what type of financial support we can plan on from our grassroots donors. [**The best way to help us build a budget and have the most impact is to commit to a recurring monthly donation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98851214/518024743/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RecurringAsk_email_20241217-NDRC-Tier1-RecurringAsk_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241217-NDRC-Tier1-RecurringAsk_&utm_campaign=RecurringAsk&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzIxY2E4LTlkYmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B5ARYgwfS2BcP5i0m2av2twlGQRIIUAulGp_oE5kAG4=) **With a monthly donation, you’re helping us better plan for our work ahead. The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political and electoral engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that the right people are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle.
Just this next year, we have opportunities such as state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania.
And as we inch towards the 2030 Census, we need to grow our community of pro-democracy, fair maps supporters so we have meaningful impact when we mobilize towards fair redistricting.
Together, we’ll ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair maps.
**We can do this. We can protect fair maps and combat ongoing gerrymandering. We have a smart plan, the right team, and a truly remarkable community of supporters all across the country — but we need to know what kind of financial support we can count on next year.**
[**Please commit to a monthly donation to the NDRC so we can on the democracy-saving work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98851221/518024750/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RecurringAsk_email_20241217-NDRC-Tier1-RecurringAsk_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241217-NDRC-Tier1-RecurringAsk_&utm_campaign=RecurringAsk&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwYzIxY2E4LTlkYmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=B5ARYgwfS2BcP5i0m2av2twlGQRIIUAulGp_oE5kAG4=)

| | Peter, Let’s be real for a second.
We know you’ve received countless emails asking for money.
It’s very overwhelming.
And it’s easy to ignore another request in your inbox, especially when it feels like everyone is asking for something.
But here’s the thing: **this one’s different.**
_When we ask for your support, we’re not expecting everyone to give. That’s not how this works._
We don’t need huge checks from just a few people; we need a lot of people doing their part.
_**And that’s where you come in.**_
[**_Small donations make a huge difference. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: What is going on with the Jersey drones?
body:
East Coast Drone Mystery: Residents, Lawmakers Demand Answers
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vrwky-opad41-kyd76rh5/)
---
# **What is going on with the Jersey drones?**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vrwky-opad42-kyd76rh6/)
---
| | | | folks, A series of drone sightings over New Jersey and New York has sparked concerns among residents and lawmakers, with questions about the craft's origins and intent remaining unanswered. Federal agencies, including the FBI and Department of Homeland Security, are investigating the incidents using drone detection technology and analyzing photos and videos. White House National Security Adviser John Kirby stated that most sightings are likely misidentified manned aircraft and emphasized there is “no evidence” of a national security or public safety threat. However, local officials, including Washington Township Mayor Matthew Murello, remain skeptical. Murello, who has seen drones hovering near treetops in his town, called for transparency, expressing frustration with federal responses. “Either someone knows something and won’t tell us, or we truly don’t know what’s happening—which is even scarier,” Murello said. The issue gained urgency after drone sightings temporarily shut down runways at New York’s Stewart International Airport. New York and New Jersey senators, including Chuck Schumer and Cory Booker, have called for federal briefings, citing the risk these incidents pose to public safety and aviation. The situation highlights growing concerns about surveillance, safety, and communication between federal authorities and local communities. While agencies warn against attempting to shoot down drones, officials stress the need to identify the source to address public fears. The mystery persists, leaving residents and lawmakers alike searching for answers. [**_At No Dem Left Behind, we’re committed to keeping you informed about the most critical political developments and current events that impact your community. But we can’t do it without your support. Stay informed. Stay engaged. Join No Dem Left Behind now to make a difference. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Turning Point USA’s patriotic student movement
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Fellow American,

The Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of
America-loving young people about AMERICAFEST 2024 - and I don't
want to turn away ANY student!

With MILLIONS MORE young people turning away from Leftism and
deciding to LOVE AMERICA again, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST
is on track to be our BIGGEST EVENT EVER.

Fellow American, can I count on YOUR support to help bring EVEN MORE
young people to AMERICAFEST this year? Your gift today of $50
will help sponsor ONE MORE student to attend ... your gift of
$100 will help sponsor TWO MORE students to attend ... and so on.

But any amount is a true blessing ... and it will help me bring
another patriotic young person to this year's AMERICAFEST.

Support the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund

Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST
celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help,
this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the
American Culture War.

Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will:

Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative
movement, including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY
GAINES, and MANY MORE,

Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these
hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS
MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and

Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS - with
15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! - so that our pro-America
Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading
into 2025!

Your gift today to Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST Scholarship
Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from your
state, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind
event.

Fellow American, would you consider a gift of $50 to help sponsor ONE
MORE student ... a gift of $100 to help sponsor TWO MORE students
... and so on? Truly, any amount you're able to chip in will make
a difference for young patriots across the country.

Support the AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund

Earlier this year, I told Turning Point USA supporters that -
when we worked together - we could inspire GEN Z to become the
MOST CONSERVATIVE and MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation EVER.

Now we have seen the BIGGEST CONSERVATIVE SHIFT among young
people in generations!

While we must celebrate this MASSIVE VICTORY, we must also
continue to press our advantage and keep up the pressure on the
"Woke" Left ... so we can make this PERMANENT GENERATIONAL
CHANGE.

I truly believe that bringing THOUSANDS MORE kids to this
year's AMERICAFEST can be a GAME-CHANGER for our pro-America
Movement - which is why I hope you'll make your most generous
gift today to support Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST Scholarship
Fund.

Thank YOU, Fellow American, for standing with Turning Point USA to
build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots!

For America,

Charlie Kirk

Founder & CEO

Turning Point USA

Support Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

© Copyright DCDailyJournal.com All Rights
Reserved.

If RFK Jr. is confirmed as the Health Secretary, our country will become _LESS healthy,_ not more!

**We should NOT have someone who is _anti-science, anti-vax,_ and _anti-truth_ as our _Health Secretary,_ folks!**

President-Elect Trump _knows_ how dangerous and unqualified he is, so he’s threatening to go around Congress & appoint him without Senate approval!

It’s flat out wrong — and we know most Americans agree...

[**But we need to know where YOU stand: Do you approve of Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as our nation’s Health Secretary? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/RFK_JR_Approval?source=VPP_20241217_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC&t=12&akid=18242%2E878179%2EjNy7EM)

name: Truth to Power
subject: Another Scam PAC….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39350%2E3422442%2EJW1Csa)
Derek,
Scam PACs are political organizations that exist to steal money rather than support a cause or candidate. The money they raise goes solely to “consultants” or the founder of the Scam PAC, rather than real causes, and it’s a shameful way to make a quick buck.
That brings us to Harrison Butker, the football player who made news earlier this year, when during a graduation speech, **he said women graduates were probably more excited about marriage and children than they were careers.**
After his comments went viral, he started a PAC dedicated to supporting conservative candidates. But that PAC.... didn’t actually support candidates. ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241217?refcode=em20241217-39350&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39350_3422442_JW1Csa&akid=39350%2E3422442%2EJW1Csa)
Scam PACs are a problem on both sides of the aisle, which is why Katie Porter has introduced legislation to crack down on them.
Truth to Power is the anti-scam PAC. We’re grassroots powered, and in just the past nine months, Truth to Power has given over $100,000 to Democratic candidates directly and raised over $200,000 directly for campaigns and organizations.
With Trump’s administration starting in January, we’re laser focused on laying the groundwork to help our endorsed candidates win in 2026—because early support makes the biggest difference.
**[Will you make a donation of any amount to support our slate of anti-corruption candidates who will carry on Katie’s fights in DC?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241217?refcode=em20241217-39350&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39350_3422442_JW1Csa&akid=39350%2E3422442%2EJW1Csa)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241217?refcode=em20241217-39350&refcode2=39350_3422442_JW1Csa&akid=39350%2E3422442%2EJW1Csa)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241217-39350&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39350_3422442_JW1Csa&akid=39350%2E3422442%2EJW1Csa)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39350%2E3422442%2EJW1Csa).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| | Hi Peter, Let us introduce ourselves: our names are Emily Flores and Leslie Santiago and we’re current students at Lewis & Clark College. We started as the 2024 Democracy Fellows for the Oregon League of Conservation Voters Education Fund in the fall of this year! Our goal for this fellowship was to equip both students and the general public with knowledge and skills they need to be effective advocates and voters for the environment. We held classroom presentations, club presentations, tabling sessions, sent emails, phone calls, texts, and ran a mock election to engage with thousands of Oregon voters about changes to City of Portland government and ranked choice voting (RCV). In order to reach as many voters as possible, we sent 55,708 emails to educate them about the process of RCV. We tabled at 18 events and presented in 14 classes to bring voters further awareness of RCV. Then, in the final days leading up to the general election, we sent out 1,224 texts and 136,218 email reminders to those who took our pledge to vote. Voters were delighted to have someone check in and get the support they needed to cast their vote. We wouldn’t have had the opportunity to be a democracy fellow without the proper funds from generous donors. During our time as a fellow we’ve learned so much as voters and advocates. [**We’re writing to you today to ask: would you consider making a year end donation to OLCV, so youth like us can continue to educate young voters and climate activists?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98854324/518035588/591622111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMzkwOWZmLWE0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3IkGy-7tM_3Zb7oM4m79zk29aWRY2ZOzFwgmrdneRD4=&emci=fbd9cd34-09bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8b3909ff-a4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230) [**Did you know that $1,500 is all it takes to sponsor an OLCV campaign fellow to help train the next generation of climate organizers? $5,000 could help fund an innovative youth-led climate campaign, engaging young climate activists in OLCV’s work!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98854325/518035589/591622111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMzkwOWZmLWE0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3IkGy-7tM_3Zb7oM4m79zk29aWRY2ZOzFwgmrdneRD4=&emci=fbd9cd34-09bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8b3909ff-a4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=2107230)

clean_body: | | | Hi there, Did you catch our last email? OLCV needs your support so they can continue to provide fellowship opportunities to engage youth in climate activism. ** $1,500 is all it takes for OLCV to sponsor the next campaign fellow who will help train the next generation of climate activists. With thanks,Emily Flores & Leslie Santiago OLCV-EF 2024 Democracy Fellows | | | Hi Peter, Let us introduce ourselves: our names are Emily Flores and Leslie Santiago and we’re current students at Lewis & Clark College. We started as the 2024 Democracy Fellows for the Oregon League of Conservation Voters Education Fund in the fall of this year! Our goal for this fellowship was to equip both students and the general public with knowledge and skills they need to be effective advocates and voters for the environment. We held classroom presentations, club presentations, tabling sessions, sent emails, phone calls, texts, and ran a mock election to engage with thousands of Oregon voters about changes to City of Portland government and ranked choice voting (RCV). In order to reach as many voters as possible, we sent 55,708 emails to educate them about the process of RCV. We tabled at 18 events and presented in 14 classes to bring voters further awareness of RCV. Then, in the final days leading up to the general election, we sent out 1,224 texts and 136,218 email reminders to those who took our pledge to vote. Voters were delighted to have someone check in and get the support they needed to cast their vote. We wouldn’t have had the opportunity to be a democracy fellow without the proper funds from generous donors. During our time as a fellow we’ve learned so much as voters and advocates. help support the next generation of climate advocates! If you’d like to make a tax-deductible donation, you can give to the. ** Thank you for supporting OLCV and allowing us to gain this rewarding and insightful experience through OLCV’s sponsored fellowship. Sincerely,Emily Flores & Leslie SantiagoOLCV-EF 2024 Democracy Fellows | | P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen
subject: BREAKING: DOE confirms dangers of LNG
body:
Now, Biden must act
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3155578/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| **Now more than ever, President Biden has everything he needs to reject all six pending LNG export projects.** His own Department of Energy agrees that more LNG export projects are harmful, so add your name now to tell Biden he must use his remaining time in office to protect frontline communities and the climate from the dangerous projects. [SIGN NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3155579/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi there,

We've been pushing hard for the Department of Energy (DOE) to release updated studies that reflect the real harms of liquid "natural" gas (LNG) exports, **and today they released those studies.** |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3155580/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| DOE's analysis confirms what frontline communities living near LNG export terminals and climate advocates have long known: LNG—methane—exports come at too high a cost for energy affordability, public health, and climate.

Take just these two findings from the studies: |
---
|
* An LNG export project similar in size to one that is pending approval "would yield more annual greenhouse gas emissions by itself than 141 of the world’s countries each did in 2023."
* "Unconstrained exports of LNG would increase costs for the average American household by well over $100 more per year by 2050."

|
---
| As DOE Secretary Granholm herself said, the continued pace of LNG exports is "neither sustainable nor advisable."

Big Polluters would have us believe that LNG is good for the economy, but this study underscores what our movement has been saying all along: **Doubling down on LNG exports would only make energy bills more expensive for working families.** |
---
[TELL BIDEN: REJECT ALL PENDING PROJECTS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3155581/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| **The fact is that LNG exports poison our families and devastate our climate at every point in their sprawling supply chains.** And Gulf communities—already overburdened by toxic air and water pollution—should not be forced to bear the brunt of fossil fuel racism.

Big Polluters are recklessly prioritizing corporate profits over a livable future and the health of our families.

**That's why President Biden must use his remaining time in office to reject all pending LNG export authorizations.** His own DOE has demonstrated that these projects are dangerous and inadvisable—so he must act now. |
---
[SIGN NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3155582/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thank you for all that you do.

Sincerely, |
---
| | |
---
### Mattea Mrkusic
Senior Policy Lead
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3155583/87SdQ4wZ)
---

---

clean_body: Newsletter from Save the Redwoods League | December 17, 2024 | Biodiversity Discover barking salamanders, furry tree voles, a formerly “extinct” flower, and other wild wonders—and learn about our opportunity to protect habitat for this amazing flora and fauna at Sonoma Coast Redwoods. John Muir Trail At age 14, Lewis McColgan realized his goal of hiking the entire 211-mile John Muir Trail with his father and godfather. In our Q&A, he talks summits, squirt guns, and fundraising to protect vulnerable redwood forests. Coffee Pot Fire League scientist Linnea Hardlund shares her recent experience on the ground—and in the air!—as a giant sequoia expert advising on the front lines of the Coffee Pot Fire. Podcast She was a city girl from Los Angeles. He was raised by outdoor enthusiasts. Hear how Karla Jovel and Kyle Buchanan both found their way to careers as interpreters of nature. Giving This Giving TREESday, we asked what you treasure most about the redwoods. Your heartfelt answers filled us with hope, camaraderie, and a renewed sense of purpose as we head into the new year. | | Instagram Post of the Month ---|--- | | ---|--- "I took a walk in the woods and came out taller than the trees." 📷 @ Trevor McBroom / Adobe Stock THE LEAGUE IN THE NEWS CBS News The Travel Palo Alto Online MSN.com Support our work Connect with us | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States |

We're TWO WEEKS AWAY from our New Year's Eve celebration in Port St. Lucie, Florida!! Join the Let Us Worship team and thousands of believers from across America as we close out 2024 and welcome 2025!

name: Team Bennet
subject: Gearing up for the fight ahead.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121724_eoy2024_1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121724_eoy2024_1_act]
Hi team,
As we head into 2025, Michael knows that we’ll have to fight to protect the freedoms we care deeply about.
Michael believes that every American has a right to four essential freedoms: the freedom to rise, the freedom to learn, the freedom from violence, and the freedom to govern ourselves.
No matter how long the odds may feel, we know these freedoms are always worth fighting for. If you agree, join us today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121724_eoy2024_1_act]
Freedom to rise means prioritizing working families, fighting childhood poverty, and building an economy that works for everyone, not just folks at the top.
Freedom to learn means investing in our public schools, our educators, and our students, not banning books or dismantling the Department of Education.
Freedom from violence means passing common-sense gun safety laws, fighting the opioid epidemic, and regulating the extremism that flourishes on social media.
Freedom to govern ourselves means reforming our electoral system so our voices, not dark money, have the most power — and keeping the government out of our doctor's office and our bedrooms.
Those are the values Michael fights for every day in the Senate, and he isn’t planning on letting up anytime soon.
We know we’ve got a fight in front of us to protect and advance these freedoms, and we will need you on our side to do it. Will you help us end the year ready to fight for what matters by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121724_eoy2024_1_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121724_eoy2024_1_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121724_eoy2024_1_act&recurring=1]
Thanks,
Team Bennet

Denver, CO 80201
United States

Team, I’m sure you receive many emails from campaigns asking for money, but hopefully, I can provide some context behind these requests. As we strategize and plan for the future of our campaign, our monthly and quarterly fundraising objectives are crucial in these discussions. Our ability to secure victory in 2025 hinges on whether we meet these goals. We don't set these benchmarks arbitrarily; they guide our trajectory towards success. So, when you receive communications from us stressing the significance of reaching our fundraising goal, please understand that it comes from a place of sincerity. _**We value your support immensely and are committed to being completely transparent about our campaign's direction.**_ [**With that in mind, I need your support to ensure we reach our fundraising goal. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Let’s check this off the holiday list 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Help us hit $3K before the ball drops! |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98856820/518043062/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDhiNTQyYS1hYWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAQYK7Oq7lsO_DNqzEpgiIoYo1g49bPv6Wmmj3zODP0=&emci=6c5cd5f6-86b9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=408b542a-aabc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7878003)
Hey friend, I LOVE the holiday season. But if your family is anything like the Swalwell household, I know it’s a crazy time. Between wrapping presents, hosting family, and sneaking one too many cookies, there’s a lot going on. So, we’re here to make this easy: let’s check “Support Democracy” off your to-do list early. Here's the deal: **Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is just two weeks away, and we’ve set a goal to raise $3,000 before the ball drops on New Year’s Eve.** That’s $3,000 to kickstart the work we need to do in the year ahead — protecting voting rights, standing up for equality, and pushing back against the MAGA agenda. By pitching in now, you’ll help us hit the ground running in 2025 and free up your holidays for the important stuff, like watching “Home Alone” _again_ or finding room for that extra slice of pie. We know the holidays are for relaxing, recharging, and spending time with family — so we’re asking now to get ahead and make sure we’re all ready for the year ahead. **[So, friend, will you chip in $25 to support our work today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98856821/518043063/1154900510?refcode=E11774-20241217-2WeeksEOY-SL-DeadlineEOQ&&&&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDhiNTQyYS1hYWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAQYK7Oq7lsO_DNqzEpgiIoYo1g49bPv6Wmmj3zODP0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98856822/518043064/1154900510?express_lane=true&&refcode=E11774-20241217-2WeeksEOY-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDhiNTQyYS1hYWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAQYK7Oq7lsO_DNqzEpgiIoYo1g49bPv6Wmmj3zODP0=)

But if your family is anything like the Swalwell household, I know it’s a crazy time. Between wrapping presents, hosting family, and sneaking one too many cookies, there’s a lot going on. So, we’re here to make this easy: let’s check “Support Democracy” off your to-do list early. Here's the deal: Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is just two weeks away, and we’ve set a goal to raise $3,000 before the ball drops on New Year’s Eve. That’s $3,000 to kickstart the work we need to do in the year ahead — protecting voting rights, standing up for equality, and pushing back against the MAGA agenda. By pitching in now, you’ll help us hit the ground running in 2025 and free up your holidays for the important stuff, like watching “Home Alone” again or finding room for that extra slice of pie. Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American Culture War. Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will: Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement , including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and MANY MORE, Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS -- with 15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! -- so that our pro-America Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025! Your gift today to Turning Point USA 's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default: your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event. ** Earlier this year, I told Turning Point USA supporters that -- when we worked together -- we could inspire GEN Z to become the MOST CONSERVATIVE and MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation EVER. Now we have seen the BIGGEST CONSERVATIVE SHIFT among young people in generations! While we must celebrate this MASSIVE VICTORY, we must also continue to press our advantage and keep up the pressure on the "Woke" Left ... so we can make this PERMANENT GENERATIONAL CHANGE. Thank YOU, Fellow Patriot, for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Connor Spence, ALU for Cedar Key Progress
subject: I’m the President of Amazon Labor Union and I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Friend,
My name is Connor Spence, and I am the President of Amazon Labor Union IBT Local 1.
2 1⁄2 years ago, my co-workers and I organized the first union to win an election at an Amazon warehouse in the United States. Since then, Amazon has fought us tooth and nail, refusing to bargain a contract with us.
They’ve been fined by the National Labor Relations Board, and instead of coming to the table, they’re teaming up with Elon Musk in a lawsuit to get the NLRB declared unconstitutional.
Amazon is one of the wealthiest companies in the world. They can keep us in court for the rest of time.
**Ultimately, Amazon only speaks one language, and that’s money. We’re ready to withhold our labor if they continue to ignore their legal obligation to come to the table.**
That’s why, during Amazon’s busiest time of year, our union is preparing to participate in a nationally coordinated workplace action. As a part of the International Brotherhood of Teamsters, we’re joining many other warehouses nationwide who have also unionized and demanded recognition from this company. Our message is clear: **We can’t wait anymore.**
**Amazon’s founder is the 2nd richest man in the world―and he has fought organizing efforts tooth and nail.**
**That’s where you come in. Our union is raising funds to support potential picket solidarity efforts** : food, transportation, materials, language interpretation, medical support, cold weather supplies, worker retaliation defense funds, and legal support.
**[Can you split a donation between Cedar Key Progress and Amazon Labor Union today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsH4JHBGSmNLfsXBAhOWqLkOXAizVg_mRpdAw-B2ooStY7z9LS_12Qy2ZRwz8F9qnrwKHXqHMO9VKYTZCkHHTXERSXdxso12SztWJhydbNrA9lpxKaV5y49XR4KCAIebI81fb9-3jREQzA3OyeBrwGoMxLJs0CNPZUYel3aRKsuOt5sA7YAPk-FkdIM9iCe1u2H8hq_oQvhnryFWpMIyl3jAZaEh5_Pci00ZtB3CiWX5i-LYayDiwR0CSnITjroAf5cZsnoQFsmPhimnRQOUaiUjUqqhXo4G4AfANjIsXxKqTcPFJjiE7T8q6PV7trm9sKKpcJHSAamG917zNoD_I1uRWVm2iar8wnKnDIq7wdtngOia_vnLLiuFhIZ9f9B4UEc/4cd/kZxR1VJIRsS_Y-RCop9TXw/h0/h001.XTkT3QZx3vQ4-ixPfJuH8sfKriuV-NQkxskHMRjhq2Q)** | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsH4JHBGSmNLfsXBAhOWqLkOXAizVg_mRpdAw-B2ooStY7z9LS_12Qy2ZRwz8F9qnrw-gXsIyLIcCkr-rNe_ULV-xEgr3fDc7K6X5GJAWFpGZIwZkIh4AlHQ3AuqveeS8TC0UeAC-JwUPB3MrCh7QBbVMKPtvLkkJt7_iGmF3pddk2_3rv6_O0qB5XZfYUB5iv24Oa0ESdE7uqSVorb6gU_cRmMsX1il5NIY0mQx-xiRSCJ6pUUl7rZ1MtxvjQigCErQHtJqslXiKPzJdYxCaN3w-obfgELFtnGFKFc1MjdqDeVAW3hyoPtwsbYmNhZ0HKLjWWgosLO4X5a9uUhBQVGaELKEjqB8mnPcFbmCxe_5YSqE9VJMaf44-Fx5uIRMqYy/4cd/kZxR1VJIRsS_Y-RCop9TXw/h1/h001.0W4MlGVCoH9jMNEaDaLygwoiE9n69-HhSVu-8tuGWmI)
---
ALU is built on solidarity. Amazon is a massive company, one of the most exploitative in the world. It will take a coordinated, international movement to hold this company accountable. We’ve survived these years thanks to the support of a movement that has been there for us when we asked. This is a crucial time. Amazon Labor Union is grateful for Cedar Key Progress's support.

In solidarity,

Connor Spence
President
Amazon Labor Union, IBT Local 1

Since then, Amazon has fought us tooth and nail, refusing to bargain a contract with us. They’ve been fined by the National Labor Relations Board, and instead of coming to the table, they’re teaming up with Elon Musk in a lawsuit to get the NLRB declared unconstitutional. Amazon is one of the wealthiest companies in the world. They can keep us in court for the rest of time. Ultimately, Amazon only speaks one language, and that’s money. We’re ready to withhold our labor if they continue to ignore their legal obligation to come to the table. That’s why, during Amazon’s busiest time of year, our union is preparing to participate in a nationally coordinated workplace action. As a part of the International Brotherhood of Teamsters, we’re joining many other warehouses nationwide who have also unionized and demanded recognition from this company. Our message is clear: We can’t wait anymore. Amazon’s founder is the 2nd richest man in the world―and he has fought organizing efforts tooth and nail. That’s where you come in. Our union is raising funds to support potential picket solidarity efforts : food, transportation, materials, language interpretation, medical support, cold weather supplies, worker retaliation defense funds, and legal support. | ALU is built on solidarity. Amazon is a massive company, one of the most exploitative in the world. It will take a coordinated, international movement to hold this company accountable. We’ve survived these years thanks to the support of a movement that has been there for us when we asked. This is a crucial time. Amazon Labor Union is grateful for Cedar Key Progress's support. In solidarity, Connor Spence President Amazon Labor Union, IBT Local 1 Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cedar Key Progress, please .
