name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: My friend, Curtis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, it’s Governor Gretchen Whitmer. I wanted to make sure you saw this: **Yesterday, my good friend Curtis Hertel announced he’s running for Chair of the Michigan Democratic Party!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857253/518044421/-829860959?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753) Curtis has been a relentless advocate for Michiganders. He’s led the way in passing bipartisan legislation that cut taxes for seniors, expanded workers’ rights, brought good-paying jobs to Michigan, and defended reproductive freedom. Curtis will lead our party and fight like hell to get things done with the same passion and determination that drove him during our work together in Michigan. **[Read his launch announcement below, then sign up to support his campaign ahead of the February convention.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857254/518044422/-829860959?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753)** Thank you, — Gretchen Whitmer \-----FORWARDED EMAIL----- Team, Curtis Hertel here, and I am so excited to announce that I’m running to be the next Chair of the Michigan Democratic Party. With Trump coming back to the White House, we need to do everything we can to stand up against his extreme agenda, win back our Democratic trifecta in Michigan, and keep delivering for working families. **[We have a lot of work to do to build the biggest and strongest Democratic Party in the country. If you’re ready for that challenge, join our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857255/518044531/-829860959?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753)** | [JOIN OUR TEAM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857256/518044532/-829860959?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753)
---
When I was elected to the Michigan Senate, there were only 10 other Democrats — just enough to fit in the elevator. But we didn’t let that stop us.
As Campaign Chair for the caucus, we organized, recruited candidates, and built an infrastructure that flipped our state Senate blue for the first time in 40 years, resulting in the most productive legislative session in Michigan’s _history._
We repealed the retirement tax, reinstated prevailing wage, became the first state in nearly 60 years to repeal “right to work,” got rid of a 1931 abortion ban, passed gun safety legislation after the MSU and Oxford school shootings, and delivered free breakfast and lunch for every public school student in the state.
But our work isn’t done. We have a choice right now:
**Are we going to sit back and watch the next four years unfold — or are we going to move forward, rebuild, and win?**
The Democratic Party always has been and always will be the party of working people. We need to fight harder to prove that to the people.
We need to show up everywhere, listen to what people actually need to make their lives better, and remember why we’re in this fight. As MDP Chair, I will not leave a single place in our great state behind.
**[We only have a few weeks until the Michigan Democratic Convention, so I need your help to move our state forward. Will you join our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857257/518044560/-829860959?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753)**
[JOIN OUR TEAM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857258/518044561/-829860959?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753)
---
Thank you,
Curtis Hertel
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857259/518044562/204276858?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753)
---

PO Box 15093
Lansing, MI 48901
United States ****[FIGHTLIKEHELLPAC.ORG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857260/518044563/-1026118285?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753) ** | [info@fightlikehellpac.org](mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org)**|**[PRIVACY POLICY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98857261/518044564/-28805512?refcode=AU_FLHP_CL_FOT_GEN_AC90_20241216_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDYwNDA4M2QtYWRiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KE2IYzyXj797RWMhMSEIcBrw3wKUrTzYidx-wF2zGOw=&emci=f0edbad2-dcbb-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=d604083d-adbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=1028753) ** **** | **Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. subject: I stand with you and the House Democrats’ agenda

body:
Donald Trump’s policy plans could make Social Security insolvent in just 6 years.

House Democrats are fighting back to ensure the hard-earned benefits of seniors and everyday Americans are protected.

We’re sending a letter to let them know that we stand with them and we’d like you to add your name! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42024_sshousedems?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

Add your name to the to stand with House Democrats and protect Social Security » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42024_sshousedems?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

Dear House Democrats,
Thank you so much for fighting for ALL Americans!
Republicans have been working to drain Social Security for years, but the way that you have continued to defend it makes me proud to call myself a Democrat.
As you fight for the hard-earned benefits of seniors and millions of vulnerable people, you’re giving us real hope.
I need you to know that thousands of Americans across the country stand with you!
That’s why I'm signing this letter and sending a donation of $7 to NewDems now because I stand with you and the House Democrats’ agenda! It’s more important than ever that we stand united to fight for a better future and the preservation of our Democracy. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42024_sshousedems?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

Trump demands Biden ‘stop’ selling off portions of border wall: ‘It’s almost a criminal act’

President-elect Donald Trump demanded Monday that President Biden stop his administration from selling off portions of the southern border wall, ripping the retiring commander-in-chief for his “almost criminal act.”

“I’m asking today, Joe Biden to please stop selling the wall. We’re going to use that to create a strong barrier,” Trump said during his remarks to the press at Mar-a-Lago.

# ANNOUNCEMENT FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP:

## **_I have a big announcement to share with Friend!_**

Your support helped me win the election, and now I’ve officially assembled my cabinet.
With Inauguration day right around the corner, I would like to thank you for everything by appointing you as an **_Official Cabinet-Level Advisor._**

### **Will you please accept this honorable position?**

[ACCEPT POSITION](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGSnCAQhp8Gb0xB46hz8DAb10OSSmWTVLaSi4XQrkwBEsVxd54-pevO9e8P_v5AumBN91aS_IEA9EZPBICIMwE4P8Hzz1_4iDn994V5Kh_x87d1Cp929Ap32Cupi6G-uK-zmF6fHubg_96u_I7Ht4B3eC89oJPGrmleJboEVYBSCZY8F2maHeHIk75MQWWsy1F0LVPHTJw0sBNvT50ugLFCJaYEBikHnvNTmrLs0GrFC1AosYWOcyQpW4w_6MFLqy9xnF04qMEltuxjDNO2Uk2gnlDNIx4W40fUK0Gg3mjqZTTraaoG50yMiPTSKQK1DbTv6KZB31ElW-MxUoeuxZFeUyLqObrGoTazI6LanbM1nIZ5VEhEZUNjQ9N3e66kC9K8eCKqD7cmetVsFXvDvaDpu0Zvk8aGjwsGH9FHIqrVOiKBrPHWaCKq5wXa8_HV-9sWbj8uqu-__yz9D3nzyVjqsBhrzZTlJGUv67rbc11L-B8AAP__bSC0FA)

Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c7a6fd6cc18c4488a5e5cac44be7cbf1&_e=_Xy8cnGFCD35p9C4z1yAqV9fJhOc11Mkd3Kiov5Bxg6uWYjAAvQjiRQR7boq0hBbSvP1-CIlDTLTwLmFzQvRhmmDyInDbWTxlIbZzmaQfUsGc9iRlQ3xYbGXAjwrS2u3t_G_PPaEVga3vcZ_Me8q5ZIuKyPn73M1jHK-w1gCc_mZ3ZLwIozpaW_nedEPgYegnFzXc2vF2eBUAxp7Fu09Qb2EZhmy8I5CTA5AVFgA-oFeqjO2EG_sfcqGL5uusjkcPWhFHaOLPhq3gBZ_SQcqwECyKhc349tnslWE5SGFEB3C-jA62Q6qO-QLtuDi6YpP7u4GwBkcOoMShIonChdFpit_rRBb9Q3WHMXpE7pfw9grQUiATQBvwUl26Qf_nCAExlrEJxebXhYq9puDcGkUFIQkR1fc0Rj2D9p2_sgoWqM%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---

The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c7a6fd6cc18c4488a5e5cac44be7cbf1&_e=_Xy8cnGFCD35p9C4z1yAqV9fJhOc11Mkd3Kiov5Bxg6uWYjAAvQjiRQR7boq0hBbSvP1-CIlDTLTwLmFzQvRhmmDyInDbWTxlIbZzmaQfUsGc9iRlQ3xYbGXAjwrS2u3t_G_PPaEVga3vcZ_Me8q5ZIuKyPn73M1jHK-w1gCc_mZ3ZLwIozpaW_nedEPgYegnFzXc2vF2eBUAxp7Fu09Qb2EZhmy8I5CTA5AVFgA-oFeqjO2EG_sfcqGL5uusjkcPWhFHaOLPhq3gBZ_SQcqwEytj9WlwI4KZQTe6nHiwtUTUmXyZYTa5TFBOHAc3a5BYJ39YbpuXaDgAxDnxCbGEyMjE8yKXTkeSZs9HDcVPSSVwZQjiplZNq6DKWLtW7q8V-8uWSzvkdiSJADGXbAZCBvOy7tXP5MrxDqEZ2V33VE%3D)

A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your **[“](h)[First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c7a6fd6cc18c4488a5e5cac44be7cbf1&_e=_Xy8cnGFCD35p9C4z1yAqV9fJhOc11Mkd3Kiov5Bxg6uWYjAAvQjiRQR7boq0hBbSvP1-CIlDTLTwLmFzQvRhmmDyInDbWTxlIbZzmaQfUsGc9iRlQ3xYbGXAjwrS2u3t_G_PPaEVga3vcZ_Me8q5ZIuKyPn73M1jHK-w1gCc_mZ3ZLwIozpaW_nedEPgYegnFzXc2vF2eBUAxp7Fu09Qb2EZhmy8I5CTA5AVFgA-oFeqjO2EG_sfcqGL5uusjkcPWhFHaOLPhq3gBZ_SQcqwJCX7i8Cm2_8AczYSIalqHqQnWNnniulOFU6da7f1EKd8j0u12RP5HHqZs1J0RQCJZ0kvfxBmyfO3j_iwmVfcjKvdRDRuWTqfh5oJYFlYaqnJ4ewjWczB2PZ_YXGaH_wsuErf564qmM7EPmEqegU_tc%3D)** Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.

clean_body: Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.| | | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo | | From the Desk of | Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this Christmas Card to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Fellow Patriot, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. name: Juliana, UWD
subject: Tell Congress: No $ for Mass Deportations!
body:
✊Our week of action is just getting started, join from home! | | | Peter, As we get closer to the holidays and 2024 comes to a close, the current Congress has one more chance to prove they have our backs. We must hold our elected representatives accountable as we brace for the impact of the incoming Trump administration. 📣That’s why hundreds of immigrant youth from across the country are mobilizing in D.C. right now to demand Congress defend our communities from Trump’s mass deportation plans during our “We’re Here and We Won’t Back Down” week of action! Right now, we’re meeting Congress Members at their offices in D.C., we’re filling their email inboxes, and driving calls to their offices. 📧 [**Will you join us from home and send a letter to your Members of Congress today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxVmA6lZUlAiElwWx8poa7vlqmwnIgvjS2xZ3Ldv0oW90V9i-tfWwThzzACgqzdPQ9uHKxY88LfiFYvvtR0aGFazmOBDylCPf-KJ_UGenwTXTdWxCOSw0twu_e3apuvpALHg65knck31jTXU_dmFjZaJ75YyQto7Dt67WN8Sxb20Ez_xZfSgdrGX2ho0gVwze5wulU_bJbIjS9gkA8APozwC7jIWw-ubBrjy3hhs9l8oB9HF01u-5S2xvdHdnBvbwvvhaxaB6EfGOYkCs-rUaJiQ/4cd/eZBptskBR_OvLBB8HojdWg/h0/h001.7VxrbKEn7VkK_mSftVbjOVdpb_8Y6dNR-nrZxTadGQw) **[Send a Letter](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxVmA6lZUlAiElwWx8poa7vlqmwnIgvjS2xZ3Ldv0oW90V9i-tfWwThzzACgqzdPQ9uHKxY88LfiFYvvtR0aGFa-lNL3W2hp2bvl-vPayUA4SGqMflW7teskDLldIhhi7NI6MZIqDuuHFOn0ewfHSLNy3H5r7WsIT782pyoJHGeFP86UfGs91IcDpUqsM27O774xLCsA-FF558A2TqQJz8Cb44dS6a3ofYA2GWZX_1OJQbyl3s-7nhMfPpFJs2vZeoEstOzuS4v2fRtsuqBtkYWQ/4cd/eZBptskBR_OvLBB8HojdWg/h1/h001.5S67dwqfaVgIBPi8LQw8KWKBoAlw72MxkEB4VQiosyU)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxVmA6lZUlAiElwWx8poa7vlqmwnIgvjS2xZ3Ldv0oW90V9i-tfWwThzzACgqzdPQ9uHKxY88LfiFYvvtR0aGFa3wlWp2RGgXdR1sPu2PQguAMnxZcu_gB0PqkQ9AbFdJTplmo42oblQcNvJXwyJPk4uiwOA_UOtazC88sQeroznk_qM5OBC5FwBzRPjQdV1qmKh6D1eYUMzD3F2hc2exzWtJOOnYMTSyW01SdNWKcI7OoqlFeBzB4Hr1VHVDf7rZaGEzGfe_BaD5ZmpKnChfxNA/4cd/eZBptskBR_OvLBB8HojdWg/h2/h001.T04LX2kIPQso81J29ntq2FvBJXZrNlJxPqUWfpOVHQg)After Trump and the 2025 Congress members are sworn in in January, the Republicans majority in both chambers in Congress will have control to carry out Trump’s mass deportation plans. Congress must pass a funding bill to keep the government running by this Friday, so they need to hear from us now to demand they reject any anti-immigrant funding. Your Congress Members have the choice to either side with Trump or stand up for our immigrant communities by rejecting any anti-immigrant language or funds to expand ICE’s reach.****[**Make sure your Member of Congress hears from you this week by sending them each a letter today!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOaxVmA6lZUlAiElwWx8poa7vlqmwnIgvjS2xZ3Ldv0oW90V9i-tfWwThzzACgqzdPQ9uHKxY88LfiFYvvtR0aGFa_gK1XJbg1z7v_bI8rwtqkN14FEXxXrl7p81EvpLeZeKyCVLtzU_nENcaRhCVhJ4ALhYxd3goA_VkGODL19YgSIPBQ9t98Hy39aAVx-ZEQvQsjzig53Kbc2YaJmIDM1vWKvMXpjLqhP8KmZGKdaSpppKcdFmz0q1U5fqphKATXN9FF7-SdbLaA-cPBxbinjIUA/4cd/eZBptskBR_OvLBB8HojdWg/h3/h001.nk4mtYvr7vKIx2ZFxye7Z0cZizwswpf72I1NObmwweg) In solidarity, Juliana and the rest of the UWD Team **P.S.** After you send letters to your representatives, give them a call too! 📲Dial 1-888-369-9935 to be connected.

# **Join Senator Hughes and His Panel of Experts for a Discussion About Protecting Public Education from the Threat of Project 2025**
Join Senator Hughes and edcuation leaders for an online town hall about protecting K-12 public education and fighting back against Project 2025 plans to abolish the Department of Education. Hi there, We’re beginning to get a clear picture of what the next four years will look like under Trump's Project 2025 agenda — and it's clear that supporting Democratic leaders who are fighting back against these unconstitutional actions is _more important than ever._ In 2022, we faced significant challenges in winning races like AG Mayes’. Today, our fight is even more critical. Arizona's GOP continues to support dangerous election deniers and right-wing extremists at every level of government. Ensuring our state leaders can resist their harmful agenda is paramount. To fight back against Donald Trump’s dangerous plans, we must maintain a robust, year-round infrastructure. This means engaging communities continuously and supporting incumbents who protect our rights and personal freedoms. **[Will you make a grassroots contribution right now to help us achieve this? Your support will directly contribute to our efforts to uphold democracy and protect individual freedoms in Arizona.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98858377/518048363/1906840173?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODI3MzRlZTUtYjFiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8RsAJYYgHpHQBmAX0vPfiY6G4c1TNokcnRxfa0B-QU8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98858378/518048364/1906840173?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241217_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODI3MzRlZTUtYjFiYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8RsAJYYgHpHQBmAX0vPfiY6G4c1TNokcnRxfa0B-QU8=)

In 2022, we faced significant challenges in winning races like AG Mayes’. Today, our fight is even more critical. Blagojevich Urges Trump Legal Team to File Massive Defamation Suit Against Billionaire Pritzker After ABC News Agrees to $15M Settlement (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/blagojevich-urges-trump-legal-team-to-file-massive-defamation-suit-against-billionaire-pritzker-after-abc-news-agrees-to-15m-settlement.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4767760214-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/blagojevich-urges-trump-legal-team-to-file-massive-defamation-suit-against-billionaire-pritzker-after-abc-news-agrees-to-15m-settlement.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=4767760214-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Vice President Kamala Harris participates in a rally to support Illinois Democrats with Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker on the campus of University of Illinois Chicago. (Scott Olson/Getty Images-file)
By Illinois Review

On Monday, former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, who remains a loyal and respected ally within President Donald Trump’s orbit – posted a statement on X urging the President-elect to sue Gov. JB Pritzker for defamation after the Democratic governor repeatedly referred to Trump as an “adjudicated rapist.”

Last Friday, ABC News agreed to a multi-million dollar settlement and agreed to contribute $15 million to President Trump’s presidential foundation and museum to settle a defamation lawsuit filed by Trump and his legal team against the network.

During a March 10 interview, ABC’s George Stephanopolous, who was interviewing U.S. Rep. Nancy Mace, R-SC, falsely claimed that Trump had been found “liable for rape,” when in fact he wasn’t – and the Trump legal team easily pointed out that Stephanopolous’ statement was completely false. And as a result, the news organization quickly agreed to a settlement to avoid any more embarrassing legal trouble.

Seizing on the opportunity – and continuing a more than 5-year feud with Pritzker, Blagojevich went on social media, writing, “Now that Trump successfully won his defamation case against ABC for calling him a ‘rapist,’ when will he sue Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker for repeatedly lying & calling him the same thing?”

subject: Get in, folks. We’re building a firewall.

body:
The real fight starts in our cities and states.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859125/518050771/1328794144?refcode=ea.83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzZTAzMGNlLWI0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SfTR7RVJ-u2veoEbRozEX4_fYanRlFf69Lh6gd3mv3s=&emci=81e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=4823105)
---
Big Oil just made their demands crystal clear. A coalition of oil and gas groups sent a letter to Congress demanding the immediate passage of a bill allowing them to turbocharge fossil fuel production and dismantle environmental protections for the Trump administration. They call it a way to "get America back on track." But we know what their track leads to: more climate disasters, pollution, and profits for CEOs while our communities bear the cost. Big Oil is mobilizing its allies in Congress right now to deliver on their reckless demands. But at JanePAC, we know how to stop them: **by building a firewall of bold climate leaders at every level of government who can block their dangerous agenda.** Sarah Lane, our Executive Director, said it best in a recent interview: | **_“ We see these local and state and county-level electeds as a firewall against what might be coming from the Trump administration.”_** _**\- The Hollywood Reporter, 12/04/2024**_
---
**[But building that firewall takes resources — and we’re counting on supporters like you to help make it happen. Will you chip in $25 or more today to help us fuel the fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859126/518050772/2105508926?amount=25&refcode=ea.83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzZTAzMGNlLWI0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SfTR7RVJ-u2veoEbRozEX4_fYanRlFf69Lh6gd3mv3s=)**
This year alone, nearly 100 JanePAC-endorsed candidates won in key down-ballot races — from city councils to state legislatures. These victories are a direct blow to Trump and his fossil fuel allies, and they’re proof that progress is possible when we work together.
These leaders are ready to:
* Block dangerous fossil fuel projects with local permitting power.
* Pass clean energy initiatives that create jobs and cut emissions.
* Hold corporate polluters accountable at the state level.

But with Trump’s allies gearing up to dismantle our climate protections, we need to go further. Big Oil and its Republican enablers are on the offensive.
**[To fight back, we must elect even more climate champions in 2025 — the leaders who can stop Big Oil in its tracks. Will you chip in $25 today to fuel this fight?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859127/518050773/2105508926?amount=25&refcode=ea.83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ms=ea.83e030ce-b4bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgzZTAzMGNlLWI0YmMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMGQzYTlkNTg0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SfTR7RVJ-u2veoEbRozEX4_fYanRlFf69Lh6gd3mv3s=)**

Big Oil and its Republican enablers are on the offensive. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, we can rise to this moment and create lasting change. \- Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: December 2024 Newsletter
body:
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
December 2024 Newsletter
New Start Graduation
In 2022, I was proud to sponsor and pass the Maryland New Start Act, which established a program to provide small business training and loans to recently incarcerated or returning citizens. On December 6, less than two years after the bill was signed into law, I had the honor of speaking at New Start’s very first graduation!
New Start not only teaches the formerly incarcerated how to be contributing citizens to our communities and economy but also provides seed capital so that they can launch their ideas. It was amazing to meet the first graduating class of the New Start program in Southern Maryland, and I can't wait to see these budding entrepreneurs grow their ideas and grow our local economy with them.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/New%20Start%20Graduation%201.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/New%20Start%20Graduation%202.jpg]
Meet the Whips!
On January 6, 2025, I’m hosting a Happy Hour Reception from 5-7 pm at Federal House in Annapolis-and it’s a three-for-one deal! Chief Deputy Whips Vaughn Stewart and Melissa Wells will join me for a pre-session reunion and a chance to discuss our legislative goals for the coming months.
This year has brought some surprises, but Melissa, Vaughn, and I are ready for anything that comes our way in 2025. Together, we’ll continue to fight for the rights of all Marylanders.
If you’d like to join us, visit bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6] for tickets and more information. If you prefer to contribute by check or money order, mail your donation to Friends of Jazz Lewis, c/o Rice Consulting, 17 W Courtland St, Ste 210, Bel Air MD 21014.
I hope to see you there!
http://bit.ly/JazzJan6 [http://bit.ly/JazzJan6]
Happy Holidays!
As we approach the end of the year, we celebrate the many traditions and values that bring light and joy to our lives. Whether you’re marking the season with moments of reflection, gathering with loved ones, or giving thanks for the year gone by, I wish you warmth, peace, and happiness. May this season of togetherness inspire kindness, hope, and harmony in all the days ahead. Happy holidays to all, from my family to yours!
https://www.jazzlewis.com/ [https://www.jazzlewis.com/]
Delegate Jazz Lewis
Democrat, District 24, Prince George's County
Taylor House Office Building, Room 151
6 Bladen St., Annapolis, MD 21401
800-492-7122, ext. 3691; jazz.lewis@house.state.md.us
www.jazzlewis.com
By Authority: Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

# [#]
Peter,

The 2025 legislative session starts in January, and the Texas GOP is going ALL IN to attack everyday Texans by:

* Introducing a new bathroom bill to target our transgender community and ban them from using publicly owned bathrooms in Texas.
* Ignoring the humanity of migrants by introducing new bills that would further dehumanize and target them.
* Continuously targeting our reproductive freedom by trying to empower the Texas Attorney General to prosecute abortion-related “criminal offenses”.

Enough is enough, Peter.

We’re ready to show MAGA extremists that we can fight back against their attacks, but we need to know if you’re with us. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today.

Will you commit to helping us fight back against their attacks on our rights by adding your name to our pledge today? We only need 1,000 of our top supporters to sign on » [https://secure.everyaction.com/SlqjF-1Rl0W0nfWxBewtaw2]

SIGN THE PLEDGE ✍️ » [https://secure.everyaction.com/SlqjF-1Rl0W0nfWxBewtaw2]

Here at TOP PAC, our mission is to push our state toward a progressive future where ALL TEXANS have the opportunity to thrive — no matter our age, race, faith, or gender.

Thank you for signing!

This week MAGA extremists in South Carolina introduced a bill mandating the death penalty for women who seek an abortion. _And I am guessing this is probably the first you 've heard about it_. Sadly, corporate media remains criminally silent on these grotesque attacks on women's health and basic rights. It is critical we remain aware of these threats, because they are real, and that we remain active in responding to these threats in real time. **Let 's Address This.**
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hDaywXVHU_AbGXJQIERnx9GPwtz3fMZkgafEJRArgfc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153268287)
### The Facts
South Carolina already [ranks 8th nationally in highest maternal mortality rate](https://substack.com/redirect/aeee761b-363a-4675-a33f-555b13b32ac9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and MAGA extremists are apparently vying to become #1. For the second time since 2023, MAGA Republicans in South Carolina have introduced [SC H3537](https://substack.com/redirect/e708dae1-2a21-4ec9-b08d-591bf79c7db9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), also known as _The South Carolina Prenatal Equal Protection Act_. South Carolina House Bill 3537 is one of the most extreme pieces of legislation we've seen. It proposes changing the legal definition of the word "person" to include an unborn fetus. This means that a woman who gets an abortion could be charged with homicide, a crime punishable by the death penalty in South Carolina. To be clear: this bill would make it possible for the state to _execute_ women for seeking an abortion.
This isn't just a step backward--it is a dangerous escalation that criminalizes women's healthcare and puts women's lives at risk. It is a chilling example of how far extremist lawmakers are willing to go to control women's bodies. Understand that even if this bill does not become law _this_ time, its introduction has already accomplished the goal of moving the Overton Window towards acceptance. Ultimately, other right wing state legislatures will propose similar bills, in hopes that one such bill reaches the Supreme Court for their stamp of approval. The GOP used this strategy to ultimately overturn Roe, and is again using this strategy to enact this nightmare piece of legislation.
It is critical we act, not just in South Carolina, but in state legislatures nationwide, to prevent these dangerous pieces of legislation from advancing.
What does that action look like?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hDaywXVHU_AbGXJQIERnx9GPwtz3fMZkgafEJRArgfc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153268287)
### The Path Forward
We are facing an uphill battle. South Carolina's own (all male) Supreme Court is already complicit. Despite first blocking a 6-week abortion ban, they [then upheld that same ban a few months later](https://substack.com/redirect/ed3cc859-3652-4cbd-909a-d1d5b0aef64d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 4-1. It seems clear that should H3537 become law, it will also land in front of the same all male Supreme Court, who will likely offer its blessing.
However, I refuse to give up hope, or believe we are helpless. Here are three things you can do right now to help counter this extremism:
1. If you're in South Carolina, raise your voice and condemnation of this cruel bill. [Look up your representative here](https://substack.com/redirect/47ee4514-89e3-4fe4-980a-8c237f25e6f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and call, email, text (send a pigeon courier if you have to) to make clear to them you reject this barbaric bill and demand it be rescinded immediately. Raise your collective voices.
2. Support reproductive health organizations in South Carolina with your volunteer time and your dollars. Non-profit orgs like [Fact Forward](https://substack.com/redirect/ae1a632a-cd26-4094-88b7-9bf34a4d4288?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Planned Parenthood](https://substack.com/redirect/8fe4517c-8615-475b-a2f4-07d4c2529767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the [South Carolina Office of Rural Health](https://substack.com/redirect/3314a44a-7b8c-4fbd-a11c-7ad2495e3a97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) all need and welcome your support. Each of them are a life line to our neighbors in South Carolina suffering under this draconian legislation.
3. And finally--every single one of us nationwide can contact [the six MAGA extremists who are co-sponsoring this bill](https://substack.com/redirect/209d452f-315c-4c79-9bcb-55583b7781a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to tell them directly just how much we oppose their barbaric legislation. For your convenience, I have researched and listed below their names, official links, and publicly available contact numbers published by the Government of South Carolina:

* [Representative Rob Harris [R]](https://substack.com/redirect/7d59970b-ff71-4d52-b05c-6025e9f43051?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): (803) 212-6788

### Conclusion
We are facing an extremely difficult next four years, and the task before us seems exhausting--because it is. Legacy media should be sounding the alarm on these dangerous pieces of legislation to keep us informed. But they are sadly asleep at the wheel. Therefore, I ask you to also [subscribe to ](https://substack.com/redirect/32ec60aa-ff55-40c3-a054-21ecc02be3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/32ec60aa-ff55-40c3-a054-21ecc02be3c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to support my efforts as I conduct the needed research and calls to action to ensure voters are informed on these critical human rights issues.
I firmly believe in the promise of America, not for any other reason than because I believe in us as a people. Please continue to activate, organize, and mobilize, so we can transform our nation into the more perfect Union built on justice we all deserve.

Here's what's in the bill, why it is so dangerous, and the meaningful steps you can take to fight back, support women's health, and help block this bill from becoming law | | | Dec 17 | | | | | | | | | | | | This week MAGA extremists in South Carolina introduced a bill mandating the death penalty for women who seek an abortion. And I am guessing this is probably the first you 've heard about it. Sadly, corporate media remains criminally silent on these grotesque attacks on women's health and basic rights. It is critical we remain aware of these threats, because they are real, and that we remain active in responding to these threats in real time. Let 's Address This. As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of Let 's Address This remains more critical than ever. Please become an active member of this community and subscribe. The Facts South Carolina already , and MAGA extremists are apparently vying to become #1. For the second time since 2023, MAGA Republicans in South Carolina have introduced , also known as The South Carolina Prenatal Equal Protection Act. South Carolina House Bill 3537 is one of the most extreme pieces of legislation we've seen. It proposes changing the legal definition of the word "person" to include an unborn fetus. This means that a woman who gets an abortion could be charged with homicide, a crime punishable by the death penalty in South Carolina. To be clear: this bill would make it possible for the state to execute women for seeking an abortion. This isn't just a step backward--it is a dangerous escalation that criminalizes women's healthcare and puts women's lives at risk. It is a chilling example of how far extremist lawmakers are willing to go to control women's bodies. Understand that even if this bill does not become law this time, its introduction has already accomplished the goal of moving the Overton Window towards acceptance. Ultimately, other right wing state legislatures will propose similar bills, in hopes that one such bill reaches the Supreme Court for their stamp of approval. The GOP used this strategy to ultimately overturn Roe, and is again using this strategy to enact this nightmare piece of legislation. It is critical we act, not just in South Carolina, but in state legislatures nationwide, to prevent these dangerous pieces of legislation from advancing. What does that action look like? The Path Forward We are facing an uphill battle. South Carolina's own (all male) Supreme Court is already complicit. Despite first blocking a 6-week abortion ban, they 4-1. It seems clear that should H3537 become law, it will also land in front of the same all male Supreme Court, who will likely offer its blessing. However, I refuse to give up hope, or believe we are helpless. Here are three things you can do right now to help counter this extremism: 1. If you're in South Carolina, raise your voice and condemnation of this cruel bill. and call, email, text (send a pigeon courier if you have to) to make clear to them you reject this barbaric bill and demand it be rescinded immediately. Raise your collective voices. 2. Support reproductive health organizations in South Carolina with your volunteer time and your dollars. Non-profit orgs like , , and the all need and welcome your support. Each of them are a life line to our neighbors in South Carolina suffering under this draconian legislation. 3. And finally--every single one of us nationwide can contact to tell them directly just how much we oppose their barbaric legislation. Hi friend, Over the past few days, we asked our supporters to tell us which issues matter most to them and their families. We received so many thoughtful responses to our survey, and our team read each and every one. Your feedback will shape our priorities for 2025 and beyond. You can count on Marcy to continue to champion:
* Our Heartland economy and infrastructure
* The right for every worker to join a union, earn a living wage, and retire with dignity
* Lower healthcare and prescription drug costs for every American
* Voting rights, civil rights, and strong protections for our democracy
* Safeguarding Social Security and Medicare from GOP attacks
* Our planet and our Great Lakes environment
* Reproductive rights

Our campaign represents the people of Northern Ohio — _**not**_ the big-money special interest groups. Your concerns will shape our priorities in 2025 and beyond. We're so grateful to everyone who shared their opinions. **[If you're ready to fight for these issues, please join us! ## ** _HOLIDAY SPECIAL: Stop the Woke Agenda_**
---
| [](https://ssspl.mjt.lu/lnk/AVoAAFo2mHkAAc4Pa0gAA5vbC1wAAYDOz7cAnf7RACZcGQBnYeFrjwMEP6i3SSeB4QHAEau-SQAjuaE/2/OAQW9dG9xj1fbwOFCz5u6w/aHR0cHM6Ly9wcmlja2x5cGVhci5uZXdzL2ZyZWUtYW1hYy1tZW1iZXJzaGlwLz9yZWY9bGliZXJ0eWxhYiZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249SE9MSURBWSUyMFNQRUNJQUwlM0ElMjBTdG9wJTIwdGhlJTIwV29rZSUyMEFnZW5kYSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9bWFpbGpldA)
---
In 2007, the _Association of Mature American Citizens_ (AMAC) founder Dan Weber recognized that **AARP was not protecting the interests of mature Americans who held conservative values**. In Dan’s view, America’s very foundation, rooted in Judeo-Christian values and the meaning of our Constitution, was being disregarded. The power of government continues to grow, all while individual freedoms are threatened. Excessive taxation, runaway government spending, and an increasing interference into the lives of our citizens continue to prove that our country is in a period of drastic change—change that is eroding our traditional values.

**The recent election results demonstrate that most Americans are done with woke ideology, woke businesses, woke politicians, and woke organizations like AARP who are relentless in promoting their woke agendas.**

As we turn the page on the 2024 election and step confidently into the next chapter of our lives, there’s no better time to embrace opportunities that enrich our journey. For those who value faith, family, freedom, and fiscal responsibility, **AMAC is offering the conservative community a free one year membership.** No strings. No gimmicks. No credit cards. Just free membership with all the benefits.

Let's build on our momentum. Join AMAC for FREE and be part of a community that shares your values.

body:
We cannot stand by while Republicans cut vital health care programs.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859887/518053298/664783965?ms=121324_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjBmODRkOS1iN2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymendNWRCa8R3uAGsuOrJLPmiTvkp6EnvW4koWSEeJQ=&emci=4272c972-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=020f84d9-b7bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
Last week, we asked you to contact your representatives and demand that they protect Medicaid and expand health care access.**Over 500 of you emailed your representatives, with over 1,700 individual messages to Congress members!** Thank you for taking action and standing with workers and families.
If you haven’t yet emailed your representatives, we’re counting on you to do so today. This is a vital moment in the fight for health care access and we need our representatives to take action.
[**_Take a moment now to contact your representatives and demand they protect and expand health care access:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859891/518053302/-1323163894?ms=121324_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjBmODRkOS1iN2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymendNWRCa8R3uAGsuOrJLPmiTvkp6EnvW4koWSEeJQ=&emci=4272c972-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=020f84d9-b7bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
[CONTACT YOUR REPRESENTATIVES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859895/518053306/-1323163894?ms=121324_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjBmODRkOS1iN2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymendNWRCa8R3uAGsuOrJLPmiTvkp6EnvW4koWSEeJQ=&emci=4272c972-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=020f84d9-b7bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
If you missed our email last week,**Republicans are threatening to slash funding to Medicaid,** the federally-funded program that provides health care to 70 million Americans.
Cuts to Medicaid would be devastating for low-income and middle-income families who rely on the program for general health insurance coverage, disability coverage, and health care for children.
If Medicaid funding is cut, health care will become**increasingly out of reach for families.** More Americans - including many home care and child care workers - would face steep costs and difficulty accessing health care at a time when we should be working to expand access to care, not restrict it.
Individuals who have preexisting conditions, the elderly, and those who work in the health care, home care, and child care sectors are especially vulnerable to these cuts — we know that many care workers, caregivers, and families in our community would be affected.
[**_So, can you take a minute to contact your representatives and demand they protect and expand health care?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859900/518053310/-1323163894?ms=121324_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjBmODRkOS1iN2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymendNWRCa8R3uAGsuOrJLPmiTvkp6EnvW4koWSEeJQ=&emci=4272c972-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=020f84d9-b7bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
[CONTACT YOUR REPRESENTATIVES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859903/518053314/-1323163894?ms=121324_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjBmODRkOS1iN2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymendNWRCa8R3uAGsuOrJLPmiTvkp6EnvW4koWSEeJQ=&emci=4272c972-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=020f84d9-b7bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787)
Thank you for taking action,

Care in Action

Care In Action was founded by progressive women of color. Care in Action is the policy and advocacy home for women who care, working on behalf of more than 2 million domestic workers and care workers in America. Learn more about our [privacy policy](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98859927/518053340/1824245643?ms=121324_contactrepsmedicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjBmODRkOS1iN2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymendNWRCa8R3uAGsuOrJLPmiTvkp6EnvW4koWSEeJQ=&emci=4272c972-6ab9-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=020f84d9-b7bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=864787).

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=58c98f0931b44f94b570bfb5f076e1bd&_e=CU20goLidEov25QOoIR0D3psM2PETTVcvhwUg0hDfpf4tec1KqoDCjyNthd6vJPUVcWywnJz1-vwxpjabjHwuFM7WtzLQa1dSKWiDvXamKwV-VPnJKQsj7TPM_FTbZG_BMI-HKZtHSzgnUE0fpxlK83IU1IyAy_33800GNSRS3GMsTiT5lBXr_aXi4MmcfeaiG-sE5tKuoCUnHOcFsqQ52KULWNEto3mlwpErffsj6VhhrKLf21M9re2T1fGnJwUMuUN0mnprys1RA-qR_dCbxMdjwpq1g-HNFF89pA0LlHDG-LA1bm-SZ9I8njtOYLomlUXvUcnyK8ueEz8M7nmUcC9YmrUcE4H_1bfApLgScV8gXp5daQe3gRYw9QfWV6C11mIna5fvKsDqDYZ8_8G1U3C-E-_58iE2LWCN_S-gAc%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=58c98f0931b44f94b570bfb5f076e1bd&_e=CU20goLidEov25QOoIR0D3psM2PETTVcvhwUg0hDfpf4tec1KqoDCjyNthd6vJPUVcWywnJz1-vwxpjabjHwuFM7WtzLQa1dSKWiDvXamKwV-VPnJKQsj7TPM_FTbZG_BMI-HKZtHSzgnUE0fpxlK83IU1IyAy_33800GNSRS3GMsTiT5lBXr_aXi4MmcfeaiG-sE5tKuoCUnHOcFsqQ52KULWNEto3mlwpErffsj6VhhrKLf21M9re2T1fGnJwUMuUN0mnprys1RA-qR_dCb2QyDteUqhxHI06ZZ3R5-rYHWx5iUmmrTOH1v6idIvUeblYmJZVOtaLCfDqbApCPZCVgzEMSYNB6awbl9xMRJgHnbToWpIkJm9cgbN8d7bWmSM-v1MdCUnhn7vcYnTy_Fx5My6fRyKGbjG0jzVPooUw%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=58c98f0931b44f94b570bfb5f076e1bd&_e=CU20goLidEov25QOoIR0D3psM2PETTVcvhwUg0hDfpf4tec1KqoDCjyNthd6vJPUVcWywnJz1-vwxpjabjHwuFM7WtzLQa1dSKWiDvXamKwV-VPnJKQsj7TPM_FTbZG_BMI-HKZtHSzgnUE0fpxlK83IU1IyAy_33800GNSRS3GMsTiT5lBXr_aXi4MmcfeaiG-sE5tKuoCUnHOcFsqQ52KULWNEto3mlwpErffsj6VhhrKLf21M9re2T1fGnJwUMuUN0mnprys1RA-qR_dCb2DxEj2iVDKXdNiDrof07DK2Qp45AcFyOBOJZcDVQLnZQSUYqYZUkSH8XEZKh2MaOjOHm-ejksfpm7FrUdYYNMmJviaZlVd-ZKpg0y8nj0Lx1iSag6r7M8b7tG55Sto2-nE667fC4WqqzW7n0_n3ad4%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. | Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/vBZRP_r_-rvTyUQabYmSZw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpRGobP0TTaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIxN19lbV9mcl9iMV9NYXh3ZWxsX2Jpa2luZ19lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0ycU05VUdHOWJXRWdCcXhwWnpLVFU5M05zcnomcmVmY29kZTI9MnFNOVVHRzliV0VnQnF4cFp6S1RVOTNOc3J6JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJxTTlVR0c5YldFZ0JxeHBaektUVTkzTnNyelcDc3BjQgpnVRvlYWd6CAXQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently.
* **As a longtime organizer,** I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365.
* **As the only Gen Z member,** I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me.
* **As someone who grew up working class** and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to _uplift_ working class folks - not demonize them.

**And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars.** I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. **[**_But I know that with your help, I’ll stay here the same way I got here: one dollar at a time. clean_body: | ~~ | Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) ~~ But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently. As a longtime organizer, I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365. As the only Gen Z member, I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me. As someone who grew up working class and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to uplift working class folks - not demonize them. And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars. I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~ | ~ | Grateful for your support, Rep. name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Should anyone be above the law?
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=28cba89388834f76a171197d317593c5&_t=TjH5GF8yC9DsuP1m0feyZ5K8MfBy41RXMfIDlgYQgexBkF5HuSx12P-Mo1KxqEt1adOrBGHSGbmk71pGcFCIUmCkmWzqWhJitPPMnUYA3pIJsGTSt13p1gtf9SCeY-8Q)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=28cba89388834f76a171197d317593c5&_e=Y9KNHNPeqIOrMFzMUXZcVbbXIw1GUxATCUoK5TwRmOZVdZpgVnflA9zxSXhNeqVNyDXov2NACmgwG8blOHxf3dnemTLAG93LenB8N6Py3sfIIj8zOWF4rBAk-7hr5calphJHeQLx_7bOfVB0Bnqftxz8F1-J5laEk89ufj9Xl2K4qS-W64Qqbkk1ynQLbWF6v7u6cileUK1Y0u5C7R8z5zE-V9AX6qUHZmtG0HuVbPf_TBlAEVu_uhrLdB-OBZe2GDs75phoQh5HXvqeR2X1QDZu_vdz5pfNpjEfAPLUH_SqbEMjZw59-SqEJPysnUoulB9JlpFGXq6LkkQM6eBwSET1oEOF_UYwn2bak40cG0m8ApZX3e0XMHfygVsW024A)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
* Hides the corruption of the ruling class
* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=28cba89388834f76a171197d317593c5&_e=Y9KNHNPeqIOrMFzMUXZcVbbXIw1GUxATCUoK5TwRmOZVdZpgVnflA9zxSXhNeqVNyDXov2NACmgwG8blOHxf3dnemTLAG93LenB8N6Py3sfIIj8zOWF4rBAk-7hr5calphJHeQLx_7bOfVB0Bnqftxz8F1-J5laEk89ufj9Xl2K4qS-W64Qqbkk1ynQLbWF6v7u6cileUK1Y0u5C7R8z5zE-V9AX6qUHZmtG0HuVbPcGMBwJsRO7hmMUrZ0pdhHotIXvoq0gY13peOEPkycC6Yh1Hm_pTdZogpUImEV0zGfo_mZtNAT21Lc-dMHV6EWJHaWcK6Tz3vauaD-vglyKyqIpythb8SH0X3ZniFtVL6veCNyL_f8Bepzm4cDxpeDm)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

**[https://info.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=28cba89388834f76a171197d317593c5&_e=Y9KNHNPeqIOrMFzMUXZcVbbXIw1GUxATCUoK5TwRmOZVdZpgVnflA9zxSXhNeqVNyDXov2NACmgwG8blOHxf3dnemTLAG93LenB8N6Py3sfIIj8zOWF4rBAk-7hr5calphJHeQLx_7bOfVB0Bnqftxz8F1-J5laEk89ufj9Xl2K4qS-W64Qqbkk1ynQLbWF6v7u6cileUK1Y0u5C7R8z5zE-V9AX6qUHZmtG0HuVbPeWqytK58kyg4wrp1mFvhU1V0W5zUqn1t1jGVy7wf4lM5X6tKoGFrDkrjg_L-IWGd71HNM93d0J_7pGYl5W1SLqEO2QUf5HgSSO6F_RYVYH-zzr2yTC85XKPTA1-HbNyS3GdkoK-b7gtn6pzWPd8ke8)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=28cba89388834f76a171197d317593c5&_t=TjH5GF8yC9DsuP1m0feyZ5K8MfBy41RXMfIDlgYQgexBkF5HuSx12P-Mo1KxqEt1adOrBGHSGbmk71pGcFCIUlURUfIMj3yuVf1SRpD3b3mGb_4eEEf-1NzfmkCaGQhcapiFDuNrByuwiCTsjgTuX57Cneg8C-Z2oxLCv-LoTmY%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=28cba89388834f76a171197d317593c5&_t=TjH5GF8yC9DsuP1m0feyZ5K8MfBy41RXMfIDlgYQgexBkF5HuSx12P-Mo1KxqEt1adOrBGHSGbmk71pGcFCIUmCkmWzqWhJitPPMnUYA3pIJsGTSt13p1gtf9SCeY-8Q).
---

name: Crow HQ
subject: Are you with Jason?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Jason made a pledge during his first victory speech in 2018: As long as he has the honor of serving you in Congress, he will be there for you. No matter what.

As a former Army Ranger, Jason has always gone where the fight is.

With the incoming Trump Administration looming, there’s no question that we have an uphill battle ahead of us. But Jason’s mission hasn’t changed.

Despite the challenges ahead, he is committed to putting the needs of our community ahead of Republicans’ partisan games and getting things done. He’s ready to get back to work to do right by Coloradans and deliver servant leadership in Congress.

That’s why Jason needs to know: are you with him? Add your name to our list of grassroots supporters to let Jason know you’re in for the fight ahead: [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-12-pet]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-12-pet]

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-december-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: They think you’re dumb
body:
Are you fed up with leftist global elites?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=577e9f3c6d374025b6b66e09f7da168e&_t=ZvCnUiEtULCzBKfI-nq-dIPJglfMDfgWZgvBUmlmsVd3bg15ATLcpr87uQqVjqsL_xqFEkTBq6uf07bukeynWfqB4GGd-i0QQMLqs193Px5ElfX_I73PPS4r9ZHF2W3_)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=577e9f3c6d374025b6b66e09f7da168e&_e=K2p0_2G5XwA2tDq5a2AO324LyJHRoHy5ma1Vc_ar6EMGuy83OACUPoAo3-ZsmiRqRZYw3XHPPkD5lL0nREwg408HkPgv5-M6u8yT--WAWwHSplMarb_6H9ScpRrNHub5oJzLgatOOaPoEefozP8ScQmjEw4IoGUpO6ve8FbVhE3KiSjXdq2WhH5STTATB1lv0owLZ6rpdtj-mBinrIzvkw2xz0jgsrqBUVEgJIwX34kvs9NWDwwyTWtqyAV7MhwFXlRcPQrEznUL36q0cR90C7GxCb2l8FjQaOggAt89l92I9GCGhvpEJGbEP1Oxli6eF78BcBmakF40r6DmUpLive4mfZubQ7vkkZpAtDJOsOw%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Are you fed up with leftist global elites?

I think they're a bunch of hypocritical self-avowed Marxists, private-jet environmentalists, and genocide-adjacent humanitarians.

November's election results proved that the American people are fed up with leftist elites who want to take away your liberty and destroy our nation's prosperity, security, and American way of life.

[**But you can help stop the leftist elites ' agenda today.**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=577e9f3c6d374025b6b66e09f7da168e&_e=K2p0_2G5XwA2tDq5a2AO324LyJHRoHy5ma1Vc_ar6EMGuy83OACUPoAo3-ZsmiRqRZYw3XHPPkD5lL0nREwg408HkPgv5-M6u8yT--WAWwHSplMarb_6H9ScpRrNHub5oJzLgatOOaPoEefozP8ScQmjEw4IoGUpO6ve8FbVhE3KiSjXdq2WhH5STTATB1lv0owLZ6rpdtj-mBinrIzvk6vDEP3Wvb5eld5QxRvMAEP1uvbXbihGyhC0o5bK6iJztEIjgLZknfu14fs3hjEIkrwqw7w1qQl1hiidK2pAU2tBLY8lCSRmy-2fHEGXb84Gvw4KR7cI96nQLhA4hBJicsuRHENPKTrGZhiQJOVVUsI%3D)

I told the leftist elites at the World Economic Forum that the next administration should compile a list of everything that's ever been proposed at the World Economic Forum and object to all of them, wholesale.

With the new administration arriving in a few short weeks, you and I need to act right now to do just that.

Your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation will help:
* Create and promote public policies that put America first and reject globalism.
* Dismantle the administrative state, whose leftist bureaucrats want to push globalism, not help the American people.
* Educate millions of Americans on the dangers of globalism.

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12718828?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

During this holiday season of joy and thanksgiving, I want you to know just how grateful I am for another opportunity to serve you in the Florida House. I also want to encourage the district to put one another first and help out those in need in our community.

Although my fellow legislators and I are winding down as the Christmas holiday approaches, we are excited to get right to work for you in the new year. It has been an honor to be your voice in the Florida House, and I look forward to building on our good work in 2025. As always, [please do not hesitate to reach out to me](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=b5ce5550fc&e=d1c1b9864f) if there is something I can do for you. I would be more than happy to talk about the issues important to our community!
---
| | **Gearing Up for the 2025 Legislative Session in Tallahassee**
---
|
---
| At the beginning of December, I made the trip to Tallahassee for the first interim committee week for the Florida House of Representatives. While in our capital city, I also had the opportunity to meet with the Florida Chamber of Commerce, who presented me with a 2024 Honor Roll Award. I will always support legislation that puts business first! It has been exciting to meet with so many organizations and constituents, both in Tallahassee and here in our district, to prepare for this upcoming legislative session.
---
| | **Governor’s Holiday Reception **
---
|
---
| I had the pleasure of attending the Governor’s holiday reception for the second year in a row! It is always great to see a room filled with familiar faces coming together to celebrate the joy of the holiday season.
---
| | **Ocala/Marion County Tourism Annual Meeting**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| It was great to attend the Ocala/Marion County Tourism Annual Meeting at Silver Springs State Park. I was encouraged to see a full house and excited to learn more about the great things Marion County has done and will continue to do to bring more people here to experience our amazing community. This year, there was an estimated economic impact of over $67 million brought to our region. It is safe to say that business is booming in Marion County!

I also had the opportunity to meet with some incredible CRNAs that reside within the district. I greatly appreciated having this meeting to hear more about their roles within our community’s healthcare system.
---
| | **Meeting with Grace Christian School**
---
|
---
| I had the privilege of joining Senator Stan McClain for a meeting with Grace Christian School. I enjoyed learning more about their school and how they provide for our children.
---
| | **Meeting with the CEP Ocala/Marion Leadership Class**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| It was great to join the entire Marion County Delegation to talk to this year’s CEP Ocala/Marion Leadership Class. We had the opportunity to share more about ourselves and answer some questions that the class had for us.
---
| | **“Home for the Holidays” Adoption Event**
---
|
---
---
| My wife, Jenny, and I attended the “Home for the Holidays” adoption event for the second year in a row. We got to watch 18 kids get adopted into their forever family. This event is such a warm and wholesome experience, and I look forward to attending this incredible event for years to come.
---
| | **Groundbreaking for New Marion Oaks High School**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| It was a pleasure to attend the groundbreaking for the new high school in Marion Oaks. This is the first high school that has been built in Ocala since 2003. Our community keeps growing, and we have to continue to meet its needs. Thank you to the Marion County School Board for making this possible!
---
|
---
| | I hope you have a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!

I look forward to sharing with you again in 2025.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=42b9e29905) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=42b9e29905).

---
