body:
Can you take our December WFP member survey? | | | Can you take our December WFP member survey? We value hearing from each and every one of you, and your responses this month will be especially helpful as we plan for 2025: **[Take the survey »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRK680HRuv8YDi3Fg9cQWCt7IeENAYcKJqCT1SXCUFCkoxi6FS_j4FHcet1SsQVsEiGwwl0NLX6RRttZOWBSOFvuWFJxIlwAU5Z_arQhbHy-ugj-zdq-78t0Q1mRq4PrLDp7vXbFfaDKFNYiXwu_XWqI_oTlM_qz4gszlHPLTcu7qUKb9Hcyh_r58PfNxYSdid-KX1nClQjrTG50_4NEpYfLVdhYxRXtXGowyJ7gKJy7_HGZBTbiXGxglhMhOaKXZFDCHZsjgBUsXekYfxSj8hMJ/4cd/hzhBSR00S8ONLpLM_2qjPQ/h0/h001.dfEKqfJpOxb4da5CcslWMeIZ_u1SqwwCtAPWZgMpiNs)** Peter,
Ever wonder why we send you these invitations to [**participate in our national WFP member surveys**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRK680HRuv8YDi3Fg9cQWCt7IeENAYcKJqCT1SXCUFCkoxi6FS_j4FHcet1SsQVsEiGwwl0NLX6RRttZOWBSOFvu38U5NrXDY1XGzGECarfWTON9erTJOP9bgkjNgpKsK4xNmpyZl8lWxmMLSk6tmcNbfCPTT9osyyZh-vpBUF2quvUi7RVhkL2LlBJIJGLxb71tFJlGhMkUa39gytHhQQ7BkCaFL8kOeDjz-5jjZZOKGuldVtQNwpPKZZvsw5j4_7iW9uEu5VqF_SWdm_QW0nMD/4cd/hzhBSR00S8ONLpLM_2qjPQ/h1/h001.ya7yqpAwJMfAd0kakhA6eYbsy6CEP4oAP77lve0WtN8), or whether your answers matter? You probably receive similar-looking emails from a lot of campaigns and organizations. But here’s the truth: many of them probably don’t care one bit about what you have to say in your responses, and are only looking to see if you will donate. **Not us, Peter.** Each and every month, we read through your responses in surveys like these. Over the course of 2024, we've shared monthly results with leadership at the Working Families Party — and those results have helped guide our strategy as a party. And your responses have already been helpful as we start planning for 2025. For instance, here’s what you told us your top three priorities were in our last survey from November:
1. _Fighting back against Trump and MAGA policies at the federal level_
2. _Organizing to win pro-working families policies and defend communities at the local level_
3. _Electing more champions at the state and local level and in special elections_

Member surveys aren’t the only input we take into account when deliberating on strategy or priorities. But your responses _do_ matter to us. **We are grateful for any contribution you can make to help us keep building governing power for working people — whether that’s volunteering your time and skills, lending your financial support, or even just sharing your thoughts and ideas in surveys like this one.** [**Take our December WFP member survey now — it should only take a few minutes at most:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRK680HRuv8YDi3Fg9cQWCt7IeENAYcKJqCT1SXCUFCkoxi6FS_j4FHcet1SsQVsEiGwwl0NLX6RRttZOWBSOFvukpdfxpCyRhkSlBvE0NGTyKxhs-_yM57KsIcMHIliZFCDUcw0ckmUEknBO8LgObeRRq3f6RDyNPZsMc_awPuG-jsvHhLnSDliyC1YwIn_KSi0NNb0RIvK6fJxs-HJnISUklbGnLquKJz5Mr49Apod23aPoyXgPcaKYNAx6o_TFSAJLUrHRRM-cDRHwXZvD8Nc/4cd/hzhBSR00S8ONLpLM_2qjPQ/h2/h001.xxnGEBIbSSKDlKb4YWv7a3tDuIuw1280krxU56mjgUg) [****](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRK680HRuv8YDi3Fg9cQWCt7IeENAYcKJqCT1SXCUFCkoxi6FS_j4FHcet1SsQVsEiGwwl0NLX6RRttZOWBSOFvu21Bgjr7Cjq2Ao2zQTBJKMpQ7gPwL0juRXr9WUvs_M8Qxfs8P-r9V5D-FSCeEKlbPTbo1e1sPV3okMkDb8xDXjdSHKXSdeM2vzAlCxBhwo3CgWYGjJC6XK_WF6Vz4t1QVOW56c7uMd3oJyZ0uwzEh6n4DG0Xe7_NGo3dKPPQ0uY26P2Em29Kr12-uLrE0eY49/4cd/hzhBSR00S8ONLpLM_2qjPQ/h3/h001.U6on0krtBjXtAvj1pjk_RSAw1STg0W7c7COCk0mj8Ow) clean_body: Can you take our December WFP member survey? | | | Can you take our December WFP member survey? We value hearing from each and every one of you, and your responses this month will be especially helpful as we plan for 2025: Peter, Ever wonder why we send you these invitations to , or whether your answers matter? You probably receive similar-looking emails from a lot of campaigns and organizations. But here’s the truth: many of them probably don’t care one bit about what you have to say in your responses, and are only looking to see if you will donate. Not us, Peter. Each and every month, we read through your responses in surveys like these. Over the course of 2024, we've shared monthly results with leadership at the Working Families Party — and those results have helped guide our strategy as a party. And your responses have already been helpful as we start planning for 2025. For instance, here’s what you told us your top three priorities were in our last survey from November: 1. Fighting back against Trump and MAGA policies at the federal level 2. Organizing to win pro-working families policies and defend communities at the local level 3. Electing more champions at the state and local level and in special elections Member surveys aren’t the only input we take into account when deliberating on strategy or priorities. But your responses do matter to us. We are grateful for any contribution you can make to help us keep building governing power for working people — whether that’s volunteering your time and skills, lending your financial support, or even just sharing your thoughts and ideas in surveys like this one. Thank you for all you do, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Sad News about Frank Bellotti
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m very saddened to be writing to you today to share the sad news that former Massachusetts Attorney General and towering figure in the Democratic Party, Frank Bellotti, has passed away at the age of 101.
He was a powerful presence in Massachusetts politics throughout a career that spanned four decades. In his time as Lieutenant Governor, and during the twelve years he served as Attorney General, his love of politics was only matched by the respect he held for those he served. His tireless work on behalf of the people of the Commonwealth established the standard for the modern state AG’s Office, a model that carries on today here and across the country.
He was a dedicated member of the Democratic Party, and we all will dearly miss his leadership, counsel and boundless enthusiasm that marked his 101 years of life.
Our sincerest condolences to the Bellotti family and all his many friends.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Frank_-1000x751.jpg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/dba55fe2-3277-49a3-a5b6-a77ec7b6e678-050323_gd_QUI_Bellotti21.jpeg]
With sympathy,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Peter, we’re getting together before session starts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Peter,
The 2025 legislative session is just around the corner, and your Tennessee House Democratic Caucus is excited to get back to work for Tennessee families.
To kick off the 2026 cycle, we are pleased to invite you to our pre-session fundraiser in Nashville on Thursday, January 9th! We’re putting together the host committee now and would be honored to add your name [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th] . The host levels begin at $250, and tickets are $100.
JOIN OUR HOST COMMITTEE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th]
Join me and my fellow Caucus members to celebrate the new year, discuss what’s ahead in the state legislature, and learn more about Democrats’ efforts to promote policies that truly benefit all Tennesseans.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th]
I look forward to seeing you all.
Warm regards,
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
Chairman, TN House Democratic Caucus
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashjan9th]

name: Hoosiers for Haggard
subject: One Busy Weekend!
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9025275125ce/on-the-road-again-17994236?e=72dace1453)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
# One Busy Weekend
---
| Last weekend I made sure I continued my work meeting with constituents and local leaders alike. On Friday I made it down to French Lick for the annual Farm Bureau AgElect Luncheon where leaders met to discuss the continued importance of supporting our farmers. Thank you Rep. Culp for showing me around and the wonderful introductions!
---
|
---
| Then on Sunday I joined fellow marines and members of the Mooresville community for the annual wreath laying ceremony to honor our veterans. I am glad I was able to attend and hear heroic stories of America’s warriors!
---
|
---
|
---
| To cap off a busy Sunday, I made it down to Owen County for their GOP Christmas party where I talked with local leaders and talk about the importance of this upcoming legislative session while celebrating a successful year. Rep Smith also had the opportunity to show off our Superbowl rings even though only of us were on the Colts.
---
|
---
| Finally if you haven’t already, check out our website and feel free to send it to friends and family in the district!
---

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Today the Electoral College makes it official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now is the time to revitalize our party and build a lasting coalition that can win.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241217-4597-footer&t=1&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)
**Peter, today the Electoral College is meeting in all 50 states to make it official: Donald Trump will be sworn in as president once again on January 20.**
It’s a deeply saddening result that’s going to lead to a dangerous and chaotic presidential term — which means we can’t afford to waste any time as we get ready to fight back.
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241217?amount=3&refcode=em20241217-4597&refcode2=4597_420207_MBflQr&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)**
**While the Electoral College is meeting, Pramila is working with fellow progressives to chart the path forward:**
➡️ How we fight back against the worst of Trump’s policies, defend our democracy, and protect our rights
➡️ How we overcome the corrupting influence of Big Money in politics and create a government that puts working people ahead of billionaires
➡️ How we win back the voters we lost in 2024 by organizing around a bold, populist, working class agenda
Now is not the time to despair. Now is the time to revitalize our party and build a lasting coalition that can win. And since Pramila doesn’t take corporate PAC money, she can’t do any of this work without your support.
[**Peter, if you’re with Pramila in the fight to defend our democracy and create a government that serves the interests of working people, will you pitch in $3 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241217?refcode=em20241217-4597&amount=3&refcode2=4597_420207_MBflQr&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241217?amount=3&refcode=em20241217-4597&refcode2=4597_420207_MBflQr&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241217-4597-footer&t=2&refcode2=4597_420207_MBflQr&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4597%2E420207%2EMBflQr)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: Terrified this Christmas season
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call| | | I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaa779f53dd748f3b7a77a241cf91798&_e=f41E8010MWyjon_7PaGTmg3g0VsUJ4qXpjOptmx3rgYFYk7FLQNypxmnQqAwD7vUiATRVhVrLxUEVcOhbeSYgxoa6RRGpYUjwHbtt77ZhQAq5hc895pfGECDNVEy_aWKf9kQS8M0_-vw2hq848rIvnX8ryp9Q7nt7yqGZjHs6LJe9T_YHCLJFmBgCLgJsQj1Mlxk6gcWx-wCB8DlRBSuu-EtMBXjsi2CATIwUX9WDGYmlj9Yq2kPelTeTiHrOgWbK0BlCj6_0Kwc6xG6KfECbRB5jNwKXx8oUZFLR4tUNSXxh3vRzCOvHi4NVM6ilUe3o_vXI9ZKr-sKpAIurmq_A5JHirz-ULcm9b6-iETD8ZSN0LvOnX5lpUnxiFagwgYaKtaZ-KaguE7SPXOzjhupOF6KRx-gUcnncMg1cViPB_c%3D)
---
Looking at it used to make me so happy. It brought back all the wonderful memories we've made as a family during the Christmas season. But now it makes me cry realizing that this might be the last Christmas our little boys get to spend with their father.My husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department.I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster......but from a Soros-funded, anti-police prosecutor. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaa779f53dd748f3b7a77a241cf91798&_e=f41E8010MWyjon_7PaGTmg3g0VsUJ4qXpjOptmx3rgYFYk7FLQNypxmnQqAwD7vUiATRVhVrLxUEVcOhbeSYgxoa6RRGpYUjwHbtt77ZhQAq5hc895pfGECDNVEy_aWKf9kQS8M0_-vw2hq848rIvnX8ryp9Q7nt7yqGZjHs6LJe9T_YHCLJFmBgCLgJsQj1Mlxk6gcWx-wCB8DlRBSuu-EtMBXjsi2CATIwUX9WDGYmlj9Yq2kPelTeTiHrOgWbMYNlUqAdJsTucXJzl9IhK4Nxw4z3JXJUIfGbyIfW_RUz1-14CdU7R_CWdxGOC1cK7MwW-qLWrPldBKWJDE451-0eRKst8UTwS20-gA6oPBhrcmQTUjsP6hdwUgmKx7pm0TrcZBjXCOWm4loOkUTrod_5lfubNtfPKTs8W48c1bM%3D)** Instead of enjoying this Christmas season, my family will be thinking about and dreading the coming of February when **this Soros-funded prosecutor will try to rip** **my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for 11 years -- for saving a fellow officer's life.** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, moved to detain the suspect who was carrying a knife, the suspect got violent.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him.In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us.I couldn't have been more wrong.Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black......this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious.My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer.But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys.And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks......Brad will miss 11 years of Christmases, birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games.As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family.Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson.Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available.So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaa779f53dd748f3b7a77a241cf91798&_e=f41E8010MWyjon_7PaGTmg3g0VsUJ4qXpjOptmx3rgYFYk7FLQNypxmnQqAwD7vUiATRVhVrLxUEVcOhbeSYgxoa6RRGpYUjwHbtt77ZhQAq5hc895pfGECDNVEy_aWKf9kQS8M0_-vw2hq848rIvnX8ryp9Q7nt7yqGZjHs6LJe9T_YHCLJFmBgCLgJsQj1Mlxk6gcWx-wCB8DlRBSuu-EtMBXjsi2CATIwUX9WDGYmlj9Yq2kPelTeTiHrOgWbfxG5AWD58HNBFPnfRaeBntIg8wQ0RQz0-1LerS1rr4ohmlVh1-c-FM1y2Uxg-h56xwjmFeXuoRhU03KbQ7NRzREjV8qfrwNNoYpAQPIbBAS2bkCjiDVm3jJEdYICEizEpQyPhf5XlepQ7UNyi5cePht_VyMrrtDBAJU_8mfktB4%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. [**So I pray this Christmas season you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.****this Christmas season****you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaa779f53dd748f3b7a77a241cf91798&_e=f41E8010MWyjon_7PaGTmg3g0VsUJ4qXpjOptmx3rgYFYk7FLQNypxmnQqAwD7vUiATRVhVrLxUEVcOhbeSYgxoa6RRGpYUjwHbtt77ZhQAq5hc895pfGECDNVEy_aWKf9kQS8M0_-vw2hq848rIvnX8ryp9Q7nt7yqGZjHs6LJe9T_YHCLJFmBgCLgJsQj1Mlxk6gcWx-wCB8DlRBSuu-EtMBXjsi2CATIwUX9WDGYmlj9Yq2kPelTeTiHrOgWbpHT8x8NcaGvjphmX8vWxklgiv4vlI89YvkwQOZ6G26vS7FfV7PSewBqcnjvver4Osx9N61EleCwrmdwGOzSeZO4qkUHYmWBJORF17e3evout7hAzNCR5wzUtQYHSHlvsEUebhigVg9qm6-FJUSPklXlDE-2Kzqhnt4EdYCcJP68%3D)**** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs.No matter what you’re able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. This Christmas season my boys, and I are terrified that this might be our last one as a family. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- **[**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaa779f53dd748f3b7a77a241cf91798&_e=f41E8010MWyjon_7PaGTmg3g0VsUJ4qXpjOptmx3rgYFYk7FLQNypxmnQqAwD7vUiATRVhVrLxUEVcOhbeSYgxoa6RRGpYUjwHbtt77ZhQAq5hc895pfGECDNVEy_aWKf9kQS8M0_-vw2hq848rIvnX8ryp9Q7nt7yqGZjHs6LJe9T_YHCLJFmBgCLgJsQj1Mlxk6gcWx-wCB8DlRBSuu-EtMBXjsi2CATIwUX9WDGYmlj9Yq2kPelTeTiHrOgWbcPlHEGLpDbqK4AMZb-iJ7nzaKeOPw_gmXzcPhIkHLfoTPBqBUdoaWwfViot7NEcGKPorQJde6qsF73JKIclEsJpXxtBEbwCZUdcfnzXbhv_5V29lyy8tIwY5xUHCIWFO4BaCepBG6FWV9dECPn9VI5DKhCD-RBWcDWgn85IDMlE%3D)** P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out of time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=eaa779f53dd748f3b7a77a241cf91798&_e=f41E8010MWyjon_7PaGTmoM4C2w85zzrp0qCUvDZJxwjzU608v_icBGsNI4tEdzzqI9pjHRNtnt_-ttg5gSvozaejdj5hn55GbFmgUm5mJr96qD52bWBURNb-kaNcFuV7zQ0Eub2e8oTygELQ-ZLF6IyIbQsRxEFP-FLWraWylB3-s2DAJZLBZFi1hMwO8YIE4H3phSfUAOQxUj2zbBj0qBAI0C0FaDqvIbqu2hFQEixIJmT0MbRoUCldKFQiyyjuN3EzJWpullnbqeSQGsxdeOiv5hPNHPtivdWZzlGnicfgOag4uaXZ4whDPnvpqgbmewbAXLhpUzJW_4Dpl665mQC_ZAoRN9Vz4GvTDCusCv6E-pk2jJj-8ZoMKNIjnZE6w3rTPIc557yloMdtTX_EscIpXJHwb3aub-tDikYOV-6nvQZEWU0M0mH3k6dlp5jTIJ_YLai6sZl1AxkdgMsBljAo3YJD-iQS8-LIlhAKO8ezuSBDvz6Cn4rGJr-OHuQuauDzRvzkIW2GRS-kse0RK-ncx0Y8nJvsQM986JjjCIr0G8G2sSV595Km-Q1QYhnoDbfSl1Qpud_5V0FYS9d8s8Gxfzjzg87Bx1q3JgSYhy9uF1bmUMHd8uAMDCixFwqbjRR50HsQSrvA5aIada1H3jiUiVa27UfTVPf21C-8rkZEzA0SJOzfD-UEgo3fx2VGWyCZf5ivrScVAaPnPhY8lCeNRDMzjmdgUvhQd-80DP2cPvZS3ZGx-w3Wp_MJ21v-P2mJ2yRF69ozmWKZ29l6F8hLCjpX3JWWtwlwiAZ096IfkVecv2KJBvCVMAKNyxUf58sxPrXD8BEIW-HeKpLyFZ7Shb597IiVVGxw-nctweKGjVq6zIl0gbgDvubURJpZRdhJKqZMH6ZhHuJVZ9ApgXqo6N6P61b7IaR29GrT8c5KGIMsG94DtUUi5s7cFlf9DzwF2-eHvM0BJrT6HK9xPxLihFM995le9JPE2f2YQ33ReXPGRs9iGEAq2RyrO2t8GblFSApwZAmFH6C-TP4Ug%3D%3D)

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I lived next to one of Donald Trump's golf courses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98861859/518059760/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFhYjc4NC1iZmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8xdnOdaAf5aj-FZMBqaGrFvnebcKDuw8EXNG0OgzJI=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98861860/518059761/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241217_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFhYjc4NC1iZmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8xdnOdaAf5aj-FZMBqaGrFvnebcKDuw8EXNG0OgzJI=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98861861/518059762/-1361974956?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20241217_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDFhYjc4NC1iZmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8xdnOdaAf5aj-FZMBqaGrFvnebcKDuw8EXNG0OgzJI=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

clean_body: | = Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ = Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain. I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips. I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx. = My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family. Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families. You see, the New York City government shoveled over $100 million in government aid to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street. But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families. When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s time to clean house.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

By this time next month, your Congressmember — and 434 others — will have
been sworn in.

Will they stand up to corporate lobbies, billionaire CEOs, and MAGA
fascism? Or is it time for your community to nominate a real fighter to
represent their interests?

Justice Democrats is looking for the next slate of working-class
candidates to run for Congress and challenge out-of-touch Democratic
incumbents in the 2026 election cycle.

[ https://justicedemocrats.com/nominate/?source=em20241217-36240&akid=36240%2E1203867%2E-VDKc- ]Know someone who would make a great representative of your community in
Congress? Nominate them to run with Justice Democrats’ support now →

[ https://justicedemocrats.com/nominate/?source=em20241217-36240&akid=36240%2E1203867%2E-VDKc- ]Graphic with the U.S. Capitol that says "It's time to clean House."

While the Democratic establishment looks for those who can afford to run
for office, we look for local leaders supported and trusted by their own
communities.

As we identify blue districts with out-of-touch, corporate Democrats to
mount primary challenges against, we’re looking for people who are:

* Doing important work in their community;
* Trusted and highly-networked, whose voice and opinions impact a larger
group of people;
* Doing critical grassroots organizing or advocacy on issues impacting
tokenized and typically ignored communities.

[ https://justicedemocrats.com/nominate/?source=em20241217-36240&akid=36240%2E1203867%2E-VDKc- ]Do you know anyone who fits the bill? Nominate them here!

[ https://justicedemocrats.com/nominate/?source=em20241217-36240&akid=36240%2E1203867%2E-VDKc- ]Submit Your Nomination

If we’re going to build the bloc and send more working-class progressives
to Congress, there’s no time to waste — our work must start now.

Thanks for helping us find and support the leaders we deserve.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241217-36240-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36240_1203867_-VDKc-&akid=36240%2E1203867%2E-VDKc-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36240%2E1203867%2E-VDKc-

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American Culture War. Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will: Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement , including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and MANY MORE, Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS -- with 15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! -- so that our pro-America Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025! body:
#
We wanted to share an important update in the fight for reproductive rights in Texas and country-wide:
This is the first lawsuit dealing with abortion state laws that are at direct odds with each other.
Politicians like Greg Abbott and Ken Paxton will do everything they can to control women’s bodies and reproduction—it’s disgusting.
All Texans deserve the freedom to make their own decisions about their own body, their own health care, and their own future. Texas women deserve the freedom to decide if, when, and with whom to start a family.
We will be sure to keep you updated as this story develops.
More soon,
Team Powered by People

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: Sending you peace this season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98862135/518060506/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20241217_EN_Holidays_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_MentalhealthHolidays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBjYTk1OC1jMWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8YHd6xYquUpsbq3Otapn-eGMGrCq29TU8bBp56zlPqQ=&emci=a67c4844-b8bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=8e0ca958-c1bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=30096098) | The holidays can be a time of joy and warmth, but I know they can also bring challenges, especially for those navigating mental health struggles.

A National Alliance on Mental Illness (NAMI) study showed that 64% of people with mental illness report holidays can make their conditions worse. It can also be a time that highlights loss, loneliness or grief for individuals and families.

It is critical to take care of your mental health and support those around you during this time period. There are many resources available to those, and if you ever are in need of urgent help, you can call or text 988 anytime.

Support for those facing mental health challenges is one of my highest priorities, especially for those most vulnerable. And as we move into the next session of Congress, I will continue to fight for legislation on this critical issue.

After this tough year, we must foster care and support for each other together as a community. I hope you feel supported and cared for this holiday season, whether surrounded by loved ones or finding quiet moments of peace on your own.

During this holiday season, please take care of yourself and those around you.

Sincerely,

Bonnie
---
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

Here are the stakes: 1. MAGA Republicans hold the slimmest of majorities. That means they’re margins to get things done, rests on Democrats standing together and chipping away at MAGA power wherever possible. 2. With Donald Trump poised to nominate several Republicans to key cabinet positions, there will be open seats in the House, narrowing their fragile majority. Outraising Republicans to end the year could be the difference between winning and losing in next year’s special elections! 3. | | This election season we fought hard. We organized, we knocked on doors. We made calls and gave our time and energy. And even though we lost, we made important gains in Georgia, and in many states we enshrined our rights. We are allowed to feel how we need to feel — but we also have to pick ourselves up and get back to work. This community will have an important role to play as we face another Trump administration and threats to our democracy. [**That’s why I’m asking if you can make a donation today to support Fair Fight’s work to stop voter suppression in 2025.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98862663/518062614/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241217_f_VotingVoice_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTczYjc5OS1jMmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc6KYJg6s-7qX3hRAdusWQjcYxXeH8Ap7TrSlODku3E=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98862667/518062618/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241217_f_VotingVoice_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTczYjc5OS1jMmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc6KYJg6s-7qX3hRAdusWQjcYxXeH8Ap7TrSlODku3E=)
---
Fair Fight remains a crucial, trusted voice nationally on anti-voter issues. It was created for moments like this, born out of a need to address longstanding, systemic problems, and shine a light on the work to ensure we can make our voices heard.
The legislative session will be starting soon in Georgia, which means we need to keep an eye on MAGA-extremists, and on Voter Suppressor-in-Chief, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp.
I know we have the capacity to move forward once again. It may be on the state level; it may even have to begin on the local level. We will only advance if we take all elections seriously and go to the voting booth thinking about the collective good of our country, because voting is our voice.
[**Fair Fight needs to be ready to respond to attempts to undermine free and fair elections — your contribution today can help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98862675/518062622/-1136485954?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241217_f_VotingVoice_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTczYjc5OS1jMmJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cc6KYJg6s-7qX3hRAdusWQjcYxXeH8Ap7TrSlODku3E=)
We can’t slow down now. Thank you for powering this incredible work.
Christina Greer
Fair Fight

name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Short survey: Same-day voter registration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121724_2&amount=25]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
17 states and Washington, DC allow for same-day voter registration so that everyone can have their voice heard. New York recently added the ability to register same-day, so we want to hear from voters in your area about your priorities.
Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team:
Should more states implement same-day voter registration?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121724_2&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=121724_2&amount=15]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121724_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121724_2&amount=25]

name: Urgent Reminder (VPP)
subject: Sign now: Release the Jack Smith Report! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This may be our last chance
| **Friend, you’re the only Democrat in your area who hasn’t signed our petition to release the Jack Smith report!**

Donald Trump is hell-bent on burying and DESTROYING all of Jack Smith’s incredible evidence, and we’re running out of time to release it!

[**Your grassroots support makes all the difference: Add your name to release the Jack Smith report NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report/?source=VPP_20241217_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18246%2E878179%2EXB5N5v) | [YOUR SIGNATURE MISSING: SIGN IN THE NEXT 5 MINUTES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/release-smith-report/?source=VPP_20241217_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18246%2E878179%2EXB5N5v)
---
Don’t let time run out,

_The Voter Protection Project_

**-BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE-**
**__BREAKING:__**
**LEGAL ANALYST: “If the [Jack Smith] report is not issued now, I have to believe the Trump administration will _bury_ and probably _destroy_ all of that evidence.”**

subject: The Senate has prioritized voting on President Biden’s remaining judicial nominees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
With so much at stake, it’s critical to have judges who will uphold the rule of law.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98862932/518063268/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2M5N2Y3MC1jM2JjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_O5dY5453xjnZz4BVS2iwIrqXqqb3GCQgUZljbdrC20=&emci=97b2c571-b9bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=4cc97f70-c3bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=7731215)
---

| | As we head into the end of the year, the Senate has prioritized voting on President Biden's remaining judicial nominees. We have been protecting our courts against extremism by confirming judges who will rule in cases by using the Constitution and precedent as their guide, not right-wing political ideology. When we've finished, we can also celebrate that President Biden has appointed – and the Senate confirmed – over 200 federal judges. Biden's nominees are the most qualified, diverse bunch of judges ever, mirroring the beautiful diversity of our country. These are fair-minded judges who will rule for the people, not the powerful. With so much at stake, it's critical to have judges who will uphold the rule of law. On issues like health care, abortion, environmental regulations, antitrust laws, and so much more that matter to Americans, these judges will be pivotal in upholding the good work we've accomplished over the last few years and be a bulwark against Trump decimating our courts. We will keep pushing to confirm as many judges as possible by the end of this session because they will be vital to protecting our civil rights in the coming years, and rest assured that beginning in 2025, Democrats will spend the next term vigorously vetting all of Trump's judicial nominations. She’ll work to lower the costs of prescription drugs and take action to ensure more equitable care. As April prepares to get sworn in this January, protecting the programs that millions of Americans rely on every day remains top of mind.

[_**If, like us, you think Social Security and Medicare should be protected, sign our petition below. April plans on delivering for Marylanders, and showing supporter enthusiasm will help drive those efforts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98863193/518064165/-709235284?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJhOWUxMWMtYzViYy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAwZDNhOWQ1ODQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rlKgq48ZiyUAgMt9Z0Pzlm1nw9WcDYMM5Tqh4pwmUeo=&emci=f7ed6e08-96bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=c2a9e11c-c5bc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=16017524)

name: Sarah Elfreth
subject: Another orientation in the books
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
The Freshman class of the 119th Congress spent 48 hours at the Institute of Politics at Harvard Kennedy School, taking a crash course on the economy, foreign policy, the appropriations process, the implications of artificial intelligence, and more.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98864012/518066873/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMxNzgzZC1jOWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qHOTsUVuMf44M_ug8HWK8GO2UzIRWqVusYkvS2GDJDQ=)
---
| As a part of our orientation, the Freshman class of the 119th Congress spent 48 hours at the Institute of Politics at Harvard Kennedy School, taking a crash course on the economy, foreign policy, the appropriations process, the implications of artificial intelligence, and more.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98864013/518066874/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWMxNzgzZC1jOWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qHOTsUVuMf44M_ug8HWK8GO2UzIRWqVusYkvS2GDJDQ=)
In between robust policy discussions amongst ourselves and policy experts, we continued to learn about one another’s districts and priorities, forge bipartisan relationships (looking forward to working with Michael Baumgartner from Washington State!), and meet a few Kennedy School students from our states (Ethan Kelly from Prince George’s County is a rising star!).

On the horizon:
**🇺🇸** Swearing-in on January 3rd
**☕️** Freshman orientation, round 3, mid-January
**🗓️** Opening of our District office in late-January

More soon,

Sarah Elfreth

## Elon made the BIGGEST difference, but all the A-List celebs? Waste of money...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a9a7179c-14e6-48c8-a95e-66d3613d8812?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Stories I'm Reading...
[120+ Retired Generals, Admirals Sign Letter Backing Pete Hegseth for Defense Secretary ](https://substack.com/redirect/a9800566-e398-4b1e-ad53-cd8d30223f9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via Daily Wire
[Stephanie Ruhle Praises Trump's Availability After Calling Him For an Interview](https://substack.com/redirect/43e1d786-c022-4bb0-afb5-51bbbbe1fdb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via Mediaite
[Trump's DOJ cleaning crew will sweep up cronyism](https://substack.com/redirect/63d8d934-1a26-4251-97b7-5458ae3e987d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via Washington Examiner
[From big tech to the media, the rush to kiss Trump's ring is on ](https://substack.com/redirect/bd39cad8-6089-4da0-9218-c70bfdf118c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via Politico
[Victims 'shocked' after Biden grants clemency to 'kids-for-cash' judge and $54 million](https://substack.com/redirect/129fb752-5acf-4219-b259-9a44d139d017?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via CNN
[Martha MacCallum Can't Believe John Kirby's Outrageous to Her Question: 'Why Not Just Take One Down and Figure Out What's Going On?'](https://substack.com/redirect/fd9731e0-3464-4c2f-9225-170687fb512e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- via Leo Terrell
## **How to get tickets to the Inauguration of President Trump ...**
I have been getting lots of questions about tickets to the events surrounding the Inauguration. There are two ways. Your members of Congress has a limited number that you can request. Additionally, the Inaugural Committee sells packages. You can download the packet here for information on each package and the checkout link is below.

## Become a VIP, or gift a subscription!
There is a lot of great info, behind the scenes pics, and unfiltered insight in each newsletter below the paywall for my VIPs -- so please subscribe or consider giving someone the gift of a subscription for Christmas this year!
[Give the gift of VIP access](https://substack.com/redirect/9b947db3-284b-4d73-acf2-c7b12dac99f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Upcoming on The Sean Spicer Show...
Christmas is coming, but don't worry we've got great content lined up! In the next week we've got Mike Davis, Erik Prince of Blackwater, another great panel and Victor Davis Hanson.
[Subscribe & turn on notifications](https://substack.com/redirect/b893ea52-52ad-4619-be29-1344b402b3a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## ABC Settles - the Legacy Media is Dying
This weekend it was announced that ABC had a settled a lawsuit by agreeing to pay $15 million to President Trump's future library. They also (meaning George Stephanopolous) agreed to a public apology.
They had lied about charges against Trump - he knew it and sued them. He was right to do it and it is GREAT news ABC settled.
While many in the media including bedwetters like Chuck Todd, Jim Acosta, Politico and The Washington Post decried the settlement and what it means for journalism, the outcome was great for the country...

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: You understand the urgency of the situation
body:
2025 is a critical year

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=566f2db4a4064958b6072122b70ccf66&_e=07_VpXdO8W__8sCQ6ggWojVNAHq5rNriBG2pG6cEk0Dr33Y4Rc-W6mG1UgV47zuvnGtPJOl9rR5MnXmjwz7zUKopum_3FNpfYd96DFTNKd9T1PHUVkl10Qu7zySm5ll1Om15yplaOTKU6oWDhJs90qMfrfhP_n-9qMX_62PeaeIZVP6ZgPN8cqAtv2mH5sgLfz9Pdk9km7vXHlyDstLx8qdf2_QUBysAiApJhrGn_EOcO7bgWrFzk6o-dn3xsyOB8_Az1DlgRxG9X6F430Edzph6eQvt-ZiO8YHcM5dY9rxeXZcGqLzy1r8g-SQvCBfd7ftLprMmVzzGY5zAYv5_7MOFq07XMsigYKUTth1CP-N5JKdyKz0XtF-Kj8xDv45z)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=566f2db4a4064958b6072122b70ccf66&_e=07_VpXdO8W__8sCQ6ggWojVNAHq5rNriBG2pG6cEk0Dr33Y4Rc-W6mG1UgV47zuvnGtPJOl9rR5MnXmjwz7zUKopum_3FNpfYd96DFTNKd9T1PHUVkl10Qu7zySm5ll1Om15yplaOTKU6oWDhJs90qMfrfhP_n-9qMX_62PeaeIZVP6ZgPN8cqAtv2mH5sgLfz9Pdk9km7vXHlyDstLx8qdf2_QUBysAiApJhrGn_EP4mFmF1ZAL60vi6cEy4mmKKik8R6L9IR-82I2zwdFBRXF6WI3jjjlr9uMkuLv_NPZjIpd7peMcxWFKsFohwQz1SUjgcWTZUcPbdhGGY8Ojj4GLkW5wdP8ZS09v7E4AWRd_hda9o5-g5BGNzNda384E)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=566f2db4a4064958b6072122b70ccf66&_e=07_VpXdO8W__8sCQ6ggWojVNAHq5rNriBG2pG6cEk0Dr33Y4Rc-W6mG1UgV47zuvnGtPJOl9rR5MnXmjwz7zUKopum_3FNpfYd96DFTNKd9T1PHUVkl10Qu7zySm5ll1Om15yplaOTKU6oWDhJs90qMfrfhP_n-9qMX_62PeaeIZVP6ZgPN8cqAtv2mH5sgLfz9Pdk9km7vXHlyDstLx8qdf2_QUBysAiApJhrGn_EPBwGHkRUIMREsxnerf91tN4LevMDA-ndqvkOxpIydOuhbfZbaQIFGJ4Bimk-rdTs8DfE7QKnW77DFB57sT3FrbaxqOt8byJpV4E_A0CYUHT7w8Yj2-6I6_aivnSkKqPDusfLgv-bBERmiQGRb-t-EA)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we’ve made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed—because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** —as it does all its work—while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters’ contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=566f2db4a4064958b6072122b70ccf66&_e=07_VpXdO8W__8sCQ6ggWojVNAHq5rNriBG2pG6cEk0Dr33Y4Rc-W6mG1UgV47zuvnGtPJOl9rR5MnXmjwz7zUKopum_3FNpfYd96DFTNKd9T1PHUVkl10Qu7zySm5ll1Om15yplaOTKU6oWDhJs90qMfrfhP_n-9qMX_62PeaeIZVP6ZgPN8cqAtv2mH5sgLfz9Pdk9km7vXHlyDstLx8qdf2_QUBysAiApJhrGn_EO-gYtGDQMvSLLTKWF7bUhUjxB5KImYjibnM4AFHVqbqu5wIerJlrgijTOHiANA69Y8U-z5R5V7zlWsOpSut7rFqa7Juh3nN2b4uH8sLv3ZW9iEAKSVIDbNTsV8kJscKZY_uuKJ_B5bPf3hvTnTKV5Q)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=566f2db4a4064958b6072122b70ccf66&_t=7mgViWFXCroslnhBv4SXFlT9TZHF7UjCxbmZbCH_510QKf7SHOjMWVyxmUtKZ_hvo9BvwPyFIfhLTGjc0g-8pUbRO0ub0Ucombaeq41UhvWt-7a_ATgTbSl3y-WxCm2h)

---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Thanks to you
body:
---
In November, Nevadans sent me back to Washington to keep serving them in the U.S. Senate. And that’s thanks to grassroots support from people like you, Derek. It was a tough election year here in Nevada. The GOP spent over $75 million against me to try to flip my seat. My opponent and his allies spent tens of millions trying to distort my record and turn me into someone I am not. I’m grateful that voters saw through it, but the unfortunate truth is that this is Republicans’ playbook: Pour millions of dollars into battleground states like mine and attack Democrats up and down the ballot. Thanks to supporters like you, my campaign was able to counter those false Republican attacks, reach voters, and communicate my record of taking on special interests to get things done. We know Republicans will only double down on their attacks in upcoming elections. Flipping the Senate, taking back the House, and winning tight races all over the country is going to require a strong Democratic Party that can invest in every single state party and help us build the resources we’ll need to fight back and compete everywhere. [**That’s why I’m asking: Will you pitch in $3 to support the Democratic National Committee today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)**
---
****
I won’t sugarcoat it, Derek, we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us, and it may not seem like $3 can make a difference right now.
But the truth is that when thousands of Democrats all over the country come together and donate $3 of their own, it can go a very long way in helping win close races. Believe me when I say it made all the difference in my race this year.
[**You can use this link to make your $3 contribution now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)
Thank you again for everything,
Jacky
Jacky Rosen
U.S. Senator for Nevada
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241217_2406_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2426_22930333_Z9ll1J&akid=2426%2E22930333%2EZ9ll1J)

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Liz Urban
subject: Baby’s first Christmas… because of you
body:
As we celebrate the miracle of Christ’s birth, we’re reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=9f2d4e5bd72848cc9b76e2edb9e03a47&_t=uusmwIv8Y_EJMJ0L6KG4tHLkfDhywOHF_W22Q5tIYTXXp2lUKWKcAIThK90W5dYQyktnVphF7mAwSQzLKhL2phA2vovhrTRXwAxm3gts1i1l0dtMDOTzdsungpBc6ymK)_
---
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9f2d4e5bd72848cc9b76e2edb9e03a47&_e=Mne7oIjHqL4L3Kv_EjpV5Rbqrfs0ndOZy7EvxOvvXg73zMyGYycwkStBXUlbuv49RQyPpjuCYHb8HxdOzCztL0LdOHLUi3VYaxChsiavmZyWxxaegeSBtn3QAldgc-z1otGHiMTyDel6AVTUH3ZV_x1-9pNQIBNTISWhbdNHlCst3_AHReX8ZKD-v9eUsROLXqQ9kOyk0hfUL9INrRjN60RNWyM3K8DF5J3r1EHcMs7rWv1RejgoeafUG-fmTX-Gnnrw9CwCLRX3zXc3xcBGh1qcYtk9rkwa_-npO1R9rtwuXdWI8dcBf0nr1f24j0nra2BLQLq-StstKpCOyvJ00DIgCCUtPjDmVexxbVjOnxU%3D)
#
Friend of Life,

As we celebrate the miracle of Christ's birth, we're reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. Yet, thousands of preborn children are at risk every day. Many women facing unplanned pregnancies feel alone and fearful, but your support can offer them hope.

This Christmas, you can help spread the truth that **children are blessings, not burdens.** We're looking for caring, pro-life people like you to step forward and donate $100 or more to give preborn children at risk of abortion their very first Christmas.

What better gift can you give this Christmas than the gift of life itself?

And, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a beautiful etched glass Christmas mug for free as our heartfelt thanks for your support. Each time you hold this mug, you will be reminded of the children who will experience their first Christmas because of you. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9f2d4e5bd72848cc9b76e2edb9e03a47&_e=Mne7oIjHqL4L3Kv_EjpV5Rbqrfs0ndOZy7EvxOvvXg73zMyGYycwkStBXUlbuv49RQyPpjuCYHb8HxdOzCztL0LdOHLUi3VYaxChsiavmZyWxxaegeSBtn3QAldgc-z1otGHiMTyDel6AVTUH3ZV_x1-9pNQIBNTISWhbdNHlCst3_AHReX8ZKD-v9eUsROLXqQ9kOyk0hfUL9INrRjN67swLEszXJ7NpfneLFYvXgUNOclQNPi-eN6fcSC5YXv-4SLt4pgyyj_3D2qOZq2tZaA0J6RTjO5kOLEw65LR0X3XXAgOM6l7XCGXHSe2osCOIU5DzGq4LvYRcTR9DjzsajlmfjwQ65-8ox6HhazFWiI%3D)
Please stand with us for life this Christmas. Every donation helps reach those who need to hear that life is precious. Your generosity will help change hearts and save lives currently at risk this Christmas season.

clean_body: As we celebrate the miracle of Christ’s birth, we’re reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Friend of Life, As we celebrate the miracle of Christ's birth, we're reminded that unexpected pregnancies can bring about love and joy beyond anything we can imagine. Yet, thousands of preborn children are at risk every day. Many women facing unplanned pregnancies feel alone and fearful, but your support can offer them hope. This Christmas, you can help spread the truth that children are blessings, not burdens. We're looking for caring, pro-life people like you to step forward and donate $100 or more to give preborn children at risk of abortion their very first Christmas. What better gift can you give this Christmas than the gift of life itself? And, when you give a gift of $100 or more today, we'll send you a beautiful etched glass Christmas mug for free as our heartfelt thanks for your support. Each time you hold this mug, you will be reminded of the children who will experience their first Christmas because of you. Please stand with us for life this Christmas. Every donation helps reach those who need to hear that life is precious. Your generosity will help change hearts and save lives currently at risk this Christmas season. Click below to make your gift and secure your exclusive mug in time for Christmas. For Life, Liz Urban Donor Service Manager 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 .

name: The Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - A Second Special Guest Announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Announcing our next special guest - Representative Don Davis!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=1)
---
Tuesday, December 17, 2024 | Peter -- Last week, we invited you to our end of year celebration event, _Looking Backward, Moving Forward_. [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=2) Today, we're excited to announce our next special guest speaker. **Representative Don** **Davis** , a Forward-aligned Democrat, won his reelection campaign for NC-1 with Forward's endorsement. He is the first sitting member of the U.S. Congress to affiliate with Forward. Representative Davis, who is joining Senator-Elect Curtis, will speak to what it meant to affiliate with Forward and how that will help him represent the people of his district. You don't want to miss this! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=3 "Register Today!") [Register Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=fTauy-itwlWmXjZxdHIXXdxRao4VlYAUdDO7auT7XRvSUqy8PVTLRow1ubiqmiaAUi4qCMLxPcF0vsswiCG98U9L7fC3eKHzQyOuii4SF2-Egm1e43O6UsXvC8Auio1h&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=3)
---
**Save the Date:_Looking Backward, Moving Forward_ End-of-Year Appreciation Event!**
Mark your calendars for our End-of-Year Appreciation event on **December 18th at 7:15**! This will be a special opportunity to:
* Celebrate what we’ve achieved together in 2024.
* Share our plans for building momentum in 2025.
* Hear from the leaders of the movement how you can have the biggest impact in 2025.

You won't want to miss this event, so register now!
#### A Silent(ish) Auction Opportunity
We're holding a _silent(ish)* auction_ for **a lunch with either Forward Party Co-Founders Andrew Yang or Governor Christine Todd Whitman!** (Both are up for auction)**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=4 "Bid On Lunch With Andrew Yang Now!") [Bid On Lunch With Andrew Yang Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=4)
---
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=5 "Bid On Lunch With Governor Whitman Now!") [Bid On Lunch With Governor Whitman Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=5)
---
Participation is easy! [Just go to this page to bid on lunch with Andrew Yang](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=6) and [this page to bid on lunch with Governor Whitman](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=7) and make a pledge. Whoever makes the highest pledge before 12/19 at 5 pm will win the chance for lunch! If you aren't the winning pledge, you won't have to donate the amount you pledged (but we would appreciate anything you can chip in, anyway!).
#### **Support our 2025 work today!**
To help build momentum into 2025, we've launched a big fundraising push! Two donors came together to commit to a **$20,000 match in December!*** That means every dollar you donate will count double (until we hit $20,000 raised)!
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=8 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=8)
---
Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this year such a success. We’re excited to see what we can accomplish together in 2025—and we hope to celebrate with you on December 18th!
With Thanks,
The Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=9)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=10)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=11)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=12)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=13)
> _*The names of people pledging will not be publicized unless you choose to allow them to be. The highest current pledge amount will be publicized periodically throughout the auction._
> _**[Terms and conditions apply](https://home.forwardparty.com/auction_rules?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=14). The lunch with Andrew Yang would take place in New York City. The lunch with Governor Whitman would take place in Arizona. The Forward Party and its affiliates are not responsible for your travel costs. _
> _***This fundraiser is a joint fundraising effort between Forward Party Hard PAC and Forward Party Super PAC. All donations made through this website will be allocated to the Hard PAC, with matches going to the Super PAC, up to the allotted match amount. All costs will be borne based on the ratio of money raised._
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=15) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=16) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=17) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=18) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=19) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
ForwardParty.com
[Unsubscribe](https://home.forwardparty.com/unsubscribe?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_send_4_v2&n=20)

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: closing the books on 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
The election may be over, but the work to fight back against Republican extremism in Congress and make real progress for our communities has just begun.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98864288/518067982/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-12-17_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjQzMTdiNi1jYWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jcC_MN9byKsMm1Ac4KSeHOp586qRAWVeCkdE8E6n9F4=)
---
| As I prepare for the holidays, I’ve also been working to close the books on 2024 and prepare for the incoming administration in January.

**It goes without saying that a Republican trifecta poses severe risks to Social Security and Medicare, reproductive rights nationwide, and so much more._But I don’t panic, I plan._** We’re facing a challenging few years and our ability to protect our communities depends on what we do now.

The election may be over, but the work to fight back against Republican extremism in Congress and make real progress for our communities has just begun. Before the year ends, we’re committed to building a Defense Fund to prepare us for the next few years of a Trump administration and set the foundation for 2026 victories. When the second Trump administration is sworn in on January 20th, I’m going to need every spare minute working to navigate the challenges–to our freedoms, to the environment, and to the rule of law. The more I raise now, the less time I’ll have to spend fundraising, and the more time I can commit to protecting us and our communities.

[_**We’ve set a goal to raise $20,000 before the end of the year and we’re hoping to reach it with your support. Rep. Nancy Mace **[DESTROYED mainstream media clown George Stephanopoulos](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0252db-640b-4e86-8cde-6508f36092a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an intense interview where he repeatedly falsely claimed Donald Trump was "found liable for rape," resulting in ABC News having to pay a $15 million defamation settlement to Trump.
**[Watch the $15 million interview below:](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0252db-640b-4e86-8cde-6508f36092a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0252db-640b-4e86-8cde-6508f36092a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You've endorsed Donald Trump for president. Judges and two separate juries have found him liable for rape and for defaming the victim of that rape," Stephanopoulos said to Mace, referencing the legal victory of E. Jean Carroll over Trump in a civil case where he was in-fact NOT found liable for rape.
Mace, offended by Stephanopoulos' insinuation **[fired back,](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0252db-640b-4e86-8cde-6508f36092a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "It was not a criminal court!"
Trump was found liable for "sexual abuse" in the civil case, which has a very different definition than "rape" under New York law, a ruling Trump continues to strongly deny.
Carroll described the alleged encounter with Trump during an interview with CNN's Anderson Cooper. "I was not thrown on the ground and ravished," she said. "The word 'rape' carries so many sexual connotations, this was not sexual. It hurt!""
Anderson tries to end the interview before Carroll says one more thing. "I think most people think of rape as sexy, think of the fantasies..."
ABC News **[settled with Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/aa829360-c2c6-4ac6-9faf-8be311f066ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to the amount of $15 million as a charitable contribution to a "Presidential foundation and museum to be established by or for Plaintiff, as Presidents of the United States of America have established in the past."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0252db-640b-4e86-8cde-6508f36092a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Dec 17 | | | | | | | | | | | Rep. Nancy Mace during an intense interview where he repeatedly falsely claimed Donald Trump was "found liable for rape," resulting in ABC News having to pay a $15 million defamation settlement to Trump. "You've endorsed Donald Trump for president. Judges and two separate juries have found him liable for rape and for defaming the victim of that rape," Stephanopoulos said to Mace, referencing the legal victory of E. Jean Carroll over Trump in a civil case where he was in-fact NOT found liable for rape. Mace, offended by Stephanopoulos' insinuation "It was not a criminal court!" Trump was found liable for "sexual abuse" in the civil case, which has a very different definition than "rape" under New York law, a ruling Trump continues to strongly deny. Carroll described the alleged encounter with Trump during an interview with CNN's Anderson Cooper. "I was not thrown on the ground and ravished," she said. "The word 'rape' carries so many sexual connotations, this was not sexual. It hurt!"" Anderson tries to end the interview before Carroll says one more thing. "I think most people think of rape as sexy, think of the fantasies..." ABC News to the amount of $15 million as a charitable contribution to a "Presidential foundation and museum to be established by or for Plaintiff, as Presidents of the United States of America have established in the past." clean_body: HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [] Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida: Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline. To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor). Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account.
