Your state legislators are responsible for making decisions that will most impact your day-to-day life.
Your state legislature decides everything from when and how you vote to the curriculum taught in school classrooms – that’s why it’s vital that we elect strong Democratic leaders who will fight for progress in places like your community and nationwide.
**Even just $1 will help put our party on the path to victory in 2025 and beyond.**
[Will you donate $1 to help elect Democrats, protect our democracy, and defend our fundamental freedoms in state legislatures across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKluwFkSI-FIFj_tOVeSwTNKtrbdlXUE2UcCj34Y0rIw9Sa8PMm_z07o-3yfLlxwCwWoXkMtIGQuuIUog3iHsmzS0Y1YZ4jwNMk9D89ICug7-aQZNKmph-dcdb-b9asS5bJgu8O-rzbo9AbtyYUpzXWFEkpnBewavG-HWalEAGra553Hnr8-5BFOItWg5iMV-HgXN_ON6-WLrp50Yf8gEltPvU1yImj6i83HfiGBajalprn7exD0BFPdT8xSgMnQSdRcwSQrQAMzr3-Bum4BBaHdzNe_YNAfSOPnVOHOREeLKR6UlilY-_RcpzvOJjNtsPZtfena0OaCRROSNrvLnm2lN1BjeLyzE8e_HOAxaPzuQ/4cd/jwPGSWFwQQqB1LKtJM8WUw/h7/h001.WzrlIF91Cdy3Gl5sjj6dSsNPvf84aZ-LHJ0x0M5SYhc)

name: Team Gallego
subject: A VERY special announcement from Ruben and Sydney
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter -
As we approach the holidays, we have some truly incredible news to share:
**Sydney and Ruben are overjoyed to announce that they are expecting their second child!**
Michael and Isla will be getting a little brother this summer, and we couldn’t be more excited.
[**So, from all of us on Team Gallego, we’re writing to ask you to join us in congratulating Sydney and Ruben! Add your name to sign the card and share this beautiful moment!**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/join-us-congratulating-sydney-and-ruben/?source=em241217-1-60&akid=3608%2E734936%2E6qW7An)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/join-us-congratulating-sydney-and-ruben/?source=em241217-1-60&akid=3608%2E734936%2E6qW7An)
Thank you so much!
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Team AOC
subject: Demand better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
When Alexandria won in 2018, her message inspired a lot of people. She was fearless in critiquing politics-as-usual. She proposed big, new ideas — like the Green New Deal — to tackle our most difficult challenges.
While Alexandria’s message resonated across the country, some Democratic Party leaders responded very differently. They called her ideas extreme and more than a few of them attacked her personally.
[We need to make it clear: there’s nothing wrong with new ideas and holding your own Party accountable. Will you make a $5 contribution today to show you stand with Alexandria and support pushing the Democratic Party forward?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241217.hoKTph&refcode=em20241217-7765-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241217.hoKTph&refcode=em20241217-7765-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)**
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. Alexandria’s Green New Deal was called pie-in-the-sky, but last year, Congress passed its largest ever investment to fight climate change — $369 billion. Now, Alexandria is fighting for legislation to regulate AI, build millions of affordable homes across the country, and much more.1
[Every dollar, no matter the amount, shows widespread support for our progressive priorities from NY-14 and beyond.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241217.hoKTph&refcode=em20241217-7765-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241217.hoKTph&refcode=em20241217-7765-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)**
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC

1 - [**NBC News:** The Defiance Act passes in the Senate, potentially allowing deepfake victims to sue over nonconsensual images](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/31509?t=23&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241217?refcode=em20241217-7765-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=24&refcode2=7765_2526796_ZhXMdb&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241217-7765-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=25&akid=7765%2E2526796%2EZhXMdb)**

clean_body: When Alexandria won in 2018, her message inspired a lot of people. She was fearless in critiquing politics-as-usual. She proposed big, new ideas — like the Green New Deal — to tackle our most difficult challenges. While Alexandria’s message resonated across the country, some Democratic Party leaders responded very differently. They called her ideas extreme and more than a few of them attacked her personally. We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: demand better. Alexandria campaigned on expanding Medicare in order to make prescriptions more affordable. Now, Medicare has the power to negotiate prescription drugs — and insulin is capped at $35/ month. Alexandria’s Green New Deal was called pie-in-the-sky, but last year, Congress passed its largest ever investment to fight climate change — $369 billion. Now, Alexandria is fighting for legislation to regulate AI, build millions of affordable homes across the country, and much more.1 Our sincerest thanks, Team AOC 1 - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: The Ohio Dems
subject: Open for a sneak peek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
and chip in, if you can.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98864808/518069842/-2131781993?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MidMonth_241217_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2Q4ZGI1OC1jZWJjLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qTybJGykGNhVVhOAvAEC_t_kpfmXoV9hJEst0AHvHF0=) Ohio Democrats are gearing up for some tough battles in the upcoming years, team.

I know it seems early to be thinking about the YEARS ahead, but the truth is, the stakes couldn’t be higher, and we need your help to stand up to extremist Republicans who want to take away our freedoms and roll back our progress.

Here’s what’s coming:

**Attorney General Dave Yost:** a leading figure in Ohio Republicans’ anti-abortion push and a staunch enforcer of the GOP’s oppressive agenda, Dave Yost has his sights set on running for governor in 2026. We cannot let his vision for Ohio become a reality.

**Loser Frank LaRose:** infamous for purging voters in an attempt to manipulate Ohio elections to favor Republicans, Loser Frank LaRose is gearing up to try and take J.D. Vance’s Senate seat. Ohioans deserve leaders who fight for democracy, not undermine it.

We know their playbook – restrict freedoms, suppress votes, and consolidate power. But with your support, we can fight back. Together, we can band against them to protect Ohioans’ rights and ensure our state represents the values of fairness, freedom, and opportunity for all.

The road ahead won’t be easy, but we’ve faced tough fights before. With grassroots supporters like you, we’ve shown we can take on Republican extremism and win. Now more than ever, we need to stay united and build the resources we need to keep Ohio moving forward.

[_**There’s only a few hours left until our mid-month deadline. Will you chip in today to help us prepare for these battles ahead? name: Kari Lake
subject: There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dfa67d4271f24b56903caf2b8f282f29&_e=3_FCxm2ClDv_Cdl1sSDgbWwc8-NihZzWsR5wGIb7RDu_QTeJHFwQpbrNmwLQCXFR3lR8LAPL3M7R1sxezf2d9l35qdv8j92XDevuh777k8TVyF_vo_ER2Hqt0xS0q_8otPqFswOWzpqBvrl0aZg-c_GRL6Ok-cC49MyE6m3aNtS33SEADl4LCresGzrAwB3tM0oTJEXrC7I2lfIj3MHXuRTjD9cVgk-ni4N5vpXlItWEjacAtm3XW5mgWH14MhMkg0WNdA1T8UGwA8RefAMofRtdikRpOsye62r6U7jCK8pTYQl4Qcqe4BO0DUQlc5D_3-pcVwAtLVU1XuthDA0gDl8LTi-nlZyviSdzGm80BLgKATzktCUDZmve34dVXHrtBvgT88xCTLi_qwoEGm-2aQpIKTuW6zkRQOZdsqIQ70w%3D)

MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dfa67d4271f24b56903caf2b8f282f29&_e=3_FCxm2ClDv_Cdl1sSDgbWwc8-NihZzWsR5wGIb7RDu_QTeJHFwQpbrNmwLQCXFR3lR8LAPL3M7R1sxezf2d9l35qdv8j92XDevuh777k8TVyF_vo_ER2Hqt0xS0q_8otPqFswOWzpqBvrl0aZg-c_GRL6Ok-cC49MyE6m3aNtS33SEADl4LCresGzrAwB3tM0oTJEXrC7I2lfIj3MHXuRTjD9cVgk-ni4N5vpXlItWEjacAtm3XW5mgWH14MhMkg0WNdA1T8UGwA8RefAMofRyzwsURclC06n7cUVuw2FhjeAsmznGh4weDPz5o7jpkNUTZ9XkBTF0L7hgW4xwXi_vfv5DET03xp6eVOZTfxiRY7ilPcoaB_bnQbDqlxQRA8SWbMORhE9UHC1-eMO3CBPzjt5KOrDD-y8zZecVnzZk%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dfa67d4271f24b56903caf2b8f282f29&_e=3_FCxm2ClDv_Cdl1sSDgbWwc8-NihZzWsR5wGIb7RDu_QTeJHFwQpbrNmwLQCXFR3lR8LAPL3M7R1sxezf2d9l35qdv8j92XDevuh777k8TVyF_vo_ER2Hqt0xS0q_8otPqFswOWzpqBvrl0aZg-c_GRL6Ok-cC49MyE6m3aNtS33SEADl4LCresGzrAwB3tM0oTJEXrC7I2lfIj3MHXuRTjD9cVgk-ni4N5vpXlItWEjacAtm3XW5mgWH14MhMkg0WNdA1T8UGwA8RefAMofeXda-htuuUDyOL4ahiDAdlm_accvO08O4-sdPe19H-UpH8ZeDP0ju8HpUxS7IAA7dazWubvjDyqmMdTkqeurCSjyPZ_DFyy_DH9ocuYgVdd4vXNySLrGc4KGYdjUPOO7sDVOEiPNt2V-AOMCNJuNiU%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dfa67d4271f24b56903caf2b8f282f29&_e=3_FCxm2ClDv_Cdl1sSDgbWwc8-NihZzWsR5wGIb7RDu_QTeJHFwQpbrNmwLQCXFR3lR8LAPL3M7R1sxezf2d9l35qdv8j92XDevuh777k8TVyF_vo_ER2Hqt0xS0q_8otPqFswOWzpqBvrl0aZg-c_GRL6Ok-cC49MyE6m3aNtS33SEADl4LCresGzrAwB3tM0oTJEXrC7I2lfIj3MHXuRTjD9cVgk-ni4N5vpXlItWEjacAtm3XW5mgWH14MhMkg0WNdA1T8UGwA8RefAMofcgK3Trf24eIa-3E4MPcEvjFG_A-5wIN91XmsWFGa6Nh1zPrf_FjlCf1qO12J6ywBorrckaBG2_co6tYHsnf-WP9i32jl-EiHdE3E2MJiEsESxJPC6wOi_Z-gtIHAJ8VGFbHKP0FbFKj-LX27_MCbJk%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dfa67d4271f24b56903caf2b8f282f29&_e=3_FCxm2ClDv_Cdl1sSDgbWwc8-NihZzWsR5wGIb7RDu_QTeJHFwQpbrNmwLQCXFR3lR8LAPL3M7R1sxezf2d9l35qdv8j92XDevuh777k8TVyF_vo_ER2Hqt0xS0q_8otPqFswOWzpqBvrl0aZg-c_GRL6Ok-cC49MyE6m3aNtS33SEADl4LCresGzrAwB3tM0oTJEXrC7I2lfIj3MHXuRTjD9cVgk-ni4N5vpXlItWEjacAtm3XW5mgWH14MhMkg0WNdA1T8UGwA8RefAMofXG6_A8p-LI1X8nXwQ0kh2w2ykr5Vu1pxoPTbXqR1Fzd3lpDBPRf9fKdkzRqLVaQrGMYyBixEb9I--M2YMHrzBWvrfi6O1JAAZxPwXS7ilRjO5mtnYS-V_EyrmXMPlgvbXqz7BWbsRjsh07Ybm8BuAE%3D)

Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: A new birth of freedom
body:
You understand the urgency of the situation

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4d575f5c337a4870a2774d24c6b2475a&_e=vdGQynSRaA1GQVkTNt5BDg-_F0jqVJjDsrf0YZAdY-fzI4LJamzTyvjP0dca4O9JYUi2jb103En3CszjCre47dE9R79_y6N9Xmkmp-oYueDaxWXTsE819exikCgkVKnZ1E0IqrICbAAn_Ix6JXqYtPqRdsa7c4l8SM60nSxR7_PnKwTxXp5q8apE21xCp-DxW-nB54x1qH9ehCHIpWp98XXPcedz87-M9tC1vT3snLysCq1Kk34NPaUnuedJoj9OVOpPV7UIAXtAL_XHEqME_yfauMMeOJvi-cGcg6IO8c20ugO9HhBKD36UQT5dOULUXw2yo1FFv8Rbm2dS9EEWn42bTty17zdca4t2cpIJRWS48tdvYP4dAYx9Me2jxCjtfB63jG38m43xZh-Tex6vcQ%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4d575f5c337a4870a2774d24c6b2475a&_e=vdGQynSRaA1GQVkTNt5BDg-_F0jqVJjDsrf0YZAdY-fzI4LJamzTyvjP0dca4O9JYUi2jb103En3CszjCre47dE9R79_y6N9Xmkmp-oYueDaxWXTsE819exikCgkVKnZ1E0IqrICbAAn_Ix6JXqYtPqRdsa7c4l8SM60nSxR7_PnKwTxXp5q8apE21xCp-DxW-nB54x1qH9ehCHIpWp98XXPcedz87-M9tC1vT3snLzfLjOce7-CgIeOpgavY-g0NjVEBALDhfVWcMfJzJybLF_nEYjU7bJxo30x4rW_WuBzSDWl_80Bz7CS61hEKfd_dv9uBOe0aI8fREh7ozHhkVKgpwJf26G6SWpHuDiQpF7VFuFfMXq1zxWONjNrA2dSRzayW26vZnZHSrQ7sGDIPQ%3D%3D)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4d575f5c337a4870a2774d24c6b2475a&_e=vdGQynSRaA1GQVkTNt5BDg-_F0jqVJjDsrf0YZAdY-fzI4LJamzTyvjP0dca4O9JYUi2jb103En3CszjCre47dE9R79_y6N9Xmkmp-oYueDaxWXTsE819exikCgkVKnZ1E0IqrICbAAn_Ix6JXqYtPqRdsa7c4l8SM60nSxR7_PnKwTxXp5q8apE21xCp-DxW-nB54x1qH9ehCHIpWp98XXPcedz87-M9tC1vT3snLxCjL_oj4VZ6deNjk9sklfXFAaQMuHhD2hmoQ_Y9smNILNS--M3uwOt737lgwXRYBwpMeBYR6SF7MFhK_Y1e4YOyxBaMjaBMmmP-C9xHrD-IcQssOfiQORBtU_msGVlRGa_rd18C8p7uozllzKq3H3rgr1zWVpqyAZd0c8osZ3G5A%3D%3D)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we’ve made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed—because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** —as it does all its work—while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters’ contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4d575f5c337a4870a2774d24c6b2475a&_e=vdGQynSRaA1GQVkTNt5BDg-_F0jqVJjDsrf0YZAdY-fzI4LJamzTyvjP0dca4O9JYUi2jb103En3CszjCre47dE9R79_y6N9Xmkmp-oYueDaxWXTsE819exikCgkVKnZ1E0IqrICbAAn_Ix6JXqYtPqRdsa7c4l8SM60nSxR7_PnKwTxXp5q8apE21xCp-DxW-nB54x1qH9ehCHIpWp98XXPcedz87-M9tC1vT3snLwXfv6MD4GuKagDsSoTfvqdYivkDIhsYNe4WfsthW0ROQ8__9smyi-4e0_pwzxc9ftUErgpqPDPCFn6RHQGyXeLDNmV9HWeHGiQtZMAJb0jaYsF34DN95Nz4O4Lf4vdI95EW3bMQcMvf6opFYcJBjzuC3HtbL0s8WaZm17aiwBi8Q%3D%3D)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=4d575f5c337a4870a2774d24c6b2475a&_t=zWokE2iw1g9-C3gol_JNA4nOoERumcEqN7KLY2yw0KZs1gsAVYzq72UNH8fhRCbBe-OLTwofcl03xLNz67UxWAvUoZrn-iUDdBmq2R4f29_AGgUtpa9z2HJdQNYpPZ-v)
